question: What are the titles and paper ids for papers which were affiliated with both Stanford and Columbia University?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Affiliation AS T3 ON T2.affiliation_id  =  T3.affiliation_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "Stanford University" INTERSECT SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Affiliation AS T3 ON T2.affiliation_id  =  T3.affiliation_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "Columbia University"

question: What is the title of the paper that has most number of authors?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Author_list AS T1 JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id GROUP BY T2.paper_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles for papers with more than 50 citations?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Citation AS T1 JOIN Paper AS T2 ON T1.cited_paper_id  =  T2.paper_id GROUP BY T1.cited_paper_id HAVING count(*)  >  50

question: Find the names of authors who published some paper on NAACL and ACL in the year 2009.

question: What are the titles and paper ids which have Mckeown as an author, but not Rambow?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Mckeown%" EXCEPT SELECT T1.title ,  T1.paper_id FROM Paper AS T1 JOIN Author_list AS T2 ON T1.paper_id  =  T2.paper_id JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.author_id  =  T3.author_id WHERE T3.name LIKE "%Rambow%"

question: return me the papers written by " H. V. Jagadish " and " Divesh Srivastava " with the most number of citations .

V. Jagadish" ORDER BY t5.citation_num DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many cities are in Canada?

question: Give the state that has the most students.
original_query: SELECT T1.state FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.state ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the city names for cities in the USA, ordered by latitude?
original_query: SELECT city_name FROM City WHERE country  =  "USA" ORDER BY latitude

question: What are the states with more than 5 students?
original_query: SELECT T1.state FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.state HAVING count(*)  >  5

question: Give the country with the fewest students.
original_query: SELECT T1.country FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.country ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: Show all countries and number of cities in each .
original_query: select country ,  count(*) from city group by country

question: What are the ids for male students not in the USA?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code WHERE T2.sex  =  'M' AND T1.country != "USA"

question: Which state does the student whose first name is Linda live in?
original_query: SELECT state FROM Student AS T1 JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code WHERE T1.Fname  =  "Linda"

question: What is the first name and last name of the student living furthest to Linda Smith?
original_query: SELECT T3.Fname ,  T3.Lname FROM Direct_distance AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city1_code  =  T2.city_code JOIN Student AS T3 ON T1.city2_code  =  T3.city_code WHERE T2.Fname  =  "Linda" AND T2.Lname  =  "Smith" ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the distance between the cities where Linda Smith and Tracy Kim live?
original_query: SELECT distance FROM Direct_distance AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city1_code  =  T2.city_code JOIN Student AS T3 ON T1.city2_code  =  T3.city_code WHERE T2.Fname  =  "Linda" AND T2.Lname  =  "Smith" AND T3.Fname  =  "Tracy" AND T3.Lname  =  "Kim"

question: Give the average, minimum, and maximum distances between two cities.
original_query: SELECT avg(distance) ,  min(distance) ,  max(distance) FROM Direct_distance

question: Which state has most number of students?
original_query: SELECT T1.state FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.state ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show ids for all students who don't live in USA.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student EXCEPT SELECT StuID FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code WHERE country  =  "USA"

question: What is the average, minimum, maximum distance between two cities?
original_query: SELECT avg(distance) ,  min(distance) ,  max(distance) FROM Direct_distance

question: Give the city name of the city with greatest distance from Boston.
original_query: SELECT T3.city_name FROM Direct_distance AS T1 JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.city1_code  =  T2.city_code JOIN City AS T3 ON T1.city2_code  =  T3.city_code WHERE T2.city_name  =  "Boston" ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the nearest city to Chicago.
original_query: SELECT T3.city_name FROM Direct_distance AS T1 JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.city1_code  =  T2.city_code JOIN City AS T3 ON T1.city2_code  =  T3.city_code WHERE T2.city_name  =  "Chicago" ORDER BY distance LIMIT 1

question: Show ids for all male students living outside of USA.
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code WHERE T2.sex  =  'M' AND T1.country != "USA"

question: Show all states and number of cities in each state.
original_query: SELECT state ,  count(*) FROM City GROUP BY state

question: How many students live in each country?
original_query: SELECT T1.country ,  count(*) FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.country

question: Show me the city code of two cities with a distance greater than the average.
original_query: SELECT city1_code ,  city2_code FROM Direct_distance WHERE distance  >  (SELECT avg(distance) FROM Direct_distance)

question: How many cities are in each state?
original_query: SELECT state ,  count(*) FROM City GROUP BY state

question: Show the number of students living in each country.
original_query: SELECT T1.country ,  count(*) FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.country

question: What is the total distance between city BAL and all other cities.
original_query: SELECT sum(distance) FROM Direct_distance WHERE city1_code  =  "BAL"

question: What are the full names of students living in MD?
original_query: SELECT T2.Fname ,  T2.Lname FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code WHERE T1.state  =  "MD"

question: Count the number of coutries.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT country) FROM City

question: Which states have at least two cities?
original_query: SELECT state FROM City GROUP BY state HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Count the number of cities in Canada.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM City WHERE country  =  "CANADA"

question: Find the number of students living in each city.
original_query: SELECT T1.city_name ,  count(*) FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.city_code

question: What is the full name of the student who lives furthest from Linda Smith?
original_query: SELECT T3.Fname ,  T3.Lname FROM Direct_distance AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city1_code  =  T2.city_code JOIN Student AS T3 ON T1.city2_code  =  T3.city_code WHERE T2.Fname  =  "Linda" AND T2.Lname  =  "Smith" ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all city codes and the total distance to all other cities.
original_query: SELECT city1_code ,  sum(distance) FROM Direct_distance GROUP BY city1_code

question: Which country has least number of students?
original_query: SELECT T1.country FROM City AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.city_code  =  T2.city_code GROUP BY T1.country ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What are all the agency ids and details?
original_query: SELECT agency_id ,  agency_details FROM Agencies

question: What are the ids, statuses, and details for all invoices?
original_query: SELECT invoice_id ,  invoice_status ,  invoice_details FROM Invoices

question: How many invoices are there for each client id?
original_query: SELECT client_id ,  count(*) FROM Invoices GROUP BY client_id

question: Show all payment ids and details for invoices whose status is 'Working'.
original_query: SELECT T1.payment_id ,  T1.payment_details FROM Payments AS T1 JOIN Invoices AS T2 ON T1.invoice_id  =  T2.invoice_id WHERE T2.invoice_status  =  'Working'

question: What is the agency id and details with most number of clients?
original_query: SELECT T1.agency_id ,  T1.agency_details FROM Agencies AS T1 JOIN Clients AS T2 ON T1.agency_id  =  T2.agency_id GROUP BY T1.agency_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of staff who did not attend any meeting.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Staff WHERE staff_id NOT IN ( SELECT staff_id FROM Staff_in_meetings )

question: What are all payment ids and payment details for invoices with status Working?
original_query: SELECT T1.payment_id ,  T1.payment_details FROM Payments AS T1 JOIN Invoices AS T2 ON T1.invoice_id  =  T2.invoice_id WHERE T2.invoice_status  =  'Working'

question: Show all the different invoice ids and statuses of the payments
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.invoice_id ,  T1.invoice_status FROM Invoices AS T1 JOIN Payments AS T2 ON T1.invoice_id  =  T2.invoice_id

question: Show all client ids and details with sic code "Bad".
original_query: SELECT client_id ,  client_details FROM Clients WHERE sic_code  =  "Bad";

question: What is the staff id of the staff who attended the least meetings but attended some meeting?
original_query: SELECT staff_id ,  count(*) FROM Staff_in_meetings GROUP BY staff_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: List all meeting type codes and details.
original_query: SELECT meeting_type ,  other_details FROM meetings

question: How many meetings are there for each meeting type?
original_query: SELECT meeting_type ,  count(*) FROM Meetings GROUP BY meeting_type

question: How many staff do we have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Staff

question: What are the distinct invoice ids and statuses for all payments?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.invoice_id ,  T1.invoice_status FROM Invoices AS T1 JOIN Payments AS T2 ON T1.invoice_id  =  T2.invoice_id

question: What are the id, sic code and agency id of the client who has attended 1 meeting and has any invoice.
original_query: SELECT T1.client_id ,  T1.sic_code ,  T1.agency_id FROM clients AS T1 JOIN meetings AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id GROUP BY T1.client_id HAVING count(*)  =  1 INTERSECT SELECT T1.client_id ,  T1.sic_code ,  T1.agency_id FROM clients AS T1 JOIN invoices AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id

question: Return the ids, sic codes, and agency ids of clients who have attended 1 meeting and had an invoice.
original_query: SELECT T1.client_id ,  T1.sic_code ,  T1.agency_id FROM clients AS T1 JOIN meetings AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id GROUP BY T1.client_id HAVING count(*)  =  1 INTERSECT SELECT T1.client_id ,  T1.sic_code ,  T1.agency_id FROM clients AS T1 JOIN invoices AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id

question: How many payments do we have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Payments

question: What is the invoice id, status code, and details for the invoice with most number of payments.
original_query: SELECT T1.invoice_id ,  T2.invoice_status ,  T2.invoice_details FROM Payments AS T1 JOIN Invoices AS T2 ON T1.invoice_id  =  T2.invoice_id GROUP BY T1.invoice_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show all agency ids and details.
original_query: SELECT agency_id ,  agency_details FROM Agencies

question: Show all meeting outcomes and purposes.
original_query: SELECT meeting_outcome ,  purpose_of_meeting FROM meetings

question: What are the agency ids and details agencies with at least 2 clients?
original_query: SELECT T1.agency_id ,  T1.agency_details FROM Agencies AS T1 JOIN Clients AS T2 ON T1.agency_id  =  T2.agency_id GROUP BY T1.agency_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show all meeting ids, meeting outcomes, meeting types and the details of the client atttending it.
original_query: SELECT T1.meeting_id ,  T1.meeting_outcome ,  T1.meeting_type ,  T2.client_details FROM meetings AS T1 JOIN clients AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id

question: How many staff have attended a meeting?

question: Show the meeting ids and the number of staff in each meeting.
original_query: SELECT meeting_id ,  count(*) FROM Staff_in_meetings GROUP BY meeting_id

question: Return the agency ids and number of staff in each.

question: Show agency ids and details with at least 2 clients.

question: List the start time, end time of each meeting, and the corresponding client detail and staff detail.
original_query: SELECT T1.start_date_time ,  T1.end_date_time ,  T2.client_details ,  T4.staff_details FROM meetings AS T1 JOIN clients AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id JOIN staff_in_meetings AS T3 ON T1.meeting_id  =  T3.meeting_id JOIN staff AS T4 ON T3.staff_id  =  T4.staff_id

question: Show details for all clients and the details of their corresponding agents.

question: Return the client ids for clients with two or more invoices?
original_query: SELECT client_id FROM Invoices GROUP BY client_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the staff id and the number of meetings attended by the staff who attended some meeting but had the lowest attendance.
original_query: SELECT staff_id ,  count(*) FROM Staff_in_meetings GROUP BY staff_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Count the number of agencies.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Agencies

question: What are all the client ids and details?

question: How many meetings had each meeting outcome?
original_query: SELECT meeting_outcome ,  count(*) FROM Meetings GROUP BY meeting_outcome

question: How many clients does each agency have?

question: Show agency details for client with detail 'Mac'.

question: List all client ids and client details.
original_query: SELECT client_id ,  client_details FROM Clients

question: Show all agency ids without any client.
original_query: SELECT agency_id FROM Agencies EXCEPT SELECT agency_id FROM Clients

question: What are the invoice status, invoice details, and corresponding client ids and details and agency id and details?
original_query: SELECT T1.invoice_status ,  T1.invoice_details ,  T2.client_id ,  T2.client_details ,  T3.agency_id ,  T3.agency_details FROM Invoices AS T1 JOIN Clients AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id JOIN Agencies AS T3 ON T2.agency_id  =  T3.agency_id

question: What are all meeting types and other details?
original_query: SELECT meeting_type ,  other_details FROM meetings

question: What are the ids and details of the staff who have attended at least 1 meetings and have the detail with letter 's'?
original_query: SELECT staff_id ,  staff_details FROM staff WHERE staff_details LIKE "%s%" GROUP BY staff_id HAVING count(*)  >=  1

question: What are client ids for clients with at least 2 invoices.

question: What are the agency details for clients with the detail Mac?

question: What are all meeting outcomes and purposes?
original_query: SELECT meeting_outcome ,  purpose_of_meeting FROM meetings

question: What are the start and end times of each meeting, as well as the corresponding client and staff details the attendees?
original_query: SELECT T1.start_date_time ,  T1.end_date_time ,  T2.client_details ,  T4.staff_details FROM meetings AS T1 JOIN clients AS T2 ON T1.client_id  =  T2.client_id JOIN staff_in_meetings AS T3 ON T1.meeting_id  =  T3.meeting_id JOIN staff AS T4 ON T3.staff_id  =  T4.staff_id

question: Show ids, status codes, and details for all invoices for clients.
original_query: SELECT invoice_id ,  invoice_status ,  invoice_details FROM Invoices

question: List the names of aircrafts and the number of times it won matches.
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft ,  COUNT(*) FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN MATCH AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Winning_Aircraft GROUP BY T2.Winning_Aircraft

question: What are the names of all pilots listed by descending age?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM pilot ORDER BY Age DESC

question: What is the number of aircraft?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM aircraft

question: find the name and age of the pilot who has won the most number of times among the pilots who are younger than 30.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.age FROM pilot AS t1 JOIN MATCH AS t2 ON t1.pilot_id  =  t2.winning_pilot WHERE t1.age  <  30 GROUP BY t2.winning_pilot ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the name of the aircraft that has been named winning aircraft the most number of times.
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN MATCH AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Winning_Aircraft GROUP BY T2.Winning_Aircraft ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of all the aircrafts associated with London Gatwick airport?
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN airport_aircraft AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Aircraft_ID JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.Airport_ID  =  T3.Airport_ID WHERE T3.Airport_Name  =  "London Gatwick"

question: Please show the names of aircrafts associated with airport with name "London Gatwick".
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN airport_aircraft AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Aircraft_ID JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.Airport_ID  =  T3.Airport_ID WHERE T3.Airport_Name  =  "London Gatwick"

question: What is the name of the aircraft that has won an award the most?
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN MATCH AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Winning_Aircraft GROUP BY T2.Winning_Aircraft ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the description of all aircrafts.
original_query: SELECT Description FROM aircraft

question: What is the maximum and mininum number of transit passengers for all airports?
original_query: SELECT max(Transit_Passengers) ,  min(Transit_Passengers) FROM airport

question: What is the average number of international passengers of all airports?
original_query: SELECT avg(International_Passengers) FROM airport

question: Please list the location and the winning aircraft name.
original_query: SELECT T2.Location ,  T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN MATCH AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Winning_Aircraft

question: List the names of aircrafts and that won matches at least twice.
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN MATCH AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Winning_Aircraft GROUP BY T2.Winning_Aircraft HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: Show all information on the airport that has the largest number of international passengers.
original_query: SELECT * FROM airport ORDER BY International_Passengers DESC LIMIT 1

question: find the name of pilots who did not win the matches held in the country of Australia.
original_query: SELECT name FROM pilot WHERE pilot_id NOT IN (SELECT Winning_Pilot  FROM MATCH WHERE country  =  'Australia')

question: What is the average total number of passengers of airports that are associated with aircraft "Robinson R-22"?
original_query: SELECT avg(T3.Total_Passengers) FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN airport_aircraft AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Aircraft_ID JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.Airport_ID  =  T3.Airport_ID WHERE T1.Aircraft  =  "Robinson R-22"

question: Show the names of aircrafts that are associated with both an airport named "London Heathrow" and an airport named "London Gatwick"
original_query: SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN airport_aircraft AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Aircraft_ID JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.Airport_ID  =  T3.Airport_ID WHERE T3.Airport_Name  =  "London Heathrow" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Aircraft FROM aircraft AS T1 JOIN airport_aircraft AS T2 ON T1.Aircraft_ID  =  T2.Aircraft_ID JOIN airport AS T3 ON T2.Airport_ID  =  T3.Airport_ID WHERE T3.Airport_Name  =  "London Gatwick"

question: What are the total number of Domestic Passengers of airports that contain the word "London".
original_query: SELECT sum(Domestic_Passengers) FROM airport WHERE Airport_Name LIKE "%London%"

question: List all pilot names in ascending alphabetical order.

question: What is the name and age of the pilot younger than 30 who has won the most number of times?

question: what is the name of every pilot who is at least 25 years old?

question: What are the names of the pilots in alphabetical order?

question: Find the number of students who are older than 18 and do not have allergy to either food or animal.

original_query: SELECT T1.Allergy ,  T1.AllergyType FROM Allergy_type AS T1 JOIN Has_allergy AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy JOIN Student AS T3 ON T3.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T3.Fname  =  "Lisa" ORDER BY T1.Allergy

original_query: SELECT age ,  count(*) FROM Student GROUP BY age

question: How many female students have milk or egg allergies?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Student AS T2 ON T1.StuID  =  T2.StuID WHERE T2.sex  =  "F" AND T1.allergy  =  "Milk" OR T1.allergy  =  "Eggs"

question: Show all allergy types.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT allergytype FROM Allergy_type

question: What student id corresponds to the oldest student?
original_query: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE age  =  (SELECT max(age) FROM Student)

question: How old are the students with allergies to food and animal types on average?
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM Student WHERE StuID IN ( SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "food" INTERSECT SELECT T1.StuID FROM Has_allergy AS T1 JOIN Allergy_Type AS T2 ON T1.Allergy  =  T2.Allergy WHERE T2.allergytype  =  "animal")

question: Find the first name and major of the students who are not allegry to soy.
original_query: SELECT fname ,  major FROM Student WHERE StuID NOT IN (SELECT StuID FROM Has_allergy WHERE Allergy  =  "Soy")

question: How many different advisors are listed?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT advisor) FROM Student

question: Which city does the student whose last name is "Kim" live in?
original_query: SELECT city_code FROM Student WHERE LName  =  "Kim"

question: Which allergy has most number of students affected?
original_query: SELECT Allergy FROM Has_allergy GROUP BY Allergy ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the last name of the youngest student.
original_query: SELECT LName FROM Student WHERE age  =  (SELECT min(age) FROM Student)

question: Return all the apartment numbers sorted by the room count in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT apt_number FROM Apartments ORDER BY room_count ASC

question: Show the booking status code and the corresponding number of bookings.

question: Find the total number of rooms in the apartments that have facility code "Gym".
original_query: SELECT sum(T2.room_count) FROM Apartment_Facilities AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.facility_code  =  "Gym"

question: Which apartments have bookings with both status codes "Provisional" and "Confirmed"? Give me the apartment numbers.
original_query: SELECT T2.apt_number FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Confirmed" INTERSECT SELECT T2.apt_number FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code  =  "Provisional"

question: Which buildings have apartments that have more than two bathrooms? Give me the addresses of the buildings.
original_query: SELECT T1.building_address FROM Apartment_Buildings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.building_id  =  T2.building_id WHERE T2.bathroom_count  >  2

question: What are the top three apartment types in terms of the average room count? Give me the
original_query: SELECT apt_type_code FROM Apartments GROUP BY apt_type_code ORDER BY avg(room_count) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Return each apartment type code with the number of apartments having that apartment type, in ascending order of the number of apartments.

question: Show the most common apartment type code among apartments with more than 1 bathroom.

question: Return the booking start date and end date for the apartments that have type code "Duplex".

question: Show the apartment type codes and apartment numbers in the buildings managed by "Kyle".

question: What are the apartment number, start date, and end date of each apartment booking?

question: What apartment type codes and apartment numbers do the buildings managed by "Kyle" have?

question: What is the minimum and maximum number of bathrooms of all the apartments?

question: Show the apartment type code that has the largest number of total rooms, together with the number of bathrooms and number of bedrooms.

question: Which apartment type code is the most common among apartments with more than one bathroom?

question: Which apartments have unit status availability of both 0 and 1? Return their apartment numbers.

question: Show the apartment numbers, start dates, and end dates of all the apartment bookings.

question: Show the top 3 apartment type codes sorted by the average number of rooms in descending order.

question: What is the most common mill type, and how many are there?
original_query: SELECT TYPE ,  count(*) FROM mill GROUP BY TYPE ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average length in feet of the bridges?
original_query: SELECT avg(length_feet) FROM bridge

question: List the name, nationality and id of all male architects ordered by their names lexicographically.
original_query: SELECT name ,  nationality ,  id FROM architect WHERE gender  =  'male' ORDER BY name

question: show the name of all bridges that was designed by american archtect, and sort the result by the bridge feet length.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM bridge AS t1 JOIN architect AS t2 ON t1.architect_id  =  t2.id WHERE t2.nationality  =  'American' ORDER BY t1.length_feet

question: What are the distinct name of the mills built by the architects who have also built a bridge longer than 80 meters?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM mill AS T1 JOIN architect AS t2 ON T1.architect_id  =  T2.id JOIN bridge AS T3 ON T3.architect_id  =  T2.id WHERE T3.length_meters  >  80

question: Which of the mill names contains the french word 'Moulin'?
original_query: SELECT name FROM mill WHERE name LIKE '%Moulin%'

question: What are the names of the mills which are not located in 'Donceel'?
original_query: SELECT name FROM mill WHERE LOCATION != 'Donceel'

question: What are the ids and names of the architects who built at least 3 bridges ?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM architect AS T1 JOIN bridge AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.architect_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >=  3

question: What are the ids, names and genders of the architects who built two bridges or one mill?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name ,  T1.gender FROM architect AS T1 JOIN bridge AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.architect_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  =  2 UNION SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name ,  T1.gender FROM architect AS T1 JOIN mill AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.architect_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: Find the ids of paintings whose height is bigger than 500 and less than 2000?
original_query: SELECT paintingID FROM paintings WHERE height_mm  >  500 AND height_mm  <  2000

question: What is the id of every painting created before the oldest painting in gallery 240?
original_query: SELECT paintingID FROM paintings WHERE YEAR  <   (SELECT min(YEAR) FROM paintings WHERE LOCATION  =  'Gallery 240')

question: What are the id and height of the painting with the longest width in gallery 240?
original_query: SELECT paintingID ,  height_mm FROM paintings WHERE LOCATION  =  'Gallery 240' ORDER BY width_mm DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles of all paintings and sculpture works made by the artist whose id is 222?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM artists AS T1 JOIN paintings AS T2 ON T1.artistID  =  T2.painterID WHERE T1.artistID  =  222 UNION SELECT T4.title FROM artists AS T3 JOIN sculptures AS T4 ON T3.artistID  =  T4.sculptorID WHERE T3.artistID  =  222

question: What are the titles of paintings that have a width less than 600 or a height taller taller than 800?

question: What are the distinct ids of every painting that is older than some painting in gallery 240?

question: What are the first and last names of the artists who did not sculpt but could paint.

question: How old is the artist who lived the shortest life?

question: Which parts have more than 2 faults? Show the part name and id.

question: How many engineers did each staff contact? List both the contact staff name and number of engineers contacted.

question: How many assets does each maintenance contract contain? List the number and the contract id.

question: Which engineer has visited the most times? Show the engineer id, first name and last name.

question: What is the name and id of the staff who recorded the fault log but has not contacted any visiting engineers?
original_query: SELECT T1.staff_name ,  T1.staff_id FROM Staff AS T1 JOIN Fault_Log AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.recorded_by_staff_id EXCEPT SELECT T3.staff_name ,  T3.staff_id FROM Staff AS T3 JOIN Engineer_Visits AS T4 ON T3.staff_id  =  T4.contact_staff_id

question: List the all the assets make, model, details by the disposed date ascendingly.

question: Which staff have contacted which engineers? List the staff name and the engineer first name and last name.
