question: List all every engineer's first name, last name, details and coresponding skill description.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.other_details ,  T3.skill_description FROM Maintenance_Engineers AS T1 JOIN Engineer_Skills AS T2 ON T1.engineer_id  =  T2.engineer_id JOIN Skills AS T3 ON T2.skill_id  =  T3.skill_id

question: Which skill is used in fixing the most number of faults? List the skill id and description.
original_query: SELECT T1.skill_id ,  T1.skill_description FROM Skills AS T1 JOIN Skills_Required_To_Fix AS T2 ON T1.skill_id  =  T2.skill_id GROUP BY T1.skill_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which third party companies have at least 2 maintenance engineers or have at least 2 maintenance contracts? List the company id and name.
original_query: SELECT T1.company_id ,  T1.company_name FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 JOIN Maintenance_Engineers AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.company_id GROUP BY T1.company_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 UNION SELECT T3.company_id ,  T3.company_name FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T3 JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T4 ON T3.company_id  =  T4.maintenance_contract_company_id GROUP BY T3.company_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Which assets did not incur any fault log? List the asset model.
original_query: SELECT asset_model FROM Assets WHERE asset_id NOT IN (SELECT asset_id FROM Fault_Log)

question: What are all the fault descriptions and the fault status of all the faults recoreded in the logs?
original_query: SELECT T1.fault_description ,  T2.fault_status FROM Fault_Log AS T1 JOIN Fault_Log_Parts AS T2 ON T1.fault_log_entry_id  =  T2.fault_log_entry_id

question: How many assets does each third party company supply? List the count and the company id.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id  =  T2.supplier_company_id GROUP BY T1.company_id

question: Give the ids of Cookies or Cakes that cost between 3 and 7 dollars.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" OR food  =  "Cake" AND price BETWEEN 3 AND 7

question: What distinct receipt numbers correspond to someone who bought a good that costs more than 13 dollars?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ReceiptNumber FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id WHERE T3.price  >  13

question: List the distinct ids of all customers who bought a cake with lemon flavor?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber WHERE T1.Flavor  =  "Lemon" AND T1.Food  =  "Cake"

question: What are the distinct ids and prices for goods that cost less than the average good?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id ,  price FROM goods WHERE price  <  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods)

question: Return the cheapest price for goods with cheese flavor.
original_query: SELECT min(price) FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Cheese"

question: Find the ids of goods that have apple flavor.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Apple"

question: What is the cheapest cookie and its flavor?
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cookie" ORDER BY price LIMIT 1

question: What are the distinct ids of customers who bought lemon flavored cake?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.Receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber WHERE T1.Flavor  =  "Lemon" AND T1.Food  =  "Cake"

question: Give me the first name and last name of customers who have bought apple flavor Tart.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T4.FirstName ,  T4.LastName FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber JOIN customers AS T4 ON T3.CustomerId  =  T4.id WHERE T1.flavor  =  "Apple" AND T1.food  =  "Tart"

question: What are the ids and flavors of cakes, ordered by flavor?
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" ORDER BY flavor

question: What is average price of goods whose flavor is blackberry or blueberry?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Blackberry" OR flavor  =  "Blueberry"

question: What are the maximum, minimum, and average prices of goods of each flavor, ordered by flavor?
original_query: SELECT max(price) ,  min(price) ,  avg(price) ,  flavor FROM goods GROUP BY flavor ORDER BY flavor

question: Find the ids of customers who have spent more than 150 dollars in total.
original_query: SELECT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.CustomerId HAVING sum(T1.price)  >  150

question: Which item was bought the fewest times?
original_query: SELECT item FROM items GROUP BY item ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What are the ids of goods that cost less than 3 dollars?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE price  <  3

question: Return a list of the id and flavor for Cakes ordered by flavor.
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" ORDER BY flavor

question: Find all receipts which either has the earliest date or has a good with price above 10.
original_query: SELECT T1.Receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.price  >  10 UNION SELECT ReceiptNumber FROM receipts WHERE date  =  (SELECT date FROM receipts ORDER BY date LIMIT 1)

question: Which customer shopped most often? How many times?
original_query: SELECT CustomerId ,  count(*) FROM receipts GROUP BY CustomerId ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the ids of customers who have spent over 150 dollars in total?
original_query: SELECT T3.CustomerId FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber GROUP BY T3.CustomerId HAVING sum(T1.price)  >  150

question: Find the id of customers who shopped at the bakery at least 15 times.
original_query: SELECT CustomerId FROM receipts GROUP BY CustomerId HAVING count(*)  >=  15

question: Return the lowest and highest prices of goods grouped and ordered by food type.
original_query: SELECT min(price) ,  max(price) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food ORDER BY food

question: What are the receipt numbers for which either an apple flavor pie was purchased or the customer with id 12 shopped?
original_query: SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.flavor  =  "Apple" AND T2.food  =  "Pie" UNION SELECT ReceiptNumber FROM receipts WHERE CustomerId  =  12

question: What are the ids with apple flavor?
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Apple"

question: What are the three dates for which the most receipts were given?
original_query: SELECT date FROM receipts GROUP BY date ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: List distinct receipt numbers for which someone bought a good that costs more than 13 dollars.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ReceiptNumber FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id WHERE T3.price  >  13

question: What are the flavors available for Cake but not for Tart?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart"

question: List the last names of all customers in an alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LastName FROM customers ORDER BY LastName

question: Give the ids of goods that are more than twice as expensive as the average good.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE price  >  (SELECT avg(price) FROM goods)

question: What are the average prices of goods with blackberry or blueberry flavor?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Blackberry" OR flavor  =  "Blueberry"

question: Return the ordered list of all good ids.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM goods ORDER BY id

question: Give the average price for each food type.
original_query: SELECT avg(price) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: Find all the items that have chocolate flavor but were not bought more than 10 times.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.item FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.flavor  =  "Chocolate" GROUP BY item HAVING count(*)  <=  10

question: What is the average price for each food type?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: What is the full name of the customer who visited on the earliest date?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName ,  T1.LastName FROM customers AS T1 JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.CustomerId ORDER BY T2.date LIMIT 1

question: What is the receipt number with the latest date, and what is that date?
original_query: SELECT ReceiptNumber ,  date FROM receipts WHERE date  =  (SELECT date FROM receipts ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1)

question: How many goods are available for each food type?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: What are the receipt numbers for a customer with the last name Logan who purchased a croissant?
original_query: SELECT T1.ReceiptNumber FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id JOIN customers AS T4 ON T4.Id  =  T1.CustomerId WHERE T3.food  =  "Croissant" AND T4.LastName  =  'LOGAN'

question: Give the flavors of Cakes that are not available for Tart.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Tart"

question: What is the most expensive cake and its flavor?
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor FROM goods WHERE food  =  "Cake" ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the full names of customers who bought apple flavored Tarts?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T4.FirstName ,  T4.LastName FROM goods AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.item JOIN receipts AS T3 ON T2.receipt  =  T3.ReceiptNumber JOIN customers AS T4 ON T3.CustomerId  =  T4.id WHERE T1.flavor  =  "Apple" AND T1.food  =  "Tart"

question: What are the id and price for the good with "70" in its id?
original_query: SELECT id ,  price FROM goods WHERE id LIKE "%70%"

question: Give the ids of goods that cost less than 3 dollars.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE price  <  3

question: Which good has "70" in its id? And what is its price?
original_query: SELECT id ,  price FROM goods WHERE id LIKE "%70%"

question: What are the ids, flavors, and food types of goods, ordered by price?
original_query: SELECT id ,  flavor ,  food FROM goods ORDER BY price

question: How many cusomters visited on each date?
original_query: SELECT date ,  COUNT (DISTINCT CustomerId) FROM receipts GROUP BY date

question: What are the customer ids of customers who have at least 15 receipts?
original_query: SELECT CustomerId FROM receipts GROUP BY CustomerId HAVING count(*)  >=  15

question: Count the number of goods for each food type.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  food FROM goods GROUP BY food

question: Find the receipt numbers where both Cake and Cookie were bought.
original_query: SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.food  =  "Cake" INTERSECT SELECT T1.receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.food  =  "Cookie"

question: What is the receipt number and date of the receipt in which the most expensive item was bought?
original_query: SELECT T1.ReceiptNumber ,  T1.Date FROM receipts AS T1 JOIN items AS T2 ON T1.ReceiptNumber  =  T2.receipt JOIN goods AS T3 ON T2.item  =  T3.id ORDER BY T3.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the receipt numbers that have a good with a price above 10 or have the earliest date?
original_query: SELECT T1.Receipt FROM items AS T1 JOIN goods AS T2 ON T1.item  =  T2.id WHERE T2.price  >  10 UNION SELECT ReceiptNumber FROM receipts WHERE date  =  (SELECT date FROM receipts ORDER BY date LIMIT 1)

question: What are all the distinct items bought by customer 15?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.item FROM items AS T1 JOIN receipts AS T2 ON T1.receipt  =  T2.ReceiptNumber WHERE T2.CustomerId  =  15

question: Give the ids for goods that have Apricot flavor and have a price lower than 5 dollars.
original_query: SELECT id FROM goods WHERE flavor  =  "Apricot" AND price  <  5

question: How many players did Boston Red Stockings have in 2000?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year  =  2000

question: What are first and last names of players participating in all star game in 1998?
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id WHERE YEAR  =  1998

question: How many games were played in park "Columbia Park" in 1907?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 1907 AND T2.park_name = 'Columbia Park';

question: Which player has the most all star game experiences? Give me the first name, last name and id of the player, as well as the number of times the player participated in all star game.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last ,  T1.player_id ,   count(*) FROM player AS T1 JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which states have more than 2 parks?
original_query: SELECT state FROM park GROUP BY state HAVING count(*)  >  2;

question: Count the number of players who enter hall of fame for each year.
original_query: SELECT yearid ,  count(*) FROM hall_of_fame GROUP BY yearid;

question: Compute the total salary that the player with first name Len and last name Barker received between 1985 to 1990.
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.name_first  =  'Len' AND T2.name_last = 'Barker' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1985 AND 1990;

question: Which manager won the most manager award? Give me the manager's first name, last name and id.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T2.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN manager_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T2.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many parks are there in the state of NY?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM park WHERE state  =  'NY';

question: How many team franchises are active, with active value 'Y'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM team_franchise WHERE active = 'Y';

question: How much did the the player with first name Len and last name Barker earn between 1985 to 1990 in total?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.name_first  =  'Len' AND T2.name_last = 'Barker' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1985 AND 1990;

question: What is the total salary paid by team Boston Red Stockings in 2010?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year  =  2010

question: What are the three countries that the least players are from?
original_query: SELECT birth_country FROM player GROUP BY birth_country ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 3;

question: What is the average height of the players from the college named 'Yale University'?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.height) FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_college AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id JOIN college AS T3 ON T3.college_id  =  T2.college_id WHERE T3.name_full  =  'Yale University';

question: Find the number of tied games (the value of "ties" is '1') in 1885 postseason.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason WHERE YEAR  =  1885 AND ties  =  1;

question: What are the first name and last name of the players who have weight above 220 or height below 75?
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player WHERE weight  >  220 OR height  <  75

question: List the first and last name for players who participated in all star game in 1998.
original_query: SELECT name_first ,  name_last FROM player AS T1 JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id WHERE YEAR  =  1998

question: List players' first name and last name who received salary from team Washington Nationals in both 2005 and 2007.
original_query: SELECT T2.name_first ,  T2.name_last FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id JOIN team AS T3 ON T3.team_id_br = T1.team_id WHERE T1.year = 2005 AND T3.name = 'Washington Nationals' INTERSECT SELECT T2.name_first , T2.name_last FROM salary AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id JOIN team AS T3 ON T3.team_id_br = T1.team_id WHERE T1.year = 2007 AND T3.name = 'Washington Nationals'

question: What are the manager's first name, last name and id who won the most manager award?
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T2.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN manager_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T2.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List the 3 highest salaries of the players in 2001?
original_query: SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2001 ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Which team had the least number of attendances in home games in 1980?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id_br WHERE T1.year = 1980 ORDER BY T1.attendance ASC LIMIT 1;

question: For each team, return the team name, id and the maximum salary among the team.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.team_id ,  max(T2.salary) FROM team AS T1 JOIN salary AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id GROUP BY T1.team_id;

question: What are the maximum scores the team Boston Red Stockings got when the team won in postseason?
original_query: SELECT max(T1.wins) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_winner  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings';

question: Which cities have 2 to 4 parks?
original_query: SELECT city FROM park GROUP BY city HAVING count(*) BETWEEN 2 AND 4;

question: List the names of states that have more than 2 parks.
original_query: SELECT state FROM park GROUP BY state HAVING count(*)  >  2;

question: What are the name and id of the team offering the lowest average salary?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.team_id FROM team AS T1 JOIN salary AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id GROUP BY T1.team_id ORDER BY avg(T2.salary) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the first name, last name and id of the player with the most all star game experiences? Also list the count.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first , T1.name_last ,  T1.player_id ,   count(*) FROM player AS T1 JOIN all_star AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List three countries which are the origins of the least players.
original_query: SELECT birth_country FROM player GROUP BY birth_country ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 3;

question: In 2014, what are the id and rank of the team that has the largest average number of attendance?
original_query: SELECT T2.team_id ,  T2.rank FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id WHERE T1.year  =  2014 GROUP BY T1.team_id ORDER BY avg(T1.attendance) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which park had most attendances in 2008?
original_query: SELECT T2.park_name FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 2008 ORDER BY T1.attendance DESC LIMIT 1;

question: what is the full name and id of the college with the largest number of baseball players?
original_query: SELECT T1.name_full ,  T1.college_id FROM college AS T1 JOIN player_college AS T2 ON T1.college_id  =  T2.college_id GROUP BY T1.college_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Count the number of games taken place in park "Columbia Park" in 1907.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM home_game AS T1 JOIN park AS T2 ON T1.park_id  =  T2.park_id WHERE T1.year = 1907 AND T2.park_name = 'Columbia Park';

question: What were all the salary values of players in 2010 and 2001?
original_query: SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2010 UNION SELECT salary FROM salary WHERE YEAR  =  2001

question: Which team offers the lowest average salary? Give me the name and id of the team.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.team_id FROM team AS T1 JOIN salary AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id GROUP BY T1.team_id ORDER BY avg(T2.salary) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the average height of the players who belong to the college called 'Yale University'.
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.height) FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_college AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id JOIN college AS T3 ON T3.college_id  =  T2.college_id WHERE T3.name_full  =  'Yale University';

question: Find all the cities that have 2 to 4 parks.
original_query: SELECT city FROM park GROUP BY city HAVING count(*) BETWEEN 2 AND 4;

question: Find the first name, last name and id for the top three players won the most player awards.
original_query: SELECT T1.name_first ,  T1.name_last ,  T1.player_id FROM player AS T1 JOIN player_award AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.player_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3;

question: How many parks are there in Atlanta city?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM park WHERE city = 'Atlanta';

question: What is average salary of the players in the team named 'Boston Red Stockings' ?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.salary) FROM salary AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  = 'Boston Red Stockings'

question: Find the number of team franchises that are active (have 'Y' as "active" information).
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM team_franchise WHERE active = 'Y';

question: Count the number of times the team "Boston Red Stockings" lost in 2009 postseason.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM postseason AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.team_id_loser  =  T2.team_id_br WHERE T2.name  =  'Boston Red Stockings' AND T1.year = 2009;

question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10

question: What is maximum and minimum death toll caused each time?
original_query: SELECT max(killed) ,  min(killed) FROM death

question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );

question: How many ships ended up being 'Captured'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ship WHERE disposition_of_ship  =  'Captured'

question: What is the average number of injuries caused each time?
original_query: SELECT avg(injured) FROM death

question: What is the ship id and name that caused most total injuries?
original_query: SELECT T2.id ,  T2.name FROM death AS T1 JOIN ship AS t2 ON T1.caused_by_ship_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T2.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the name and results of the battles when the bulgarian commander is not 'Boril'
original_query: SELECT name ,  RESULT FROM battle WHERE bulgarian_commander != 'Boril'

question: What are the notes of the death events which has substring 'East'?
original_query: SELECT note FROM death WHERE note LIKE '%East%'

question: Find the number of programs for each channel. Return the name of each channel as well.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  count(*) FROM channel AS t1 JOIN program AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id GROUP BY t1.channel_id

question: What is the name of the director who is in the "Dracula" program?
original_query: SELECT t2.name FROM program AS t1 JOIN director AS t2 ON t1.director_id  =  t2.director_id WHERE t1.title  =  'Dracula'

question: give me the name of channels that have both a director younger than 40 and a director older than 60.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN director_admin AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id JOIN director AS t3 ON t2.director_id  =  t3.director_id WHERE t3.age  <  40 INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN director_admin AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id JOIN director AS t3 ON t2.director_id  =  t3.director_id WHERE t3.age  >  60

question: How many channels have the word 'bbc' in their internet link?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM channel WHERE internet LIKE "%bbc%"

question: Which director is in charge of the most programs?
original_query: SELECT t2.name FROM program AS t1 JOIN director AS t2 ON t1.director_id  =  t2.director_id GROUP BY t1.director_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different digital terrestrial channels are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Digital_terrestrial_channel) FROM channel

question: Find the the name of the oldest director.
original_query: SELECT name FROM director ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the title of the program that began most recently.
original_query: SELECT title FROM program ORDER BY start_year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the cell phone number of the student whose address has the lowest monthly rental?
original_query: SELECT T2.cell_mobile_number FROM Student_Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id ORDER BY T1.monthly_rental ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the dates of assessment notes for students with first name "Fanny".
original_query: SELECT T1.date_of_notes FROM Assessment_Notes AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  "Fanny"

question: Find the texts of assessment notes for teachers with last name "Schuster".
original_query: SELECT T1.text_of_notes FROM Assessment_Notes AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.last_name  =  "Schuster"

question: Find the first names and last names of teachers in alphabetical order of last name.
original_query: SELECT first_name ,  last_name FROM Teachers ORDER BY last_name

question: How many distinct incident type codes are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT incident_type_code) FROM Behavior_Incident

question: Find the maximum and minimum monthly rental for all student addresses.
original_query: SELECT max(monthly_rental) ,  min(monthly_rental) FROM Student_Addresses

question: What are the email addresses of teachers whose address has zip code "918"?
original_query: SELECT T2.email_address FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T1.zip_postcode  =  "918"

question: What is the incident type description for the incident type with code "VIOLENCE"?
original_query: SELECT incident_type_description FROM Ref_Incident_Type WHERE incident_type_code  =  "VIOLENCE"

question: Find the first names of teachers whose email address contains the word "man".
original_query: SELECT first_name FROM Teachers WHERE email_address LIKE '%man%'

question: What are the code and description of the most frequent behavior incident type?
original_query: SELECT T1.incident_type_code ,  T2.incident_type_description FROM Behavior_Incident AS T1 JOIN Ref_Incident_Type AS T2 ON T1.incident_type_code  =  T2.incident_type_code GROUP BY T1.incident_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the cell phone number and email address for all students.
original_query: SELECT cell_mobile_number ,  email_address FROM STUDENTS

question: List all cities of addresses in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT city FROM Addresses ORDER BY city

question: What are the line 1 of addresses shared by some students and some teachers?
original_query: SELECT T1.line_1 FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id INTERSECT SELECT T1.line_1 FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Teachers AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id

question: What are the code and description of the least frequent detention type ?
original_query: SELECT T1.detention_type_code ,  T2.detention_type_description FROM Detention AS T1 JOIN Ref_Detention_Type AS T2 ON T1.detention_type_code  =  T2.detention_type_code GROUP BY T1.detention_type_code ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the id and first name of the student whose addresses have the highest average monthly rental?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T2.first_name FROM Student_Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY AVG(monthly_rental) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all information about the assessment notes sorted by date in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT * FROM Assessment_Notes ORDER BY date_of_notes ASC

question: What is the gender of the teacher with last name "Medhurst"?
original_query: SELECT gender FROM TEACHERS WHERE last_name  =  "Medhurst"

question: Find the id and first name of the student that has the most number of assessment notes?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T2.first_name FROM Assessment_Notes AS T1 JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many students are not involved in any behavior incident?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM STUDENTS WHERE student_id NOT IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Behavior_Incident )

question: What are the start and end dates for incidents with incident type code "NOISE"?
original_query: SELECT date_incident_start ,  date_incident_end FROM Behavior_Incident WHERE incident_type_code  =  "NOISE"

question: What is the station station and end station for the trips with the three smallest ids?
original_query: SELECT start_station_name ,  end_station_name FROM trip ORDER BY id LIMIT 3

question: For each zip code, find the ids of all trips that have a higher average mean temperature above 60?
original_query: SELECT T1.id FROM trip AS T1 JOIN weather AS T2 ON T1.zip_code  =  T2.zip_code GROUP BY T2.zip_code HAVING avg(T2.mean_temperature_f)  >  60

question: What is the latitude, longitude, city of the station from which the shortest trip started?
original_query: SELECT T1.lat ,  T1.long ,  T1.city FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id ORDER BY T2.duration LIMIT 1

question: For each trip, return its ending station's installation date.
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T2.installation_date FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.end_station_id  =  T2.id

question: What are the names of stations that are located in Palo Alto city but have never been the ending point of trips more than 100 times?
original_query: SELECT name FROM station WHERE city  =  "Palo Alto" EXCEPT SELECT end_station_name FROM trip GROUP BY end_station_name HAVING count(*)  >  100

question: What are the names of stations that have latitude lower than 37.5?
original_query: SELECT name FROM station WHERE lat  <  37.5

question: How many different cities have these stations?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT city) FROM station

question: What is the average latitude and longitude of the starting points of all trips?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.lat) ,  avg(T1.long) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id

question: What are the names and ids of stations that had more than 14 bikes available on average or were installed in December?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.id FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id GROUP BY T2.station_id HAVING avg(T2.bikes_available)  >  14 UNION SELECT name ,  id FROM station WHERE installation_date LIKE "12/%"

question: What is the zip code that has the lowest average mean sea level pressure?
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY avg(mean_sea_level_pressure_inches) LIMIT 1

question: What is the mean longitude for all stations that have never had more than 10 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT avg(long) FROM station WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING max(bikes_available)  >  10)

question: List all the cities in a decreasing order of each city's stations' highest latitude.
original_query: SELECT city FROM station GROUP BY city ORDER BY max(lat) DESC

question: What are the ids of all stations that have a latitude above 37.4 and have never had less than 7 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT id FROM station WHERE lat  >  37.4 EXCEPT SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING min(bikes_available)  <  7

question: What is the average latitude and longitude of all starting stations for the trips?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.lat) ,  avg(T1.long) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id

question: What is the number of distinct cities the stations are located at?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT city) FROM station

question: Give me the dates when the max temperature was higher than 85.
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE max_temperature_f  >  85

question: For each zip code, what is the average mean temperature for all dates that start with '8'?
original_query: SELECT zip_code  ,  avg(mean_temperature_f) FROM weather WHERE date LIKE "8/%" GROUP BY zip_code

question: What are all the different zip codes that have a maximum dew point that was always below 70?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT zip_code FROM weather EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT zip_code FROM weather WHERE max_dew_point_f  >=  70

question: What is the average longitude of stations that never had bike availability more than 10?
original_query: SELECT avg(long) FROM station WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING max(bikes_available)  >  10)

question: What are the ids of the trips that lasted the longest and how long did they last?
original_query: SELECT id ,  duration FROM trip ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average latitude and longitude of stations located in San Jose city?
original_query: SELECT avg(lat) ,  avg(long) FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Jose"

question: What are names of stations that have average bike availability above 10 and are not located in San Jose city?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id GROUP BY T2.station_id HAVING avg(bikes_available)  >  10 EXCEPT SELECT name FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Jose"

question: What is the zip code in which the average mean sea level pressure is the lowest?
original_query: SELECT zip_code FROM weather GROUP BY zip_code ORDER BY avg(mean_sea_level_pressure_inches) LIMIT 1

question: What is the average latitude and longitude in San Jose?
original_query: SELECT avg(lat) ,  avg(long) FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Jose"

question: Which trip started from the station with the largest dock count? Give me the trip id.
original_query: SELECT T1.id FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.start_station_id  =  T2.id ORDER BY T2.dock_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total and maximum duration of trips with bike id 636?
original_query: SELECT sum(duration) ,  max(duration) FROM trip WHERE bike_id  =  636

question: List the name and the number of stations for all the cities that have at least 15 stations.
original_query: SELECT city ,  COUNT(*) FROM station GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  15

question: For each zip code, how many times has the maximum wind speed reached 25 mph?
original_query: SELECT zip_code , count(*) FROM weather WHERE max_wind_Speed_mph  >=  25 GROUP BY zip_code

question: What are the ids of all trips that had a duration as long as the average trip duration in the zip code 94103?
original_query: SELECT id FROM trip WHERE duration  >=  (SELECT avg(duration) FROM trip WHERE zip_code  =  94103)

question: For each city, list their names in decreasing order by their highest station latitude.
original_query: SELECT city FROM station GROUP BY city ORDER BY max(lat) DESC

question: How many different bike ids are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT bike_id) FROM trip

question: What are the ids and durations of the trips with the top 3 durations?
original_query: SELECT id ,  duration FROM trip ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many trips did not end in San Francisco?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM trip AS T1 JOIN station AS T2 ON T1.end_station_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.city != "San Francisco"

question: From the trip record, find the number of unique bikes.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT bike_id) FROM trip

question: How many stations does Mountain View city has?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM station WHERE city  =  "Mountain View"

question: What are the days that had the smallest temperature range, and what was that range?
original_query: SELECT date ,  max_temperature_f - min_temperature_f FROM weather ORDER BY max_temperature_f - min_temperature_f LIMIT 1

question: How many days had both mean humidity above 50 and mean visibility above 8?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM weather WHERE mean_humidity  >  50 AND mean_visibility_miles  >  8

question: What are the 3 most common cloud covers in the zip code of 94107?
original_query: SELECT cloud_cover FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107 GROUP BY cloud_cover ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many trips started from Mountain View city and ended at Palo Alto city?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 JOIN station AS T3 JOIN trip AS T4 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id AND T2.id  =  T4.id AND T3.id  =  T4.end_station_id WHERE T1.city  =  "Mountain View" AND T3.city  =  "Palo Alto"

question: Return the unique name for stations that have ever had 7 bikes available.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id WHERE T2.bikes_available  =  7

question: What are the different ids and names of the stations that have had more than 12 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM station AS T1 JOIN status AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.station_id WHERE T2.bikes_available  >  12

question: On which day and in which zip code was the min dew point lower than any day in zip code 94107?
original_query: SELECT date ,  zip_code FROM weather WHERE min_dew_point_f  <  (SELECT min(min_dew_point_f) FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107)

question: What is the number of days that had an average humity above 50 and an average visibility above 8?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM weather WHERE mean_humidity  >  50 AND mean_visibility_miles  >  8

question: What are the ids of the stations in San Francisco that normally have more than 10 bikes available?
original_query: SELECT id FROM station WHERE city  =  "San Francisco" INTERSECT SELECT station_id FROM status GROUP BY station_id HAVING avg(bikes_available)  >  10

question: What are the date, mean temperature and mean humidity for the top 3 days with the largest max gust speeds?
original_query: SELECT date ,  mean_temperature_f ,  mean_humidity FROM weather ORDER BY max_gust_speed_mph DESC LIMIT 3

question: When and in what zip code did max temperature reach 80?
original_query: SELECT date ,  zip_code FROM weather WHERE max_temperature_f  >=  80

question: In zip code 94107, on which day neither Fog nor Rain was not observed?
original_query: SELECT date FROM weather WHERE zip_code  =  94107 AND EVENTS != "Fog" AND EVENTS != "Rain"

question: For each city, return the highest latitude among its stations.
original_query: SELECT city ,  max(lat) FROM station GROUP BY city

question: For each start station id, what is its name, longitude and average duration of trips started there?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.long ,  avg(T2.duration) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id GROUP BY T2.start_station_id

question: What is the name of every city that has at least 15 stations and how many stations does it have?
original_query: SELECT city ,  COUNT(*) FROM station GROUP BY city HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  15

question: What are the dates that have the 5 highest cloud cover rates and what are the rates?
original_query: SELECT date ,  cloud_cover FROM weather ORDER BY cloud_cover DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the latitude, longitude, and city of the station from which the trip with smallest duration started?
original_query: SELECT T1.lat ,  T1.long ,  T1.city FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.start_station_id ORDER BY T2.duration LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the bikes that have substring 'fiber' in their material?
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM bike WHERE material LIKE "%fiber%"

question: List the heat, name, and nation for all the cyclists.
original_query: SELECT heat ,  name ,  nation FROM cyclist

question: List the name and price of the bike that is owned by both the cyclists named 'Bradley Wiggins' and the cyclist named 'Antonio Tauler'.
original_query: SELECT T3.product_name ,  T3.price FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id JOIN bike AS T3 ON T2.bike_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.name  =  'Bradley Wiggins' INTERSECT SELECT T3.product_name ,  T3.price FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id JOIN bike AS T3 ON T2.bike_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.name  =  'Antonio Tauler'

question: What are the names of distinct racing bikes that are purchased by the cyclists with better results than '4:21.558' ?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.product_name FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id JOIN bike AS T3 ON T2.bike_id  =  T3.id WHERE T1.result  <  '4:21.558'

question: How many cyclists did not purchase any bike after year 2015?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM cyclist WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT cyclist_id FROM cyclists_own_bikes WHERE purchase_year  >  2015 )

question: How many bikes are heavier than 780 grams?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM bike WHERE weight  >  780

question: What is the average price of the bikes made of material 'Carbon CC'?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM bike WHERE material  =  'Carbon CC'

question: What are the id and name of the cyclist who owns the most bikes?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM cyclist AS T1 JOIN cyclists_own_bikes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.cyclist_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different levels of heat are there for the cyclists?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT heat) FROM cyclist

question: What is the name, rating, and age for every sailor? And order them by rating and age.
original_query: SELECT name ,  rating ,  age FROM Sailors ORDER BY rating ,  age

question: What are the different boat ids reserved by the sailor whose id is 1?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT bid FROM Reserves WHERE sid = 1

question: Find the number of reservations for each boat with id greater than 50.
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid HAVING bid  >  50

question: Find the names of sailors whose rating is larger than the rating of all sailors who booked a red boat.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT max(T1.rating) FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.color  =  'red')

question: Find the name and age of the oldest sailor.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors WHERE age  =  ( SELECT max(age) FROM Sailors )

question: What are the names and ages of all sailors sorted by decreasing rating?
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors ORDER BY rating DESC

question: Find the name and id of Sailors (sid) that reserved red and blue boat.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  "blue"

question: What is the ids of sailors that haven’t reserved a boat?
original_query: SELECT sid FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT sid FROM Reserves

question: What is the name and age of every sailor who is younger than age 30?
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors WHERE age  <  30

question: How many reservations exist for each boat with an id greater than 50?
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid HAVING bid  >  50

question: What is the name of all sailors whose rating is higher than any sailor named Luis?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT min(rating) FROM Sailors WHERE name  =  'Luis')

question: Find the average rating and largest age for the sailors
original_query: SELECT AVG(rating) ,  MAX(age) FROM Sailors

question: What is the name of sailors whose names contain letter e?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE name LIKE '%e%'

question: What is the name of every sailor whose name contains the letter e?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE name LIKE '%e%'

question: how many sailors in total?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Sailors

question: What is id about sailors who do not have boat reservations?
original_query: SELECT sid FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: What is the name of all sailors whose rating is higher than all sailors named Luis?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT max(rating) FROM Sailors WHERE name  =  'Luis')

question: what is the name and id of sailors who do not have a reservation of a boat?
original_query: SELECT sid ,  name FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT T1.sid ,  T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: Who reserved boat 102?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE T2.bid  =  102

question: Find the name of the sailors who reserved boat with id 103.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE  T2.bid  =  103

question: Return name and age for sailors who are younger than 30.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM Sailors WHERE age  <  30

question: What are the rating and average age for sailors who reserved red boats for each rating?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating ,  avg(T1.age) FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.color  =  'red' GROUP BY T1.rating

question: What are the names of all sailors with a higher rating than every sailor named Luis?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  (SELECT max(rating) FROM Sailors WHERE name  =  'Luis')

question: What can you tell me about sailors who are older than age 30?
original_query: SELECT * FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  30

question: What are the sids for sailors who reserved red or blue boats?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' OR T1.color  =  "blue"

question: What are the names and ids of sailors who reserved red or blue boats?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.sid ,  T3.name FROM Boats AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON  T1.bid  =  T2.bid JOIN Sailors AS T3 ON T2.sid  =  T3.sid WHERE T1.color  =  'red' OR T1.color  =  "blue"

question: Return the unique boat ids (bid) of all reserved boats.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT bid FROM Reserves

question: Find the number of reservations for each boat with more than 1 reservation.
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the ids of sailors who have not reserved a boat?
original_query: SELECT sid FROM Sailors EXCEPT SELECT sid FROM Reserves

question: How many reservations exist for each boat?
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid

question: What is highest rating between sailors?
original_query: SELECT max(rating) FROM Sailors

question: Find the name and id of the sailors who reserved at least one boat?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: What are the different names of sailors who are older than some other sailor with a rating larger than 7?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  (SELECT min(age) FROM Sailors WHERE rating  >  7);

question: What is the different id of every sailor who is not the youngest?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT sid FROM Sailors WHERE age  >  (SELECT min(age) FROM Sailors);

question: What is the rating and average age for sailors who have reserved red boat grouped by rating?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating ,  avg(T1.age) FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid JOIN Boats AS T3 ON T3.bid  =  T2.bid WHERE T3.color  =  'red' GROUP BY T1.rating

question: What is the name and id of every sailor who reserved one or more boats?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid

question: How many reservations exist for each boat that has more than 1 reservation already?
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves GROUP BY bid HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names and ids of all sailors who have a rating of at least 3 and reserved a boat?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.sid FROM Sailors AS T1 JOIN Reserves AS T2 ON T1.sid  =  T2.sid WHERE  T1.rating  >  2

question: How many reservations for each boat did the sailors with an id greater than 1 make?
original_query: SELECT bid ,  count(*) FROM Reserves WHERE sid  >  1 GROUP BY bid

question: What are the names of body builders?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID

question: How many persons are not body builders?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM people WHERE people_id NOT IN (SELECT People_ID FROM body_builder)

question: What is the most common birth place of people?
original_query: SELECT Birth_Place FROM people GROUP BY Birth_Place ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the total scores of body builders in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT Total FROM body_builder ORDER BY Total ASC

question: List each birth place along with the number of people from there.
original_query: SELECT Birth_Place ,  COUNT(*) FROM people GROUP BY Birth_Place

question: How many distinct birth places are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Birth_Place) FROM people

question: What are the heights of body builders with total score smaller than 315?
original_query: SELECT T2.Height FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Total  <  315

question: How many body builders are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM body_builder

question: List the weight of the body builders who have snatch score higher than 140 or have the height greater than 200.
original_query: SELECT T2.weight FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.people_id  =  T2.people_id WHERE T1.snatch  >  140 OR T2.height  >  200;

question: List the height and weight of people in descending order of height.
original_query: SELECT Height ,  Weight FROM people ORDER BY Height DESC

question: What are the birth places that are shared by at least two people?
original_query: SELECT Birth_Place FROM people GROUP BY Birth_Place HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names of body builders in descending order of total scores?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM body_builder AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Total DESC

question: Return the sale prices of books authored by Plato.
original_query: SELECT saleprice FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "Plato"

question: What is the title of the book that has been ordered the greatest number of times?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Books_Order AS T1 JOIN Book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn GROUP BY T1.isbn ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the names of clients who have ordered at least once.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM Client AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient

question: Give the name of the author who wrote the book titled Pride and Prejudice.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T1.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice"

question: What are the names of clients who have ordered Pride and Prejudice?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient JOIN Book AS T4 ON T4.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T4.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice"

question: What are the names and addressed of all clients, ordered alphabetically by name?
original_query: SELECT name ,  address FROM Client ORDER BY name

question: What is the name of the client who has ordered the greatest total amount of books?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient JOIN Books_Order AS T3 ON T3.idOrder  =  T1.idOrder GROUP BY T1.idClient ORDER BY sum(T3.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all isbns for each book, and how many times has each been ordered?
original_query: SELECT isbn ,  count(*) FROM Books_Order GROUP BY isbn

question: List all the author names.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Author

question: What is the average sale price of books written by George Orwell?
original_query: SELECT avg(saleprice) FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "George Orwell"

question: How many clients are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Client

question: Show all book isbns which were ordered by both client Peter Doe and client James Smith.
original_query: SELECT T2.isbn FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient WHERE T3.name  =  "Peter Doe" INTERSECT SELECT T2.isbn FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient WHERE T3.name  =  "James Smith"

question: Return the number of orders received for Pride and Prejudice.

question: What is the name of the client with the most number of orders?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient GROUP BY T1.idClient ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the different clients who have made an order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM Client AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient

question: What are the titles of books with sale prices above the average sale price across all books?
original_query: SELECT title FROM book WHERE saleprice  >  (SELECT avg(saleprice) FROM book)

question: What are the names of all the authors, and how many books has each written?
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  count(*) FROM Author AS T1 JOIN Author_Book AS T2 ON T1.idAuthor  =  T2.Author GROUP BY T1.idAuthor

question: What are the names and addressed of all clients?
original_query: SELECT name ,  address FROM Client

question: How many authors are there?

question: What are the ids of all orders and the corresponding client names?

question: What are the titles of books that have never been ordered?
original_query: SELECT title FROM book EXCEPT SELECT T1.title FROM book AS T1 JOIN books_order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn

question: Find the title of books which are ordered by client Peter Doe but not client James Smith.
original_query: SELECT T4.title FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient JOIN book AS T4 ON T2.ISBN  =  T4.isbn WHERE T3.name  =  "Peter Doe" EXCEPT SELECT T4.title FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient JOIN book AS T4 ON T2.ISBN  =  T4.isbn WHERE T3.name  =  "James Smith"

question: How many orders do we have for "Pride and Prejudice"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn WHERE T1.title  =  "Pride and Prejudice"

question: Give the average sale price of books authored by George Orwell.
original_query: SELECT avg(saleprice) FROM Book AS T1 JOIN Author_book AS T2 ON T1.isbn  =  T2.isbn JOIN Author AS T3 ON T2.Author  =  T3.idAuthor WHERE T3.name  =  "George Orwell"

question: Show the client names and their total amounts of books ordered.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  sum(T3.amount) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Client AS T2 ON T1.idClient  =  T2.idClient JOIN Books_Order AS T3 ON T3.idOrder  =  T1.idOrder GROUP BY T1.idClient

question: What is the title of the book written by George Orwell that has the lowest sale price?

question: What is the average purchase price and the average sale price?

question: What are the titles of books that the client Peter Doe ordered, but the client James Smith did not?

question: Give the titles of books authored by Plato that have a sale price lower than the average sale price across all books.

question: Count the number of books.

question: What are the isbns of books ordered by both clients named Peter Doe and James Smith?
original_query: SELECT T2.isbn FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient WHERE T3.name  =  "Peter Doe" INTERSECT SELECT T2.isbn FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Books_Order AS T2 ON T1.idOrder  =  T2.idOrder JOIN Client AS T3 ON T1.idClient  =  T3.idClient WHERE T3.name  =  "James Smith"

question: What are the names of all the clients, and the total amount of books ordered by each?

question: List all Book titles, ISBNs, and sale prices.

question: Show the titles of books in descending order of publication price.

question: Find the name and the yearly profit in billion for press that published more than two books.

question: Which authors in the record have not published any books ? Give me their names .

question: Which book series contain both books with sale amount above 1000 and books with sale amount below 500?

question: Which authors have published more than 1 book according to the database? Give me their names.

question: give me names of all compatible browsers and accelerators in the descending order of compatible year

question: How many main stream browsers whose market share is at least 5 exist?

question: List the names of the browser that are compatible with both 'CACHEbox' and 'Fasterfox'.

question: Find the number of web accelerators used for each Operating system.

question: What distinct accelerator names are compatible with the browswers that have market share higher than 15?

question: What are the ids and names of the web accelerators that are compatible with two or more browsers?

question: What is the average miles per gallon(mpg) of the cars with 4 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT avg(mpg) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  4;

question: What are the ids and makers of all car makers that produce at least 2 models and make more than 3 cars?
original_query: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

question: What is the count of the car models produced in the United States?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id JOIN COUNTRIES AS T3 ON T2.Country  =  T3.CountryId WHERE T3.CountryName  =  'usa';

question: What is the maximum accelerate for all the different cylinders?
original_query: SELECT max(Accelerate) ,  Cylinders FROM CARS_DATA GROUP BY Cylinders;

question: What are the countries having at least one car maker? List name and id.
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName ,  T1.CountryId FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >=  1;

question: How much does the car accelerate that makes amc hornet sportabout (sw)?
original_query: SELECT T1.Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

question: What is the accelerate of the car make amc hornet sportabout (sw)?
original_query: SELECT T1.Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

question: What is the horsepower of the car with the greatest accelerate?
original_query: SELECT T1.horsepower FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 ORDER BY T1.accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the number of cars with more than 4 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  4;

question: Which are the car makers which produce at least 2 models and more than 3 car makers ? List the id and the maker .
original_query: select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker group by t1.id having count(*)  >=  2 intersect select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker join car_names as t3 on t2.model  =  t3.model group by t1.id having count(*)  >  3;

question: What are the names and ids of all makers with more than 3 models?
original_query: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

question: How many car makers are there in france?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId WHERE T2.CountryName  =  'france';

question: Which countries in europe have at least 3 car manufacturers?
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent  =  'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*)  >=  3;

question: For a volvo model, how many cylinders does the version with least accelerate have?
original_query: SELECT T1.cylinders FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo' ORDER BY T1.accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average miles per gallon of all the cards with 4 cylinders?

question: What is the number of countries with more than 2 car makers ?

question: What model has the most different versions?

question: What is the number of carsw ith over 6 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  6;

question: Which of the countries has the most car makers? List the country name.
original_query: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the name of each continent and how many car makers are there in each one?

question: Which model has the most version(make) of cars?

question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?

question: What is the model of the car with the smallest amount of horsepower?

question: What are the names of the countries with no car makers?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM countries EXCEPT SELECT T1.CountryName FROM countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.countryId  =  T2.Country;

question: What is the number of cars with a greater accelerate than the one with the most horsepower?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Accelerate  >  ( SELECT Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1 );

question: What is the maximum miles per gallon of the car with 8 cylinders or produced before 1980 ?
original_query: select max(mpg) from cars_data where cylinders  =  8 or year  <  1980

question: Which distinctive models are produced by maker with the full name General Motors or weighing more than 3500?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T2.Maker  =  T3.Id JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T1.MakeId  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.FullName  =  'General Motors' OR T4.weight  >  3500;

question: What is the maximum mpg of the cars that had 8 cylinders or that were produced before 1980 ?
original_query: select max(mpg) from cars_data where cylinders  =  8 or year  <  1980

question: How many cars have more than 4 cylinders?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  4;

question: What are the name of the countries where there is not a single car maker?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM countries EXCEPT SELECT T1.CountryName FROM countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.countryId  =  T2.Country;

question: What are the makers and models?
original_query: SELECT Maker ,  Model FROM MODEL_LIST;

question: How many cars have a larger accelerate than the car with the largest horsepower?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Accelerate  >  ( SELECT Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1 );

question: What is the largest amount of horsepower for the models with 3 cylinders and what make is it?
original_query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the number of car models that are produced by each maker and what is the id and full name of each maker?
original_query: SELECT Count(*) ,  T2.FullName ,  T2.id FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id;

question: Find the name of the makers that produced some cars in the year of 1970?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T3.MakeId  =  T4.id WHERE T4.year  =  '1970';

question: How many countries are listed?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM COUNTRIES;

question: Which model saves the most gasoline? That is to say, have the maximum miles per gallon.
original_query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.mpg DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the ids and names of all countries that either have more than 3 car makers or produce fiat model ?
original_query: select t1.countryid ,  t1.countryname from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  3 union select t1.countryid ,  t1.countryname from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country join model_list as t3 on t2.id  =  t3.maker where t3.model  =  'fiat';

question: What are the names of all European countries with at least 3 manufacturers?
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent  =  'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*)  >=  3;

question: For each continent, list its id, name, and how many countries it has?
original_query: SELECT T1.ContId ,  T1.Continent ,  count(*) FROM CONTINENTS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.ContId  =  T2.Continent GROUP BY T1.ContId;

question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
original_query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the different models wthat are lighter than 3500 but were not built by the Ford Motor Company?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';

question: How many continents are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CONTINENTS;

question: What is the average edispl of the cars of model volvo?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T1.Model  =  'volvo';

question: What is the average weight and year for each year?
original_query: SELECT avg(Weight) ,  YEAR FROM CARS_DATA GROUP BY YEAR;

question: Among the cars that do not have the minimum horsepower , what are the make ids and names of all those with less than 4 cylinders ?
original_query: select t2.makeid ,  t2.make from cars_data as t1 join car_names as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.makeid where t1.horsepower  >  (select min(horsepower) from cars_data) and t1.cylinders  <  4;

question: List all the driver names in descending order of points.
original_query: SELECT Driver FROM driver ORDER BY Points DESC

question: List the make that are associated with most drivers.
original_query: SELECT Make FROM driver GROUP BY Make ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country has both drivers with make "Dodge" and drivers with make "Chevrolet"?
original_query: SELECT t2.country FROM driver AS t1 JOIN country AS t2 ON t1.country  =  t2.country_id WHERE t1.Make  =  "Dodge" INTERSECT SELECT t2.country FROM driver AS t1 JOIN country AS t2 ON t1.country  =  t2.country_id WHERE t1.Make  =  "Chevrolet"

question: List the driver makes that are associated with at least three drivers.
original_query: SELECT Make FROM driver GROUP BY Make HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3

question: What is the list of drivers ordered by points in descending order?
original_query: SELECT Driver FROM driver ORDER BY Points DESC

question: Find the highest and lowest points of drivers.
original_query: SELECT max(Points) ,  min(Points) FROM driver

question: What is the average age of drivers from countries with official native language "English"
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.age) FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Official_native_language  =  "English"

question: Find the average age of drivers for each make.
original_query: SELECT avg(age) ,  Make FROM driver GROUP BY make

question: Please show the names of drivers, and countries they are from.
original_query: SELECT T2.Driver ,  T1.Country FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country

question: Which country is the driver with the highest points from? Give me the capital of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Points DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the team with two or more drivers and return the the manager and car owner of the team.
original_query: SELECT t1.manager ,  t1.car_owner FROM team AS t1 JOIN team_driver AS t2 ON t1.team_id  =  t2.team_id GROUP BY t2.team_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: List all the driver names in ascending order of age.
original_query: SELECT Driver FROM driver ORDER BY Age ASC

question: Compute the average laps of drivers under the age of 20.
original_query: SELECT avg(Laps) FROM driver WHERE age  <  20

question: Find the total number of drivers.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM driver

question: What is the average age of drivers for each make? Return the average age and make.
original_query: SELECT avg(age) ,  Make FROM driver GROUP BY make

question: Which make has more than one team?
original_query: SELECT make FROM team GROUP BY team HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the make of the team whose car owner is "Buddy Arrington".
original_query: SELECT Make FROM team WHERE Car_Owner  =  "Buddy Arrington"

question: Which make is associated with 3 or more drivers?
original_query: SELECT Make FROM driver GROUP BY Make HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3

question: What are the maximum and minimum points of drivers.
original_query: SELECT max(Points) ,  min(Points) FROM driver

question: What are the countries that have drivers with points larger than 150?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country FROM country AS T1 JOIN driver AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.Points  >  150

question: For each make, return the make and the count of drivers with that make.
original_query: SELECT Make ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver GROUP BY Make

question: What are the managers and sponsors of teams? Sort the results by Car Owners.
original_query: SELECT Manager ,  Sponsor FROM team ORDER BY Car_Owner

question: How many drivers receive points greater than 150 for each make? Show the make and the count.
original_query: SELECT make ,  count(*) FROM driver WHERE points  >  150 GROUP BY make

question: Find the number of drivers whose points are greater than 150 for each make.
original_query: SELECT make ,  count(*) FROM driver WHERE points  >  150 GROUP BY make

question: Find the countries in which there are both drivers with make "Dodge" and drivers with make "Chevrolet".
original_query: SELECT t2.country FROM driver AS t1 JOIN country AS t2 ON t1.country  =  t2.country_id WHERE t1.Make  =  "Dodge" INTERSECT SELECT t2.country FROM driver AS t1 JOIN country AS t2 ON t1.country  =  t2.country_id WHERE t1.Make  =  "Chevrolet"

question: What are the distinct entrant types of drivers aged 20 or older?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Entrant FROM driver WHERE Age  >=  20

question: What are the names od drivers who did not have the constructor Bugatti?
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver WHERE CONSTRUCTOR != "Bugatti"

question: List the names of drivers that do not participate in any race.
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver WHERE Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM race)

question: List all names of drivers in descending alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver ORDER BY Driver_Name DESC

question: List the most common type of engine used by drivers.
original_query: SELECT Engine FROM driver GROUP BY Engine ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the names of drivers who were in both "James Hinchcliffe" and "Carl Skerlong" pole positions before.
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "Carl Skerlong" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "James Hinchcliffe"

question: Please show the names of drivers and the names of races they participate in.
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  T2.Race_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID

question: Please show the names and ages of the drivers who participated in at least two races.
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  T1.Age FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names and ages of drivers who raced in two or more races?
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  T1.Age FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What are the names of drivers except for those who had the pole position James Hinchcliffe?
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver EXCEPT SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "James Hinchcliffe"

question: What are the constructors who are used by both drivers who are younger than 20 and drivers older than 30?
original_query: SELECT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver WHERE Age  <  20 INTERSECT SELECT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver WHERE Age  >  30

question: How many drivers use each constructor?
original_query: SELECT CONSTRUCTOR ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver GROUP BY CONSTRUCTOR

question: Show the constructors that are used both by drivers with age lower than 20 and drivers with age over than 30.
original_query: SELECT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver WHERE Age  <  20 INTERSECT SELECT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver WHERE Age  >  30

question: Which teams won more than 1 race?
original_query: SELECT Winning_team FROM race GROUP BY Winning_team HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Please show the age of the driver who participated in the most number of races.
original_query: SELECT T1.Age FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please show the names of drivers and the number of races they participate in.
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID

question: find the name of drivers who were never in "James Hinchcliffe" pole position before.
original_query: SELECT Driver_Name FROM driver EXCEPT SELECT T1.Driver_Name FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID WHERE Pole_Position  =  "James Hinchcliffe"

question: List different constructors and the number of drivers that use each constructor.
original_query: SELECT CONSTRUCTOR ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver GROUP BY CONSTRUCTOR

question: Count the number of different engines used by drivers who had an age either over 30 or under 20.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Engine) FROM driver WHERE Age  >  30 OR Age  <  20

question: How many races did each driver participate in?
original_query: SELECT T1.Driver_Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM driver AS T1 JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.Driver_ID  =  T2.Driver_ID GROUP BY T1.Driver_ID

question: Return the different constructors of drivers, ordered by age ascending.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CONSTRUCTOR FROM driver ORDER BY Age ASC

question: What is the average unit price of tracks that belong to Jazz genre?

question: What are all the album titles, in alphabetical order?

question: Which artist has the most albums?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId GROUP BY T2.Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) FROM EMPLOYEE

question: What are the titles and ids for albums containing tracks with unit price greater than 1?

question: What are the different first names for customers from Brazil who have also had an invoice?

question: Find the title of all the albums of the artist "AC/DC".

question: Count the number of customers that have an email containing "gmail.com".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER WHERE Email LIKE "%gmail.com%"

question: Show the album names, ids and the number of tracks for each album.
original_query: SELECT T1.Title ,  T2.AlbumID ,  COUNT(*) FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.AlbumId  =  T2.AlbumId GROUP BY T2.AlbumID

question: Find the maximum and minimum durations of tracks in milliseconds.
original_query: SELECT max(Milliseconds) ,  min(Milliseconds) FROM TRACK

original_query: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId WHERE T1.Name  =  "Latin" OR T1.Name  =  "Pop"

question: What are the names of different music genres?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM GENRE

question: List the phone numbers of all employees.
original_query: SELECT Phone FROM EMPLOYEE

question: Find the number of albums.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM ALBUM

question: Find all the customer last names that do not have invoice totals larger than 20.

question: What is all the customer information for customers in NY state?
