question: Find the name of the genre that is most frequent across all tracks.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId GROUP BY T2.GenreId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What city does the employee who helps the customer with postal code 70174 live in?
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM CUSTOMER AS T1 JOIN EMPLOYEE AS T2 ON T1.SupportRepId  =  T2.EmployeeId WHERE T1.PostalCode  =  "70174"

original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM GENRE AS T1 JOIN TRACK AS T2 ON T1.GenreId  =  T2.GenreId GROUP BY T2.GenreId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first names and last names of the employees who live in Calgary city.
original_query: SELECT FirstName ,  LastName FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE City  =  "Calgary"

question: Hom many albums does the artist "Metallica" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ALBUM AS T1 JOIN ARTIST AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId  =  T2.ArtistId WHERE T2.Name  =  "Metallica"

original_query: SELECT * FROM CUSTOMER WHERE State  =  "NY"

question: How many films have the word 'Dummy' in their titles?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM film WHERE title LIKE "%Dummy%"

question: How many cinema do we have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM cinema

question: Show each location and the number of cinemas there.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION ,  count(*) FROM cinema GROUP BY LOCATION

question: What are the name and location of the cinema with the largest capacity?
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION FROM cinema ORDER BY capacity DESC LIMIT 1

original_query: SELECT name ,  openning_year ,  capacity FROM cinema

question: Show director with the largest number of show times in total.

question: What are the title and director of each film?

question: Show all the locations with at least two cinemas with capacity above 300.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE capacity  >  300 GROUP BY LOCATION HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Give me the title and highest price for each film.

question: In which locations are there more than one movie theater with capacity above 300?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE capacity  >  300 GROUP BY LOCATION HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Show all the locations where no cinema has capacity over 800.

question: Show all the cinema names and opening years in descending order of opening year.
original_query: SELECT name ,  openning_year FROM cinema ORDER BY openning_year DESC

question: What are the title and maximum price of each film?

question: Show all the locations where some cinemas were opened in both year 2010 and year 2011.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE openning_year  =  2010 INTERSECT SELECT LOCATION FROM cinema WHERE openning_year  =  2011

question: what is the GDP of the city with the largest population.
original_query: SELECT gdp FROM city ORDER BY Regional_Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the match id of the competition called "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"?
original_query: SELECT match_id FROM MATCH WHERE competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"

question: Find the match ids of the cities that hosted competition "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"?
original_query: SELECT match_id FROM MATCH WHERE competition = "1994 FIFA World Cup qualification"

question: Which city has the highest temperature in February?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id ORDER BY T2.Feb DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me a list of cities whose temperature in Mar is lower than that in July and which have also served as host cities?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul INTERSECT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: Which cities have lower temperature in March than in July and have been once host cities?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul INTERSECT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: Find the GDP of the city with the largest regional population.
original_query: SELECT gdp FROM city ORDER BY Regional_Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the GDP and population of the city that already served as a host more than once?
original_query: SELECT t1.gdp ,  t1.Regional_Population FROM city AS T1 JOIN hosting_city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.host_city GROUP BY t2.Host_City HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What is the city with the smallest GDP? Return the city and its GDP.
original_query: SELECT city ,  GDP FROM city ORDER BY GDP LIMIT 1

question: Which cities have lower temperature in March than in Dec and have never served as host cities?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Dec EXCEPT SELECT T3.city FROM city AS T3 JOIN hosting_city AS T4 ON T3.city_id  =  T4.host_city

question: What are the venues of all the matches? Sort them in the descending order of match date.
original_query: SELECT venue FROM MATCH ORDER BY date DESC

question: Which city has the lowest GDP? Please list the city name and its GDP.
original_query: SELECT city ,  GDP FROM city ORDER BY GDP LIMIT 1

question: Find the city that hosted some events in the most recent year. What is the id of this city?
original_query: SELECT host_city FROM hosting_city ORDER BY YEAR DESC LIMIT 1

question: List venues of all matches in the order of their dates starting from the most recent one.
original_query: SELECT venue FROM MATCH ORDER BY date DESC

question: What are the three largest cities in terms of regional population?
original_query: SELECT city FROM city ORDER BY regional_population DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is id of the city that hosted events in the most recent year?
original_query: SELECT host_city FROM hosting_city ORDER BY YEAR DESC LIMIT 1

question: For each competition, count the number of matches.

question: IN which year did city "Taizhou ( Zhejiang )" serve as a host city?

question: What is the temperature of "Shanghai" city in January?

question: Give me a list of cities whose temperature in March is lower than that in July or higher than that in Oct?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM city AS T1 JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id WHERE T2.Mar  <  T2.Jul OR T2.Mar  >  T2.Oct

question: Show the range that has the most number of mountains.
original_query: SELECT Range FROM mountain GROUP BY Range ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the countries that have more than one mountain.
original_query: SELECT Country FROM mountain GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: Show the names of climbers and the heights of mountains they climb.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Height FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID

question: Return the name of the mountain with the greatest height.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of different countries that climbers are from.

question: Give the names of mountains in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Name ASC

question: How many distinct countries are the climbers from?

question: List the names of climbers whose country is not Switzerland.

question: Show names of climbers and the names of mountains they climb.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Name FROM climber AS T1 JOIN mountain AS T2 ON T1.Mountain_ID  =  T2.Mountain_ID

question: List the distinct ranges of the mountains with the top 3 prominence.

question: What are the names of climbers and the corresponding heights of the mountains that they climb?

question: Show the names of mountains with height more than 5000 or prominence more than 1000.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain WHERE Height  >  5000 OR Prominence  >  1000

question: What are the names of mountains in ascending alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Name ASC

question: Which range contains the most mountains?
original_query: SELECT Range FROM mountain GROUP BY Range ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which countries have more than one mountain?
original_query: SELECT Country FROM mountain GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: List the names of mountains that do not have any climber.

question: Return the maximum number of points for climbers from the United Kingdom.

question: Please show the countries and the number of climbers from each country.

question: What are the times used by climbers who climbed mountains in the country of Uganda?

question: Show the name of the leader of the club named "Houston".

question: Give me the names of members whose address is in Harford or Waterbury.

question: What is the membership card held by both members living in Hartford and ones living in Waterbury address?
original_query: SELECT membership_card FROM member WHERE address  =  'Hartford' INTERSECT SELECT membership_card FROM member WHERE address  =  'Waterbury'

question: How many members have the black membership card?

question: Which address do not have any member with the black membership card?

question: which shop has happy hour most frequently? List its id and number of happy hours.
original_query: SELECT shop_id ,  count(*) FROM happy_hour GROUP BY shop_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the shop addresses ordered by their opening year.
original_query: SELECT address FROM shop ORDER BY open_year

question: Which month has the most happy hours?
original_query: SELECT MONTH FROM happy_hour GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the id and address of the shops which have a happy hour in May?
original_query: SELECT t1.address ,  t1.shop_id FROM shop AS t1 JOIN happy_hour AS t2 ON t1.shop_id  =  t2.shop_id WHERE MONTH  =  'May'

question: Which address has both members younger than 30 and members older than 40?
original_query: SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  <  30 INTERSECT SELECT address FROM member WHERE age  >  40

question: What is the number of professors who are in the Accounting or Biology departments?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T2.dept_name  =  'Accounting' OR T2.dept_name  =  'Biology'

question: Find the name and address of the department that has the highest number of students.
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T2.dept_address FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of classes in each school.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T3.school_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code GROUP BY T3.school_code

question: Find the total number of hours have done for all students in each department.
original_query: SELECT sum(stu_hrs) ,  dept_code FROM student GROUP BY dept_code

question: What is the average GPA of students taking ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.stu_gpa) FROM enroll AS T1 JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T1.class_code  =  T3.class_code WHERE T3.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: How many professors who are from either Accounting or Biology department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T2.dept_name  =  'Accounting' OR T2.dept_name  =  'Biology'

question: What is the school code of the accounting department?
original_query: SELECT school_code FROM department WHERE dept_name  =  "Accounting"

question: What is the name of department where has the largest number of professors with a Ph.D. degree?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T1.dept_code FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T1.prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.' GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many professors have a Ph.D. in each department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_code FROM professor WHERE prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.' GROUP BY dept_code

question: Find the first name and office of history professor who did not get a Ph.D. degree.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.prof_office FROM professor AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T1.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' AND T1.prof_high_degree != 'Ph.D.'

question: how many schools exist in total?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT school_code) FROM department

question: How many students are enrolled in the class taught by some professor from the accounting department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN department AS T4 ON T3.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Accounting'

question: Which department offers the most credits all together?
original_query: SELECT T3.dept_name FROM course AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code JOIN department AS T3 ON T1.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY sum(T1.crs_credit) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many unique classes are offered?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT class_code) FROM CLASS

question: How many hours do the students spend studying in each department?
original_query: SELECT sum(stu_hrs) ,  dept_code FROM student GROUP BY dept_code

question: List the first name of all employees with job code PROF ordered by their date of birth.
original_query: SELECT emp_fname FROM employee WHERE emp_jobcode  =  'PROF' ORDER BY emp_dob

question: How many employees are there all together?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM employee

question: Which department has the most professors with a Ph.D.?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T1.dept_code FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T1.prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.' GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the total number of credits offered by each department?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.crs_credit) ,  T1.dept_code FROM course AS T1 JOIN CLASS AS T2 ON T1.crs_code  =  T2.crs_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code

question: Find the first name of student who is taking classes from accounting and Computer Info. Systems departments
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code JOIN course AS T4 ON T3.crs_code  =  T4.crs_code JOIN department AS T5 ON T5.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T5.dept_name  =  'Accounting' INTERSECT SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code JOIN course AS T4 ON T3.crs_code  =  T4.crs_code JOIN department AS T5 ON T5.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T5.dept_name  =  'Computer Info. Systems'

question: What is the first name, GPA, and phone number of the students with the top 5 GPAs?

question: Find names of all students who took some course and the course description.

question: Find the first name of the professor who is teaching two courses with code CIS-220 and QM-261.

question: What are the description and credit of the course which the student whose last name is Smithson took?

question: What are the first and last name of all biology professors?

question: What are the first names of all professors not teaching any classes?

original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_code FROM professor WHERE prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.' GROUP BY dept_code

question: Find the first names and degree of all professors who are teaching some class in Computer Info. Systems department.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.emp_fname ,  T3.prof_high_degree FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN professor AS T3 ON T2.emp_num  =  T3.emp_num JOIN department AS T4 ON T4.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Computer Info. Systems'

question: What are the first names of all students taking accoutning and Computer Information Systems classes?
original_query: SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code JOIN course AS T4 ON T3.crs_code  =  T4.crs_code JOIN department AS T5 ON T5.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T5.dept_name  =  'Accounting' INTERSECT SELECT T1.stu_fname FROM student AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T2.class_code  =  T3.class_code JOIN course AS T4 ON T3.crs_code  =  T4.crs_code JOIN department AS T5 ON T5.dept_code  =  T4.dept_code WHERE T5.dept_name  =  'Computer Info. Systems'

question: Find the number of departments in each school.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code

question: Find the first names of all instructors who have taught some course and the course code.

question: What are the total number of students enrolled in ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: Find the first names of all professors in the Accounting department who is teaching some course and the class room.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.class_room FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN professor AS T3 ON T2.emp_num  =  T3.emp_num JOIN department AS T4 ON T4.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Accounting'

question: What is the first name of students enrolled in class ACCT-211 and got grade C?
original_query: SELECT T3.stu_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.stu_num  =  T3.stu_num WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211' AND T2.enroll_grade  =  'C'

question: What is the name and address of the department with the most students?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T2.dept_address FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the first and last name of the professor in biology department?
original_query: SELECT T3.EMP_FNAME ,  T3.EMP_LNAME FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code JOIN employee AS T3 ON T1.EMP_NUM  =  T3.EMP_NUM WHERE DEPT_NAME  =  "Biology"

question: Find the first name and office of the professor who is in the history department and has a Ph.D. degree.
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_fname ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T3.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' AND T2.prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.'

question: List the codes of all courses that take place in room KLR209.
original_query: SELECT class_code FROM CLASS WHERE class_room  =  'KLR209'

question: What is the last name of the professor whose office is located in DRE 102, and when were they hired?

question: What is the name, address, and number of students in the departments that have the 3 most students?
original_query: SELECT T2.dept_name ,  T2.dept_address ,  count(*) FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.dept_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many professors do have a Ph.D. degree?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor WHERE prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.'

question: What are the first names, office locations, and departments of all instructors, and also what are the descriptions of the courses they teach?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T4.prof_office ,  T3.crs_description ,  T5.dept_name FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.crs_code  =  T3.crs_code JOIN professor AS T4 ON T2.emp_num  =  T4.emp_num JOIN department AS T5 ON T4.dept_code  =  T5.dept_code

question: What is the total credit does each department offer?
original_query: SELECT sum(crs_credit) ,  dept_code FROM course GROUP BY dept_code

question: How many professors are teaching class with code ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT PROF_NUM) FROM CLASS WHERE CRS_CODE  =  "ACCT-211"

question: What is the course description and number of credits for QM-261?
original_query: SELECT crs_credit ,  crs_description FROM course WHERE crs_code  =  'QM-261'

question: What is the first name of each student enrolled in class ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT T3.stu_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.stu_num  =  T3.stu_num WHERE T1.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: What is the first and last name of the oldest employee?
original_query: SELECT emp_fname ,  emp_lname FROM employee ORDER BY emp_dob LIMIT 1

question: Find the first names of professors who are teaching more than one class.
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num GROUP BY T1.prof_num HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: How many courses does the department of Computer Information Systmes offer?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM department AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE dept_name  =  "Computer Info. Systems"

question: What is department name and office for the professor whose last name is Heffington?
original_query: SELECT T3.dept_name  ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T1.emp_lname  =  'Heffington'

question: Find the number of professors in accounting department.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE DEPT_NAME  =  "Accounting"

question: Find the last name and hire date of the professor who is in office DRE 102.
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_lname ,  T1.emp_hiredate FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num WHERE T2.prof_office  =  'DRE 102'

question: How many different departments are there in each school that has less than 5 apartments?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code HAVING count(DISTINCT dept_name)  <  5

question: How many credits is the course that the student with the last name Smithson took, and what is its description?
original_query: SELECT T4.crs_description ,  T4.crs_credit FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T3.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN course AS T4 ON T4.crs_code  =  T1.crs_code WHERE T3.stu_lname  =  'Smithson'

question: Which school has the smallest amount of professors?
original_query: SELECT T1.school_code FROM department AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.school_code ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: What is the code of the course which the student whose last name is Smithson took?
original_query: SELECT T1.crs_code FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN enroll AS T2 ON T1.class_code  =  T2.class_code JOIN student AS T3 ON T3.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num WHERE T3.stu_lname  =  'Smithson'

question: What are the first names and office locations for all professors sorted alphabetically by first name?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.prof_office FROM professor AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num ORDER BY T2.emp_fname

question: What are the last name and office of all history professors?
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_lname ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History'

question: What are the first names and office of the professors who are in the history department and have a Ph.D?
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_fname ,  T2.prof_office FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T3.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' AND T2.prof_high_degree  =  'Ph.D.'

question: Find the number of different departments in each school whose number of different departments is less than 5.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code HAVING count(DISTINCT dept_name)  <  5

question: What is the average gpa of the students enrolled in the course with code ACCT-211?
original_query: SELECT avg(T2.stu_gpa) FROM enroll AS T1 JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.stu_num  =  T2.stu_num JOIN CLASS AS T3 ON T1.class_code  =  T3.class_code WHERE T3.crs_code  =  'ACCT-211'

question: How many sections does each course have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  crs_code FROM CLASS GROUP BY crs_code

question: How many departments are in each school?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) ,  school_code FROM department GROUP BY school_code

question: What is the first, last name, gpa of the youngest one among students whose GPA is above 3?
original_query: SELECT stu_fname ,  stu_lname ,  stu_gpa FROM student WHERE stu_gpa  >  3 ORDER BY stu_dob DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first names of all history professors who do not teach?
original_query: SELECT T1.emp_fname FROM employee AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' EXCEPT SELECT T4.emp_fname FROM employee AS T4 JOIN CLASS AS T5 ON T4.emp_num  =  T5.prof_num

question: What are the first names and offices of history professors who don't have Ph.D.s?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.prof_office FROM professor AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.emp_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN department AS T3 ON T1.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'History' AND T1.prof_high_degree != 'Ph.D.'

question: How many professors are in the accounting dept?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM professor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code WHERE DEPT_NAME  =  "Accounting"

question: How many different professors are there for the different schools?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.school_code FROM department AS T1 JOIN professor AS T2 ON T1.dept_code  =  T2.dept_code GROUP BY T1.school_code

question: What are the first names of all Accounting professors who teach and what are the classrooms of the courses they teach?
original_query: SELECT T2.emp_fname ,  T1.class_room FROM CLASS AS T1 JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.prof_num  =  T2.emp_num JOIN professor AS T3 ON T2.emp_num  =  T3.emp_num JOIN department AS T4 ON T4.dept_code  =  T3.dept_code WHERE T4.dept_name  =  'Accounting'

question: Where is the history department?
original_query: SELECT dept_address FROM department WHERE dept_name  =  'History'

question: What is the title and credits of the course that is taught in the largest classroom (with the highest capacity)?
original_query: SELECT T3.title ,  T3.credits FROM classroom AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.building  =  T2.building AND T1.room_number  =  T2.room_number JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id  =  T3.course_id WHERE T1.capacity  =  (SELECT max(capacity) FROM classroom)

question: What are the names of Art instructors who have taught a course, and the corresponding course id?
original_query: SELECT name ,  course_id FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.ID  =  T2.ID WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Art'

question: How many rooms whose capacity is less than 50 does the Lamberton building have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM classroom WHERE building  =  'Lamberton' AND capacity  <  50

question: What is the name of the department with the most credits?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY sum(credits) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of departments which offer courses.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT dept_name) FROM course

question: Find the name of instructors who are advising more than one student.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN advisor AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.i_id GROUP BY T2.i_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Give all information regarding instructors, in order of salary from least to greatest.
original_query: SELECT * FROM instructor ORDER BY salary

question: How many instructors are in the department with the highest budget, and what is their average salary?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.salary) ,  count(*) FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_name  =  T2.dept_name ORDER BY T2.budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the title of course whose prerequisite is course Differential Geometry.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.course_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.prereq_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'Differential Geometry')

question: Find the name and budget of departments whose budgets are more than the average budget.
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  budget FROM department WHERE budget  >  (SELECT avg(budget) FROM department)

question: Give the name of the student in the History department with the most credits.
original_query: SELECT name FROM student WHERE dept_name  =  'History' ORDER BY tot_cred DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the prerequisite class of International Finance course?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id IN (SELECT T1.prereq_id FROM prereq AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T2.title  =  'International Finance')

question: Find the id of the courses that do not have any prerequisite?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM course EXCEPT SELECT course_id FROM prereq

question: Find the name and salary of instructors whose salary is below the average salary of the instructors in the Physics department.
original_query: SELECT name ,  salary FROM instructor WHERE salary  <  (SELECT avg(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Physics')

question: What are the names and buildings of the deparments, sorted by budget descending?
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  building FROM department ORDER BY budget DESC

question: What is the department name and corresponding building for the department with the greatest budget?

question: Find courses that ran in Fall 2009 but not in Spring 2010.
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 EXCEPT SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Give the name of the department with the lowest budget.
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM department ORDER BY budget LIMIT 1

question: List the names and buildings of all departments sorted by the budget from large to small.
original_query: SELECT dept_name ,  building FROM department ORDER BY budget DESC

question: Find the maximum and average capacity among rooms in each building.

question: List the distinct names of the instructors, ordered by name.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM  instructor ORDER BY name

question: What is the name of the deparment with the highest enrollment?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM student GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many students are in each department?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  dept_name FROM student GROUP BY dept_name

question: Find the total credits of courses provided by different department.
original_query: SELECT sum(credits) ,  dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name

question: Find the title of the course that is offered by more than one department.

question: Count the number of distinct instructors who have taught a course.

question: What is the id of the instructor who advises of all students from History department?

question: List the names of all courses ordered by their titles and credits.
original_query: SELECT title FROM course ORDER BY title ,  credits

question: What are the names of all instructors in the Comp. Sci. department?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Comp. Sci.'

question: How many classrooms are not in Lamberton?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM classroom WHERE building != 'Lamberton'

question: Find the names of all instructors in the Art department who have taught some course and the course_id.
original_query: SELECT name ,  course_id FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.ID  =  T2.ID WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Art'

question: What are the names and salaries for instructors who earn less than the average salary of instructors in the Physics department?
original_query: SELECT name ,  salary FROM instructor WHERE salary  <  (SELECT avg(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Physics')

question: Find the year and semester when offers the largest number of courses.

original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM classroom WHERE building != 'Lamberton'

original_query: SELECT YEAR FROM SECTION GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many students and instructors are in each department?

question: How many total credits are offered by each department?

question: What are the distinct buildings with capacities of greater than 50?

question: Find the semester and year which has the least number of student taking any class.
original_query: SELECT semester ,  YEAR FROM takes GROUP BY semester ,  YEAR ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

question: Find courses that ran in Fall 2009 or in Spring 2010.

question: Find the name of students who took any class in the years of 2009 and 2010.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.id WHERE YEAR  =  2009 OR YEAR  =  2010

question: What are the ids of courses offered in Fall of 2009 but not in Spring of 2010?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 EXCEPT SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: Find the room number of the rooms which can sit 50 to 100 students and their buildings.

question: Find the names of all instructors in Comp. Sci. department with salary > 80000.
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Comp. Sci.'  AND salary  >  80000

question: Find the name of instructors who are advisors of the students from the Math department, and sort the results by students' total credit.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM advisor AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.i_id  =  T2.id JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.s_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.dept_name  =  'Math' ORDER BY T3.tot_cred

question: Find the title of courses that have two prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN prereq AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id GROUP BY T2.course_id HAVING count(*)  =  2

question: What are the titles of courses that are offered in more than one department?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course GROUP BY title HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the name of department has the highest amount of students?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM student GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of instructor who is the advisor of the student who has the highest number of total credits.

question: Find the buildings which have rooms with capacity more than 50.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT building FROM classroom WHERE capacity  >  50

question: What are the building, room number, semester and year of courses in the Psychology department, sorted using course title?
original_query: SELECT T2.building ,  T2.room_number ,  T2.semester ,  T2.year FROM course AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE T1.dept_name  =  'Psychology' ORDER BY T1.title

question: What are the names of instructors who advise more than one student?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN advisor AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.i_id GROUP BY T2.i_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the distinct salaries of all instructors who earned less than the maximum salary?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT salary FROM instructor WHERE salary  <  (SELECT max(salary) FROM instructor)

question: What are the ids of instructors who didnt' teach?

question: What are the names of instructors who didn't teach courses in the Spring?

question: What is the name of the department with an instructure who has a name like 'Soisalon'?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM instructor WHERE name LIKE '%Soisalon%'

question: What are the names and salaries of instructors who advise students in the Math department?

question: Find the name of the instructors who taught C Programming course before.

question: Find the title, credit, and department name of courses that have more than one prerequisites?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.credits , T1.dept_name FROM course AS T1 JOIN prereq AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id GROUP BY T2.course_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of all instructors who have taught a course, as well as the corresponding course id?
original_query: SELECT name ,  course_id FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.ID  =  T2.ID

question: What are the names of all instructors with a higher salary than any of the instructors in the Biology department?
original_query: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary  >  (SELECT max(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name  =  'Biology')

question: How many different courses offered by Physics department?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT course_id) FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Physics'

question: Find the department name of the instructor whose name contains 'Soisalon'.
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM instructor WHERE name LIKE '%Soisalon%'

question: What are the names of instructors who have taught C Programming courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.id JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id  =  T3.course_id WHERE T3.title  =  'C Programming'

question: What are the titles of courses that are in the Statistics department but not the Psychology department?
original_query: SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Statistics' EXCEPT SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name  =  'Psychology'

question: Show all titles and their instructors' names for courses in 2008, in alphabetical order by title.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T3.name FROM course AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.id WHERE YEAR  =  2008 ORDER BY T1.title

question: What are the names of students who have more than one advisor?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN advisor AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.s_id GROUP BY T2.s_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What is the title of the course that was offered at building Chandler during the fall semester in the year of 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN SECTION AS T2 ON T1.course_id  =  T2.course_id WHERE building  =  'Chandler' AND semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: What are the names of the 3 departments with the most courses?
original_query: SELECT dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names of all instructors who advise students in the math depart sorted by total credits of the student.

question: What are the ids for courses that were offered in both Fall of 2009 and Spring of 2010?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Fall' AND YEAR  =  2009 INTERSECT SELECT course_id FROM SECTION WHERE semester  =  'Spring' AND YEAR  =  2010

question: What are the names of the students who took classes in 2009 or 2010?

question: What is the title of the course that is a prerequisite for Mobile Computing?

question: Find the name of students who didn't take any course from Biology department.

question: Find the student first and last names and grade points of all enrollments.

question: What are the names of all the conferences that has staff from Canada attending?

question: For each document object id, how many children do they have?

question: List the Collection Name that document owned by 'Ransom ' belong to .

question: What is the name of the parent collection of the collection named Nice?

question: Which document has most of child? List the document id and the number of child.

question: List subset id, name and number of different documents in each subset.

question: List all name of collections that are related to collection named Best.

original_query: SELECT Product_ID FROM INVOICES GROUP BY Product_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the description, code and the corresponding count of each service type?
original_query: SELECT T1.Service_Type_Description ,  T2.Service_Type_Code ,  COUNT(*) FROM Ref_Service_Types AS T1 JOIN Services AS T2 ON T1.Service_Type_Code  =  T2.Service_Type_Code GROUP BY T2.Service_Type_Code

question: What are the different product names? What is the average product price for each of them?
original_query: SELECT Product_Name ,  avg(Product_Price) FROM PRODUCTS GROUP BY Product_Name

question: What are the states or counties of the address of the stores with marketing region code "CA"?
original_query: SELECT T1.State_County FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Stores AS T2 ON T1.Address_ID  =  T2.Address_ID WHERE T2.Marketing_Region_Code  =  "CA"

question: What are the minimum, average, and maximum quantities ordered? Check all the invoices.
original_query: SELECT min(Order_Quantity) ,  avg(Order_Quantity) ,  max(Order_Quantity) FROM INVOICES

question: Check the invoices record and compute the average quantities ordered with the payment method "MasterCard".
original_query: SELECT avg(Order_Quantity) FROM Invoices WHERE payment_method_code  =  "MasterCard"

question: Show me the distinct payment method codes from the invoice record.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT payment_method_code FROM INVOICES

question: Which workshop groups have bookings with status code "stop"? Give me the names.
original_query: SELECT T2.Store_Name FROM Bookings AS T1 JOIN Drama_Workshop_Groups AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_Group_ID  =  T2.Workshop_Group_ID WHERE T1.Status_Code  =  "stop"

question: What are the ids and details of the students who take 2 courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  =  2

question: How many teachers have taught a student who has not won any achievements?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.teacher_id) FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.student_id NOT IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Achievements )

question: Which teachers teach a class that has the substring 'data' in its detail but do not teach a class that has prefix 'net' in its detail? Give me the teacher details.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.class_details LIKE '%data%' EXCEPT SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.class_details LIKE 'net%'

question: List the biographical data and the date of the transcript of all the students.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T2.date_of_transcript FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Transcripts AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id

question: How many students have joined in the most common type of event? List the number, the event type and description.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.event_type_code ,  T3.event_type_description FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Events AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id JOIN Ref_Event_Types AS T3 ON T2.event_type_code  =  T3.event_type_code GROUP BY T2.event_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the biographical information of the students who got the most common result for their behaviour monitoring details ?
original_query: select t1.bio_data from students as t1 join behaviour_monitoring as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id where t2.behaviour_monitoring_details in ( select behaviour_monitoring_details from behaviour_monitoring group by behaviour_monitoring_details order by count(*) desc limit 1 ) except select t1.bio_data from students as t1 join behaviour_monitoring as t2 on t1.student_id  =  t2.student_id where t2.behaviour_monitoring_details not in ( select behaviour_monitoring_details from behaviour_monitoring group by behaviour_monitoring_details order by count(*) desc limit 1 )

question: For each student, find the student id and the total amount of loan he or she has.
original_query: SELECT student_id ,  sum(amount_of_loan) FROM Student_Loans GROUP BY student_id

question: Count the number of students who have a detention record.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT student_id) FROM Detention

question: What are the distinct descriptions of all the detentions which have ever happened?
original_query: SELECT distinct(T1.detention_type_description) FROM Ref_Detention_Type AS T1 JOIN Detention AS T2 ON T1.detention_type_code  =  T2.detention_type_code

question: List the achievement type code, achievement details and the date of the achievements.
original_query: SELECT achievement_type_code ,  achievement_details ,  date_achievement FROM Achievements

question: How many courses do students take at most? Also find the id of the student who takes the most courses.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  student_id FROM Classes GROUP BY student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the start time and the end time of the students' addresses for the students who have 2 transcripts.
original_query: SELECT date_from ,  date_to FROM Students_Addresses WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Transcripts GROUP BY student_id HAVING count(*)  =  2 )

question: Find the details of the teachers who have taught the student with the earliest transcript issuance.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id JOIN Transcripts AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id ORDER BY T3.date_of_transcript ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the biographical data and student id for the students who take 2 or more classes and the students who have less than 2 detentions.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 UNION SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Detention AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  <  2

question: Count the number of teachers who have taught students who have never won an achievement.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.teacher_id) FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id WHERE T2.student_id NOT IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Achievements )

question: When did all the detentions start?
original_query: SELECT datetime_detention_start FROM Detention

question: What is the code and description of the most common student address type?
original_query: SELECT T1.address_type_code ,  T2.address_type_description FROM Students_Addresses AS T1 JOIN Ref_Address_Types AS T2 WHERE T1.address_type_code  =  T2.address_type_code GROUP BY T1.address_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How much total loan does each student have ? List the student ids and the amounts .
original_query: select student_id ,  sum(amount_of_loan) from student_loans group by student_id

question: List the amount and date of loan for the students who have two or more achievements.
original_query: SELECT amount_of_loan ,  date_of_loan FROM Student_Loans WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Achievements GROUP BY student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 )

question: Which students have 'Suite' as a substring in their details? Give me their biographical information.
original_query: SELECT bio_data FROM Students WHERE student_details LIKE '%Suite%'

question: How many students have gone through a detention?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT student_id) FROM Detention

question: How many students got the most common result in the behavioral monitoring details? Also list the result details.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT student_id) ,  behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the type code and description of the least common detention type.
original_query: SELECT T1.detention_type_code ,  T2.detention_type_description FROM Detention AS T1 JOIN Ref_Detention_Type AS T2 ON T1.detention_type_code  =  T2.detention_type_code GROUP BY T1.detention_type_code ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Return the earliest date of loan in the record.
original_query: SELECT date_of_loan FROM Student_Loans ORDER BY date_of_loan ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the start time and end time of addresses for the students who receive 2 transcripts?
original_query: SELECT date_from ,  date_to FROM Students_Addresses WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM Transcripts GROUP BY student_id HAVING count(*)  =  2 )

question: Which teachers have taught the student with the earliest transcript issuance? List the teacher details.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id JOIN Transcripts AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id ORDER BY T3.date_of_transcript ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the type of event the most students joined? Give me the number of students, and the event type code and description.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.event_type_code ,  T3.event_type_description FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Events AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id JOIN Ref_Event_Types AS T3 ON T2.event_type_code  =  T3.event_type_code GROUP BY T2.event_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many courses does each student take? List the student id, the student biographical data and the course count.
original_query: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T1.bio_data ,  count(*) FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id

question: Return the distinct descriptions of all the detentions that have happened.
original_query: SELECT distinct(T1.detention_type_description) FROM Ref_Detention_Type AS T1 JOIN Detention AS T2 ON T1.detention_type_code  =  T2.detention_type_code

question: When was the transcript issued for the student with loan of maximum value?
original_query: SELECT T1.date_of_transcript FROM Transcripts AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id ORDER BY T2.amount_of_loan DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the date of the transcripts and the transcript details.
original_query: SELECT date_of_transcript ,  transcript_details FROM Transcripts

question: Which teacher teaches the most courses? Give me the id of the teacher and the number of courses he or she teaches.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  teacher_id FROM Classes GROUP BY teacher_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the biographical data and the date of transcript issuance of each student?
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T2.date_of_transcript FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Transcripts AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id

question: What are the address details and biographical information of each student?
original_query: SELECT T1.address_details ,  T3.bio_data FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id JOIN Students AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id

question: Which student has the loan with the minimum value? List the student's biographical information.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Loans AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id ORDER BY T2.amount_of_loan ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the pairs of teachers and students who are in the same class? Give me the pairs of their details.
original_query: SELECT T1.teacher_details ,  T3.student_details FROM Teachers AS T1 JOIN Classes AS T2 ON T1.teacher_id  =  T2.teacher_id JOIN Students AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id

question: List the the address details and the biographical information of the students.
original_query: SELECT T1.address_details ,  T3.bio_data FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Students_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id JOIN Students AS T3 ON T2.student_id  =  T3.student_id

question: Find the biographical data and details of students who got not only the most common result but also a result that is obtained by 3 students in behaviour monitoring.
original_query: SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1 ) INTERSECT SELECT T1.bio_data ,  T1.student_details FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id WHERE T2.behaviour_monitoring_details IN ( SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details FROM Behaviour_Monitoring GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details HAVING count(*)  =  3 )

question: Show the names and ids of tourist attractions that are visited at most once.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID HAVING count(*)  <=  1

question: Show all distinct location names.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Location_Name FROM LOCATIONS

question: Find the names and descriptions of the photos taken at the tourist attraction called "film festival".
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T1.Description FROM PHOTOS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "film festival"

question: What are the names of the tourist attractions and the dates when the tourists named Vincent or Vivian visited there?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T3.Visit_Date FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent" OR T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vivian"

question: What are the name, id and the corresponding number of visits for each  tourist attraction?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID ,   COUNT(*) FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: Show different tourist attractions' names, ids, and the corresponding number of visits.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID ,   COUNT(*) FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID GROUP BY T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: What is the average price range of hotels for each each star rating code?
original_query: SELECT star_rating_code ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY star_rating_code

question: What are the names of tourist attraction that Alison visited but Rosalind did not visit?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Alison" EXCEPT SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Rosalind"

question: What are the names of tourist attractions that can be reached by bus or is at address 254 Ottilie Junction?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Locations AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Location_ID  =  T2.Location_ID WHERE T1.Address  =  "254 Ottilie Junction" OR T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: Which tourist attraction is associated with the photo "game1"? Return its name.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM PHOTOS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T1.Name  =  "game1"

question: What are the details of the shops that can be accessed by walk?
original_query: SELECT T1.Shop_Details FROM SHOPS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Shop_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: Find the the names of the tourist attractions that the tourist named Alison visited but Rosalind did not visit.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Alison" EXCEPT SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Rosalind"

question: Find the names of the tourist attractions that is either accessible by bus or at address 254 Ottilie Junction.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Locations AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Location_ID  =  T2.Location_ID WHERE T1.Address  =  "254 Ottilie Junction" OR T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: What is the name of the staff that is in charge of the attraction named "US museum"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM STAFF AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "US museum"

question: What are the details of the markets that can be accessed by walk or bus?
original_query: SELECT T1.Market_Details FROM Street_Markets AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Market_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "walk" OR  T2.How_to_Get_There  =  "bus"

question: Show the tourist attractions visited by the tourist whose detail is 'Vincent'.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID JOIN VISITORS AS T3 ON T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T3.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent"

question: For each tourist attraction, return its name and the date when the tourists named Vincent or Vivian visited there.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T3.Visit_Date FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent" OR T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vivian"

question: What is the detail of each visitor?
original_query: SELECT Tourist_Details FROM VISITORS

question: What are the names of the tourist attractions that have parking or shopping as their feature details?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attraction_Features AS T2 ON T1.tourist_attraction_id  =  T2.tourist_attraction_id JOIN Features AS T3 ON T2.Feature_ID  =  T3.Feature_ID WHERE T3.feature_Details  =  'park' UNION SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attraction_Features AS T2 ON T1.tourist_attraction_id  =  T2.tourist_attraction_id JOIN Features AS T3 ON T2.Feature_ID  =  T3.Feature_ID WHERE T3.feature_Details  =  'shopping'

question: Find the id and star rating of each hotel and sort them in increasing order of price.
original_query: SELECT hotel_id ,  star_rating_code FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range ASC

question: Which location names contain the word "film"?
original_query: SELECT Location_Name FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name LIKE "%film%"

question: Which tourist attractions are related to royal family? Tell me their details and how we can get there.
original_query: SELECT T1.Royal_Family_Details ,  T2.How_to_Get_There FROM ROYAL_FAMILY AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Royal_Family_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: What is the name of the tourist attraction that is associated with the photo "game1"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM PHOTOS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T1.Name  =  "game1"

question: What are the star rating descriptions of the hotels with price above 10000?
original_query: SELECT T2.star_rating_description FROM HOTELS AS T1 JOIN Ref_Hotel_Star_Ratings AS T2 ON T1.star_rating_code  =  T2.star_rating_code WHERE T1.price_range  >  10000

question: What are the names and descriptions of the photos taken at the tourist attraction "film festival"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T1.Description FROM PHOTOS AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "film festival"

question: What is the detail of the location UK Gallery?
original_query: SELECT Other_Details FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name  =  "UK Gallery"

question: Show the average price of hotels for different pet policy.
original_query: SELECT pets_allowed_yn ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY pets_allowed_yn

question: What are the names and opening hours of the tourist attractions that can be accessed by bus or walk?
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Opening_Hours FROM TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS WHERE How_to_Get_There  =  "bus" OR How_to_Get_There  =  "walk"

question: Count the number of tourists who did not visit any place.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Visitors WHERE Tourist_ID NOT IN ( SELECT Tourist_ID FROM Visits )

question: Which tourist attractions do the tourists Vincent and Marcelle visit? Tell me the names of the attractions.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Marcelle"

question: Show the price ranges of hotels with 5 star ratings.
original_query: SELECT price_range FROM HOTELS WHERE star_rating_code  =  "5"

question: Find all the distinct visit dates.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Visit_Date FROM VISITS

question: How many distinct names are associated with all the photos?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Name) FROM PHOTOS

question: Show the description and code of the attraction type most tourist attractions belong to.
original_query: SELECT T1.Attraction_Type_Description ,  T2.Attraction_Type_Code FROM Ref_Attraction_Types AS T1 JOIN Tourist_Attractions AS T2 ON T1.Attraction_Type_Code  =  T2.Attraction_Type_Code GROUP BY T2.Attraction_Type_Code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the details and ways to get to tourist attractions related to royal family?
original_query: SELECT T1.Royal_Family_Details ,  T2.How_to_Get_There FROM ROYAL_FAMILY AS T1 JOIN TOURIST_ATTRACTIONS AS T2 ON T1.Royal_Family_ID  =  T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID

question: Show the details and star ratings of the 3 least expensive hotels.
original_query: SELECT other_hotel_details ,  star_rating_code FROM HOTELS ORDER BY price_range ASC LIMIT 3

question: How many available hotels are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM HOTELS

question: What are the names of the tourist attractions Vincent and Marcelle visit?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Vincent" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Name FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1 JOIN VISITORS AS T2 JOIN VISITS AS T3 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID  =  T3.Tourist_Attraction_ID AND T2.Tourist_ID  =  T3.Tourist_ID WHERE T2.Tourist_Details  =  "Marcelle"

question: What is the address of the location "UK Gallery"?
original_query: SELECT Address FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name  =  "UK Gallery"

question: How many tourists did not make any visit?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Visitors WHERE Tourist_ID NOT IN ( SELECT Tourist_ID FROM Visits )

question: Return the detail of the location named "UK Gallery".
original_query: SELECT Other_Details FROM LOCATIONS WHERE Location_Name  =  "UK Gallery"

question: Show the average price of hotels for each star rating code.
original_query: SELECT star_rating_code ,  avg(price_range) FROM HOTELS GROUP BY star_rating_code

question: For each Orange county campus, report the number of degrees granted after 2000.
original_query: SELECT T1.campus ,  sum(T2.degrees) FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T1.county  =  "Orange" AND T2.year  >=  2000 GROUP BY T1.campus

question: How many people graduated from San Francisco State University in 2004?
original_query: SELECT sum(t1.graduate) FROM discipline_enrollments AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t1.year  =  2004 AND t2.campus  =  "San Francisco State University"

question: How many faculty is there in total in the year of 2002?
original_query: SELECT sum(faculty) FROM faculty WHERE YEAR  =  2002

question: report the total number of degrees granted between 1998 and 2002.
original_query: SELECT T1.campus ,  sum(T2.degrees) FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  >=  1998 AND T2.year  <=  2002 GROUP BY T1.campus

question: What campuses opened between 1935 and 1939?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  >=  1935 AND YEAR  <=  1939

question: Find the name of the campuses opened before 1800.
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  <  1800

question: Find the count of universities whose campus fee is greater than the average campus fee.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM csu_fees WHERE campusfee  >  (SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees)

question: What are the campuses that opened in 1958?
original_query: SELECT campus FROM campuses WHERE YEAR  =  1958

question: What is the campus fee of "San Francisco State University" in year 2000?
original_query: SELECT t1.campusfee FROM csu_fees AS t1 JOIN campuses AS t2 ON t1.campus  =  t2.id WHERE t2.campus  =  "San Francisco State University" AND t1.year  =  2000

question: What are the names of the campus that have more faculties in 2002 than the maximum number in Orange county?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  =  2002 AND faculty  >  (SELECT max(faculty) FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  =  2002 AND T1.county  =  "Orange")

question: What campus has the most faculties in 2003?
original_query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN faculty AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.campus WHERE T2.year  =  2003 ORDER BY T2.faculty DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which university is in Los Angeles county and opened after 1950?

question: Show the unique first names, last names, and phone numbers for all customers with any account.

question: What is the customer last name, id and phone number with most number of orders?
