original_query: SELECT decor ,  count(*) FROM Rooms WHERE bedType = "King" GROUP BY decor;

question: Which room has the highest rate? List the room's full name, rate, check in and check out date.
original_query: SELECT T2.roomName ,  T1.Rate ,  T1.CheckIn ,  T1.CheckOut FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId GROUP BY T1.Room ORDER BY T1.Rate DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many rooms cost more than 120, for each different decor?
original_query: SELECT decor , count(*) FROM Rooms WHERE basePrice  >  120 GROUP BY decor;

question: Find the name of rooms booked by some customers whose first name contains ROY.
original_query: SELECT T2.roomName FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId WHERE firstname LIKE '%ROY%'

question: What is the least popular kind of decor?
original_query: SELECT T2.decor FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId GROUP BY T2.decor ORDER BY count(T2.decor) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the first and last names of people who payed more than the rooms' base prices.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname ,  T1.lastname FROM Reservations AS T1 JOIN Rooms AS T2 ON T1.Room  =  T2.RoomId WHERE T1.Rate - T2.basePrice  >  0

question: What is the total number of rooms available in this inn?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Rooms;

question: How many times does ROY SWEAZY has reserved a room.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Reservations WHERE FirstName = "ROY" AND LastName  =  "SWEAZY";

question: What are the names of modern rooms that have a base price lower than $160 and two beds.
original_query: SELECT roomName FROM Rooms WHERE basePrice  <  160 AND beds =  2 AND decor  =  'modern';

question: How many rooms are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Rooms;

question: What are the number of rooms for each bed type?
original_query: SELECT bedType ,  count(*) FROM Rooms GROUP BY bedType;

question: What are the name and id of the three highest priced rooms?
original_query: SELECT RoomId ,  roomName FROM Rooms ORDER BY basePrice DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Count the number of different provinces that have institutions.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Province) FROM institution

question: Return the affiliations of instituions that are not in the city of Vancouver.
original_query: SELECT Affiliation FROM institution WHERE City != "Vancouver"

question: What are the names of institutions, ordered alphabetically?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM institution ORDER BY Name ASC

question: What are the names of institutions, ordered descending by their number of championships?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID ORDER BY T1.Number_of_Championships DESC

question: What are the names of institutions that have 1 or more championships?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID WHERE T1.Number_of_Championships  >=  1

question: What are the nicknames of institutions, ordered descending by their capacities?
original_query: SELECT T1.Nickname FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID ORDER BY T2.Capacity DESC

question: List the names of institutions with at least one championship.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID WHERE T1.Number_of_Championships  >=  1

question: Return the nickname of the institution with the lowest enrollment.
original_query: SELECT T1.Nickname FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID ORDER BY T2.Enrollment ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the stadiums of institutions in descending order of the capacity.
original_query: SELECT Stadium FROM institution ORDER BY Capacity DESC

question: What are the names and nicknames of institutions?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Nickname FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID

question: What is the nickname of the institution with the smallest enrollment?
original_query: SELECT T1.Nickname FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID ORDER BY T2.Enrollment ASC LIMIT 1

question: Return the maximum and minimum enrollment across all institutions.
original_query: SELECT max(Enrollment) ,  min(Enrollment) FROM institution

question: List the names of institutions in descending order of the number of championships.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM championship AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.Institution_ID  =  T2.Institution_ID ORDER BY T1.Number_of_Championships DESC

question: List the names of institutions in ascending order of founded year.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM institution ORDER BY Founded ASC

question: Show the provinces that have both institutions founded before 1920 and institutions founded after 1950.
original_query: SELECT Province FROM institution WHERE Founded  <  1920 INTERSECT SELECT Province FROM institution WHERE Founded  >  1950

question: Give the stadium of the institution which is the greatest enrollment.
original_query: SELECT Stadium FROM institution ORDER BY Enrollment DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the years in which more than 1 institution was founded, as well as the number of institutions founded in each of those.
original_query: SELECT Founded ,  COUNT(*) FROM institution GROUP BY Founded HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: In which years were more than one institution founded?
original_query: SELECT Founded ,  COUNT(*) FROM institution GROUP BY Founded HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: What is the most common type of affiliation for institutions?
original_query: SELECT Affiliation FROM institution GROUP BY Affiliation ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the most common type of affiliation across all institutions.
original_query: SELECT Affiliation FROM institution GROUP BY Affiliation ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the customers and staff members?
original_query: SELECT customer_details FROM customers UNION SELECT staff_details FROM staff

question: What are the names of customers who do not have any policies?
original_query: SELECT customer_details FROM customers EXCEPT SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id

question: Which customer is associated with the latest policy?
original_query: SELECT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t1.start_date  =  (SELECT max(start_date) FROM policies)

question: How much amount in total were claimed in the most recently created document?
original_query: SELECT sum(t1.amount_claimed) FROM claim_headers AS t1 JOIN claims_documents AS t2 ON t1.claim_header_id  =  t2.claim_id WHERE t2.created_date  =  (SELECT created_date FROM claims_documents ORDER BY created_date LIMIT 1)

question: Which customer made the largest amount of claim in a single claim? Return the customer details.
original_query: SELECT t3.customer_details FROM claim_headers AS t1 JOIN policies AS t2 ON t1.policy_id  =  t2.policy_id JOIN customers AS t3 ON t2.customer_id  =  t3.customer_id WHERE t1.amount_claimed  =  (SELECT max(amount_claimed) FROM claim_headers)

question: What is the name of the customer who has made the minimum amount of payment in one claim?
original_query: SELECT t3.customer_details FROM claim_headers AS t1 JOIN policies AS t2 ON t1.policy_id  =  t2.policy_id JOIN customers AS t3 ON t2.customer_id  =  t3.customer_id WHERE t1.amount_piad  =  (SELECT min(amount_piad) FROM claim_headers)

question: Find the description of the claim status "Open".
original_query: SELECT claim_status_description FROM claims_processing_stages WHERE claim_status_name  =  "Open"

question: Find the names of the customers who have an deputy policy.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t1.policy_type_code  =  "Deputy"

question: How many claim processing stages are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM claims_processing_stages

question: What is the name of the customer who has made the largest amount of claim in a single claim?
original_query: SELECT t3.customer_details FROM claim_headers AS t1 JOIN policies AS t2 ON t1.policy_id  =  t2.policy_id JOIN customers AS t3 ON t2.customer_id  =  t3.customer_id WHERE t1.amount_claimed  =  (SELECT max(amount_claimed) FROM claim_headers)

question: Find the number of records of each policy type and its type code.
original_query: SELECT policy_type_code ,  count(*) FROM policies GROUP BY policy_type_code

question: What are the total amount and average amount paid in claim headers?
original_query: SELECT sum(amount_piad) ,  avg(amount_piad) FROM claim_headers

question: Find the names of customers who either have an deputy policy or uniformed policy.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t2.customer_details FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t1.policy_type_code  =  "Deputy" OR t1.policy_type_code  =  "Uniform"

question: What are the type codes of the policies used by the customer "Dayana Robel"?
original_query: SELECT policy_type_code FROM policies AS t1 JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t2.customer_details  =  "Dayana Robel"

question: List the names of all the customers in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT customer_details FROM customers ORDER BY customer_details

question: Find the total and average amount paid in claim headers.
original_query: SELECT sum(amount_piad) ,  avg(amount_piad) FROM claim_headers

question: Sort the customer names in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT customer_details FROM customers ORDER BY customer_details

question: What is the name of the claim processing stage that most of the claims are on?
original_query: SELECT t2.claim_status_name FROM claims_processing AS t1 JOIN claims_processing_stages AS t2 ON t1.claim_stage_id  =  t2.claim_stage_id GROUP BY t1.claim_stage_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which claim processing stage has the most claims? Show the claim status name.
original_query: SELECT t2.claim_status_name FROM claims_processing AS t1 JOIN claims_processing_stages AS t2 ON t1.claim_stage_id  =  t2.claim_stage_id GROUP BY t1.claim_stage_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of distinct stages in claim processing.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM claims_processing_stages

question: Which customers have used both the service named "Close a policy" and the service named "Upgrade a policy"? Give me the customer names.
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN first_notification_of_loss AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN services AS t3 ON t2.service_id  =  t3.service_id WHERE t3.service_name  =  "Close a policy" INTERSECT SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN first_notification_of_loss AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN services AS t3 ON t2.service_id  =  t3.service_id WHERE t3.service_name  =  "New policy application"

question: Which customer uses the most policies? Give me the customer name.
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the effective date of the claim that has the largest amount of total settlement?
original_query: SELECT t1.Effective_Date FROM claims AS t1 JOIN settlements AS t2 ON t1.claim_id  =  t2.claim_id GROUP BY t1.claim_id ORDER BY sum(t2.settlement_amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which policy type has the most records in the database?
original_query: SELECT policy_type_code FROM available_policies GROUP BY policy_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which services have been used more than twice in first notification of loss? Return the service name.
original_query: SELECT t2.service_name FROM first_notification_of_loss AS t1 JOIN services AS t2 ON t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id GROUP BY t1.service_id HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: Find the IDs of customers whose name contains "Diana".
original_query: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE customer_name LIKE "%Diana%"

question: Find the name of services that have been used for more than 2 times in first notification of loss.
original_query: SELECT t2.service_name FROM first_notification_of_loss AS t1 JOIN services AS t2 ON t1.service_id  =  t2.service_id GROUP BY t1.service_id HAVING count(*)  >  2

question: What is the name of the customer who has the most policies listed?
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many policies are listed for the customer named "Dayana Robel"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t1.customer_name  =  "Dayana Robel"

question: What are the phone numbers of customers using the policy with the code "Life Insurance"?
original_query: SELECT customer_phone FROM available_policies WHERE policy_type_code  =  "Life Insurance"

question: Find the maximum and minimum settlement amount.
original_query: SELECT max(settlement_amount) ,  min(settlement_amount) FROM settlements

question: List all the policy types used by the customer enrolled in the most policies.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.policy_type_code FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN available_policies AS t3 ON t2.policy_id  =  t3.policy_id WHERE t1.customer_name  =  (SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: What are the maximum and minimum settlement amount on record?
original_query: SELECT max(settlement_amount) ,  min(settlement_amount) FROM settlements

question: Give me a list of all the service names sorted alphabetically.
original_query: SELECT service_name FROM services ORDER BY service_name

question: What are the open and close dates of all the policies used by the customer who have "Diana" in part of their names?
original_query: SELECT t2.date_opened ,  t2.date_closed FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id WHERE t1.customer_name LIKE "%Diana%"

question: Find all the phone numbers.
original_query: SELECT customer_phone FROM available_policies

question: What are all the policy types of the customer that has the most policies listed?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.policy_type_code FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN available_policies AS t3 ON t2.policy_id  =  t3.policy_id WHERE t1.customer_name  =  (SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN customers_policies AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id GROUP BY t1.customer_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Find the policy types more than 4 customers use. Show their type code.
original_query: SELECT policy_type_code FROM available_policies GROUP BY policy_type_code HAVING count(*)  >  4

question: Find the names of customers who have used either the service "Close a policy" or the service "Upgrade a policy".
original_query: SELECT t1.customer_name FROM customers AS t1 JOIN first_notification_of_loss AS t2 ON t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id JOIN services AS t3 ON t2.service_id  =  t3.service_id WHERE t3.service_name  =  "Close a policy" OR t3.service_name  =  "Upgrade a policy"

question: What is the ordered list of customer ids?
original_query: SELECT customer_id ,  customer_name FROM customers ORDER BY customer_id ASC

question: Count the total number of available services.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM services

question: Find the the customer details and id for the customers who had more than one policy.
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_details ,  T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Policies AS T2 ON T1.Customer_id  =  T2.Customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Find the claim id and the number of settlements made for the claim with the most recent settlement date.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.claim_id  =  T2.claim_id GROUP BY T1.claim_id ORDER BY T1.Date_Claim_Settled DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total amount of payment?
original_query: SELECT sum(Amount_Payment) FROM Payments

question: Find the claim id and claim date of the claim that incurred the most settlement count. Also tell me the count.
original_query: SELECT T1.claim_id ,  T1.date_claim_made ,  count(*) FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.claim_id  =  T2.claim_id GROUP BY T1.claim_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the payment Id, the date and the amount for all the payments processed with Visa.
original_query: SELECT Payment_ID ,  Date_Payment_Made ,  Amount_Payment FROM Payments WHERE Payment_Method_Code  =  'Visa'

question: Give me the the customer details and id for the customers who had two or more policies but did not file any claims.
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_details ,  T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Policies AS T2 ON T1.Customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 EXCEPT SELECT T1.customer_details ,  T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Policies AS T2 ON T1.Customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN Claims AS T3 ON T2.policy_id  =  T3.policy_id

question: Compute the total amount of payment processed.
original_query: SELECT sum(Amount_Payment) FROM Payments

question: Find the claims that led to more than two settlements or have the maximum claim value. For each of them, return the date the claim was made and the id of the claim.
original_query: SELECT T1.Date_Claim_Made ,  T1.Claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.Claim_id  =  T2.Claim_id GROUP BY T1.Claim_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 UNION SELECT T1.Date_Claim_Made ,  T1.Claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.Claim_id  =  T2.Claim_id WHERE T1.Amount_Claimed  =  ( SELECT max(Amount_Claimed) FROM Claims )

question: Who are the customers that had more than 1 policy? List the customer details and id.
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_details ,  T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Policies AS T2 ON T1.Customer_id  =  T2.Customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: Which Payments were processed with Visa? List the payment Id, the date and the amount.
original_query: SELECT Payment_ID ,  Date_Payment_Made ,  Amount_Payment FROM Payments WHERE Payment_Method_Code  =  'Visa'

question: Which claims caused more than 2 settlements or have the maximum claim value? List the date the claim was made and the claim id.
original_query: SELECT T1.Date_Claim_Made ,  T1.Claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.Claim_id  =  T2.Claim_id GROUP BY T1.Claim_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 UNION SELECT T1.Date_Claim_Made ,  T1.Claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.Claim_id  =  T2.Claim_id WHERE T1.Amount_Claimed  =  ( SELECT max(Amount_Claimed) FROM Claims )

question: Among all the claims, which claims have a claimed amount larger than the average? List the date the claim was made and the date it was settled.
original_query: SELECT Date_Claim_Made ,  Date_Claim_Settled FROM Claims WHERE Amount_Claimed  >  ( SELECT avg(Amount_Claimed) FROM Claims )

question: Of all the claims, what was the earliest date when any claim was made?
original_query: SELECT Date_Claim_Made FROM Claims ORDER BY Date_Claim_Made ASC LIMIT 1

question: Return the distinct customer details.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT customer_details FROM Customers

question: Find the claimed amount in the claim with the least amount settled. Show both the settlement amount and claim amount.
original_query: SELECT Amount_Settled ,  Amount_Claimed FROM Claims ORDER BY Amount_Settled ASC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the claims, which settlements have a claimed amount that is no more than the average? List the claim start date.
original_query: SELECT Date_Claim_Made FROM Claims WHERE Amount_Settled  <=  ( SELECT avg(Amount_Settled) FROM Claims )

question: Find the policy type the most customers choose.
original_query: SELECT Policy_Type_Code FROM Customer_Policies GROUP BY Policy_Type_Code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many settlements were made on the claim with the most recent claim settlement date? List the number and the claim id.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.claim_id FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.claim_id  =  T2.claim_id GROUP BY T1.claim_id ORDER BY T1.Date_Claim_Settled DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of settlements each claim corresponds to. Show the number together with the claim id.
original_query: SELECT T1.Claim_id ,  count(*) FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.claim_id  =  T2.claim_id GROUP BY T1.claim_id

question: How many settlements does each claim correspond to? List the claim id and the number of settlements.
original_query: SELECT T1.Claim_id ,  count(*) FROM Claims AS T1 JOIN Settlements AS T2 ON T1.claim_id  =  T2.claim_id GROUP BY T1.claim_id

question: Tell me the the date when the first claim was made.
original_query: SELECT Date_Claim_Made FROM Claims ORDER BY Date_Claim_Made ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the claim dates and settlement dates of all the settlements?
original_query: SELECT Date_Claim_Made ,  Date_Claim_Settled FROM Settlements

question: Among all the claims, what is the amount claimed in the claim with the least amount settled? List both the settlement amount and claim amount.
original_query: SELECT Amount_Settled ,  Amount_Claimed FROM Claims ORDER BY Amount_Settled ASC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the claims, what is the settlement amount of the claim with the largest claim amount? List both the settlement amount and claim amount.
original_query: SELECT Amount_Settled ,  Amount_Claimed FROM Claims ORDER BY Amount_Claimed DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of editors in ascending order of age.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM editor ORDER BY Age ASC

question: What is the name of the youngest editor?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM editor ORDER BY Age ASC LIMIT 1

question: Show the names of editors that are on the committee of journals with sales bigger than 3000.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM journal_committee AS T1 JOIN editor AS T2 ON T1.Editor_ID  =  T2.Editor_ID JOIN journal AS T3 ON T1.Journal_ID  =  T3.Journal_ID WHERE T3.Sales  >  3000

question: For each journal_committee, find the editor name and the journal theme.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  T3.Theme FROM journal_committee AS T1 JOIN editor AS T2 ON T1.Editor_ID  =  T2.Editor_ID JOIN journal AS T3 ON T1.Journal_ID  =  T3.Journal_ID

question: List the names of editors who are older than 25.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM editor WHERE Age  >  25

question: What are the different ages of editors? Show each age along with the number of editors of that age.
original_query: SELECT Age ,  COUNT(*) FROM editor GROUP BY Age

question: Show the names of editors that are on at least two journal committees.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM editor AS T1 JOIN journal_committee AS T2 ON T1.Editor_ID  =  T2.Editor_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: Show the id, name of each editor and the number of journal committees they are on.
original_query: SELECT T1.editor_id ,  T1.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM editor AS T1 JOIN journal_committee AS T2 ON T1.Editor_ID  =  T2.Editor_ID GROUP BY T1.editor_id

question: Show the names of editors of age either 24 or 25.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM editor WHERE Age  =  24 OR Age  =  25

question: Find the city and state of the bank branch named morningside.
original_query: SELECT city ,  state FROM bank WHERE bname  =  'morningside'

question: How many distinct types of accounts are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT acc_type) FROM customer

question: What are the names of customers who have a loan of more than 3000 in amount?
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE amount  >  3000

question: Find the name of customers who have loans of both Mortgages and Auto.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE loan_type  =  'Mortgages' INTERSECT SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE loan_type  =  'Auto'

question: What are the names of the different bank branches, and what are their total loan amounts?
original_query: SELECT sum(amount) ,  T1.bname FROM bank AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id GROUP BY T1.bname

question: What are the names and account balances for customers who have taken a total amount of more than 5000 in loans?
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name ,  T1.acc_type FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name HAVING sum(T2.amount)  >  5000

question: How many customers are there?
original_query: SELECT sum(no_of_customers) FROM bank

question: Find the name of bank branch that provided the greatest total amount of loans to customers with credit score is less than 100.
original_query: SELECT T2.bname FROM loan AS T1 JOIN bank AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id JOIN customer AS T3 ON T1.cust_id  =  T3.cust_id WHERE T3.credit_score  <  100 GROUP BY T2.bname ORDER BY sum(T1.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the customer with the worst credit score?
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer ORDER BY credit_score LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of customer who has the highest amount of loans.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name ORDER BY sum(T2.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of customers who do not have an saving account.
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer EXCEPT SELECT cust_name FROM customer WHERE acc_type  =  'saving'

question: Find the the name of the customers who have a loan with amount more than 3000.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE amount  >  3000

question: Find the name of customers who have more than one loan.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the names of customers who have taken both Mortgage and Auto loans?
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE loan_type  =  'Mortgages' INTERSECT SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE loan_type  =  'Auto'

question: Find the name and account balance of the customers who have loans with a total amount of more than 5000.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name ,  T1.acc_type FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name HAVING sum(T2.amount)  >  5000

question: Find the number of different states which banks are located at.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT state) FROM bank

question: Find the number of different cities which banks are located at.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT city) FROM bank

question: Find the name of customers who have both saving and checking account types.
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer WHERE acc_type  =  'saving' INTERSECT SELECT cust_name FROM customer WHERE acc_type  =  'checking'

question: Find the average number of customers cross all banks.
original_query: SELECT avg(no_of_customers) FROM bank

question: What is the name of the customer who has greatest total loan amount?
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name ORDER BY sum(T2.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name and credit score of the customers who have some loans.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.cust_name ,  T1.credit_score FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id

question: What are the names of customers with credit score less than the average credit score across customers?
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer WHERE credit_score  <  (SELECT avg(credit_score) FROM customer)

question: What is the average account balance of customers with credit score below 50 for the different account types?
original_query: SELECT avg(acc_bal) ,  acc_type FROM customer WHERE credit_score  <  50 GROUP BY acc_type

question: Find the name of customers whose credit score is below the average credit scores of all customers.
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer WHERE credit_score  <  (SELECT avg(credit_score) FROM customer)

question: Find the average credit score of the customers who do not have any loan.
original_query: SELECT avg(credit_score) FROM customer WHERE cust_id NOT IN (SELECT cust_id FROM loan)

question: Find the total amount of loans provided by bank branches in the state of New York.
original_query: SELECT sum(T2.amount) FROM bank AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id WHERE T1.state  =  'New York'

question: In how many different cities are banks located?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT city) FROM bank

question: What is the average credit score for customers who have taken a loan?
original_query: SELECT avg(credit_score) FROM customer WHERE cust_id IN (SELECT cust_id FROM loan)

question: What are the states, account types, and credit scores for customers who have 0 loans?
original_query: SELECT state ,  acc_type ,  credit_score FROM customer WHERE no_of_loans  =  0

question: What are the names and account balances of customers with the letter a in their names?
original_query: SELECT cust_name ,  acc_bal FROM customer WHERE cust_name LIKE '%a%'

question: In how many different states are banks located?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT state) FROM bank

question: What is the name, account type, and account balance corresponding to the customer with the highest credit score?
original_query: SELECT cust_name ,  acc_type ,  acc_bal FROM customer ORDER BY credit_score DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the different names and credit scores of customers who have taken a loan?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.cust_name ,  T1.credit_score FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id

question: Find the city and name of bank branches that provide business loans.
original_query: SELECT T1.bname ,  T1.city FROM bank AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.branch_id  =  T2.branch_id WHERE T2.loan_type  =  'Business'

question: List the name of all different customers who have some loan sorted by their total loan amount.
original_query: SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id GROUP BY T1.cust_name ORDER BY sum(T2.amount)

question: What are the names of customers who have not taken a Mortage loan?
original_query: SELECT cust_name FROM customer EXCEPT SELECT T1.cust_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.cust_id  =  T2.cust_id WHERE T2.loan_type  =  'Mortgages'

question: Find the state which has the most number of customers.
original_query: SELECT state FROM bank GROUP BY state ORDER BY sum(no_of_customers) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count the number of bank branches.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM bank

question: Find the average number of customers in all banks of Utah state.
original_query: SELECT avg(no_of_customers) FROM bank WHERE state  =  'Utah'

question: What is the average number of bank customers?
original_query: SELECT avg(no_of_customers) FROM bank

question: What is each customer's move in date, and the corresponding customer id and details?
original_query: SELECT T2.date_moved_in ,  T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_details FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Events AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id

question: What are the id and details of the customers who have at least 3 events?
original_query: SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_details FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Customer_Events AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >=  3

question: What are the distinct id and type of the thing that has the status 'Close' or has a status record before the date '2017-06-19 02:59:21'
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.thing_id ,  T2.Type_of_Thing_Code FROM Timed_Status_of_Things AS T1 JOIN Things AS T2 ON T1.thing_id  =  T2.thing_id WHERE T1.Status_of_Thing_Code  =  'Close' OR T1.Date_and_Date  <  '2017-06-19 02:59:21'

question: What are the distinct move in dates of the residents?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT date_moved_in FROM residents

question: What is the maximum number that a certain service is provided? List the service id, details and number.
original_query: SELECT T1.service_id ,  T1.service_details ,  count(*) FROM Services AS T1 JOIN Residents_Services AS T2 ON T1.service_id  =  T2.service_id GROUP BY T1.service_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different status codes of things are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT Status_of_Thing_Code) FROM Timed_Status_of_Things

question: How many residents does each property have? List property id and resident count.
original_query: SELECT T1.property_id ,  count(*) FROM properties AS T1 JOIN residents AS T2 ON T1.property_id  =  T2.property_id GROUP BY T1.property_id

question: How many distinct locations have the things with service detail 'Unsatisfied' been located in?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.Location_Code) FROM Things AS T1 JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS T2 ON T1.thing_id  =  T2.thing_id WHERE T1.service_details  =  'Unsatisfied'

question: What are the resident details containing the substring 'Miss'?
original_query: SELECT other_details FROM Residents WHERE other_details LIKE '%Miss%'

question: What are all the the participant ids, type code and details?
original_query: SELECT Participant_ID ,  Participant_Type_Code ,  Participant_Details FROM  Participants

question: List the type of the services in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT service_type_code FROM services ORDER BY service_type_code

question: Which events id does not have any participant with detail 'Kenyatta Kuhn'?
original_query: SELECT event_id FROM EVENTS EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_id FROM Participants_in_Events AS T1 JOIN Participants AS T2 ON T1.Participant_ID  =  T2.Participant_ID WHERE Participant_Details  =  'Kenyatta Kuhn'

question: Which service id and type has the least number of participants?
original_query: SELECT T3.service_id ,  T4.Service_Type_Code FROM participants AS T1 JOIN Participants_in_Events AS T2 ON T1.Participant_ID  =  T2.Participant_ID JOIN EVENTS AS T3 ON T2.Event_ID   =  T3.Event_ID JOIN services AS T4 ON T3.service_id  =  T4.service_id GROUP BY T3.service_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: what are the event details of the services that have the type code 'Marriage'?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_details FROM EVENTS AS T1 JOIN Services AS T2 ON T1.Service_ID  =  T2.Service_ID WHERE T2.Service_Type_Code  =  'Marriage'

question: What is the id of the event with the most participants?
original_query: SELECT Event_ID FROM Participants_in_Events GROUP BY Event_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many participants belong to the type 'Organizer'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM participants WHERE participant_type_code  =  'Organizer'

question: What are the ids and details of events that have more than one participants?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_id ,  T1.event_details FROM EVENTS AS T1 JOIN Participants_in_Events AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID  =  T2.Event_ID GROUP BY T1.Event_ID HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: How many council taxes are collected for renting arrears ?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM rent_arrears

question: What is the tax source system code related to the benefits and overpayments? List the code and the benifit id, order by benifit id.
original_query: SELECT T1.source_system_code ,  T2.council_tax_id FROM CMI_Cross_References AS T1 JOIN Benefits_Overpayments AS T2 ON T1.cmi_cross_ref_id  =  T2.cmi_cross_ref_id ORDER BY T2.council_tax_id

question: How many different source system code for the cmi cross references are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT source_system_code) FROM CMI_cross_references

question: What are the renting arrears tax ids related to the customer master index whose detail is not 'Schmidt, Kertzmann and Lubowitz'?
original_query: SELECT T1.council_tax_id FROM Rent_Arrears AS T1 JOIN CMI_Cross_References AS T2 ON T1.cmi_cross_ref_id  =  T2.cmi_cross_ref_id JOIN Customer_Master_Index AS T3 ON T3.master_customer_id  =  T2.master_customer_id WHERE T3.cmi_details != 'Schmidt ,  Kertzmann and Lubowitz'

question: Wat is the tax source system code and master customer id of the taxes related to each parking fine id?
original_query: SELECT T1.source_system_code ,  T1.master_customer_id ,  T2.council_tax_id FROM CMI_Cross_References AS T1 JOIN Parking_Fines AS T2 ON T1.cmi_cross_ref_id  =  T2.cmi_cross_ref_id

question: what are the details of the cmi masters that have the cross reference code 'Tax'?
original_query: SELECT T1.cmi_details FROM Customer_Master_Index AS T1 JOIN CMI_Cross_References AS T2 ON T1.master_customer_id  =  T2.master_customer_id WHERE T2.source_system_code  =  'Tax'

question: Which distinct source system code includes the substring 'en'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT source_system_code FROM cmi_cross_references WHERE source_system_code LIKE '%en%'

question: How many technicians are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM technician

question: Show names of technicians and the number of machines they are assigned to repair.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM repair_assignment AS T1 JOIN technician AS T2 ON T1.technician_ID  =  T2.technician_ID GROUP BY T2.Name

question: What are the names of the technicians aged either 36 or 37?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM technician WHERE Age  =  36 OR Age  =  37

question: Show the name of technicians aged either 36 or 37
original_query: SELECT Name FROM technician WHERE Age  =  36 OR Age  =  37

question: What are the names of the technicians that are assigned to repair machines with more point values than 70?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM repair_assignment AS T1 JOIN machine AS T2 ON T1.machine_id  =  T2.machine_id JOIN technician AS T3 ON T1.technician_ID  =  T3.technician_ID WHERE T2.value_points  >  70

question: Show different teams of technicians and the number of technicians in each team.
original_query: SELECT Team ,  COUNT(*) FROM technician GROUP BY Team

question: What are the names of the technicians by ascending order of quality rank for the machine they are assigned?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM repair_assignment AS T1 JOIN machine AS T2 ON T1.machine_id  =  T2.machine_id JOIN technician AS T3 ON T1.technician_ID  =  T3.technician_ID ORDER BY T2.quality_rank

question: Show names of technicians and series of machines they are assigned to repair.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Machine_series FROM repair_assignment AS T1 JOIN machine AS T2 ON T1.machine_id  =  T2.machine_id JOIN technician AS T3 ON T1.technician_ID  =  T3.technician_ID

question: List the name of technicians whose team is not "NYY".
original_query: SELECT Name FROM technician WHERE Team != "NYY"

question: What is the number of technicians?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM technician

question: Show the team that have at least two technicians.
original_query: SELECT Team FROM technician GROUP BY Team HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

question: What is the team and starting year for each technician?
original_query: SELECT Team ,  Starting_Year FROM technician

question: Please show the team that has the most number of technicians.
original_query: SELECT Team FROM technician GROUP BY Team ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of technicians in ascending order of age.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM technician ORDER BY Age ASC

question: What are the teams with the most technicians?
original_query: SELECT Team FROM technician GROUP BY Team ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many products are there for each manufacturer?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: What are the names of all products?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Products

question: Select the name and price of the cheapest product.
original_query: SELECT name ,  price FROM Products ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1

question: Select all the data from the products and each product's manufacturer.
original_query: SELECT * FROM products AS T1 JOIN Manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer  =  T2.code

question: How many companies were created by Andy?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM manufacturers WHERE founder  =  'Andy'

question: What are the different cities listed?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT headquarter FROM manufacturers

question: What are the names, headquarters and revenues for manufacturers, sorted by revenue descending?
original_query: SELECT name ,  headquarter ,  revenue FROM manufacturers ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: What is the total revenue of each manufacturer?
original_query: SELECT sum(revenue) ,  name FROM manufacturers GROUP BY name

question: Select the average price of each manufacturer's products, showing only the manufacturer's code.
original_query: SELECT AVG(Price) ,  Manufacturer FROM Products GROUP BY Manufacturer

question: What are the names and prices of products that cost at least 180, sorted by price decreasing and name ascending?
original_query: SELECT name ,  price FROM products WHERE price  >=  180 ORDER BY price DESC ,  name ASC

question: What are the names, headquarters and founders of the company with the highest revenue?
original_query: SELECT name ,  headquarter ,  founder FROM manufacturers ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: Select the names and the prices of all the products in the store.
original_query: SELECT name ,  price FROM products

question: Return the founder of Sony.
original_query: SELECT founder FROM manufacturers WHERE name  =  'Sony'

question: What is all the product data, as well as  each product's manufacturer?
original_query: SELECT * FROM products AS T1 JOIN Manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer  =  T2.code

question: What is all the information of all the products that have a price between 60 and 120?
original_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN 60 AND 120

question: What is the total revenue of all companies whose main office is at Tokyo or Taiwan?
original_query: SELECT sum(revenue) FROM manufacturers WHERE Headquarter  =  'Tokyo' OR Headquarter  =  'Taiwan'

question: What are the names of companies with revenue between 100 and 150?
original_query: SELECT name FROM manufacturers WHERE revenue BETWEEN 100 AND 150

question: What are the names and average prices of products for manufacturers whose products cost on average 150 or more?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.Price) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN Manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name HAVING avg(T1.price) >= 150

question: Select the code of the product that is cheapest in each product category.
original_query: SELECT code ,  name ,  min(price) FROM products GROUP BY name

question: What are the average prices of products, grouped by manufacturer name?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.Price) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN Manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: What are the names of products produced by both Creative Labs and Sony?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code WHERE T2.name  =  'Creative Labs' INTERSECT SELECT T1.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code WHERE T2.name  =  'Sony'

question: Find the total revenue created by the companies whose headquarter is located at Austin.
original_query: SELECT sum(revenue) FROM manufacturers WHERE headquarter  =  'Austin'

question: Find the number of manufactures that are based in Tokyo or Beijing.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM manufacturers WHERE headquarter  =  'Tokyo' OR headquarter  =  'Beijing'

question: What are the names of companies that do not make DVD drives?
original_query: SELECT name FROM manufacturers EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code WHERE T1.name  =  'DVD drive'

question: What are the average prices of products for each manufacturer?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.price) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: What are the names and revenues of the companies with the highest revenues in each headquarter city?
original_query: SELECT name ,  max(revenue) ,  Headquarter FROM manufacturers GROUP BY Headquarter

question: What is the name and price of the cheapest product?
original_query: SELECT name ,  price FROM Products ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of products for each manufacturer, showing the name of each company.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: Find the name and revenue of the company that earns the highest revenue in each city.
original_query: SELECT name ,  max(revenue) ,  Headquarter FROM manufacturers GROUP BY Headquarter

question: What is the average price of products with manufacturer codes equal to 2?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM products WHERE Manufacturer  =  2

question: What is the headquarter of the company whose founder is James?
original_query: SELECT headquarter FROM manufacturers WHERE founder  =  'James'

question: What is the total revenue of companies started by founder?
original_query: SELECT sum(revenue) ,  founder FROM manufacturers GROUP BY founder

question: Find the total revenue for each manufacturer.
original_query: SELECT sum(revenue) ,  name FROM manufacturers GROUP BY name

question: What are the names of manufacturers with revenue greater than the average of all revenues?
original_query: SELECT name FROM manufacturers WHERE revenue  >  (SELECT avg(revenue) FROM manufacturers)

question: Find the average prices of all products from each manufacture, and list each company's name.
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.price) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.Manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: Find the founder of the company whose name begins with the letter 'S'.
original_query: SELECT founder FROM manufacturers WHERE name LIKE 'S%'

question: Find all information of all the products with a price between $60 and $120.
original_query: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN 60 AND 120

question: Select the name of each manufacturer along with the name and price of its most expensive product.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  max(T1.Price) ,  T2.name FROM products AS T1 JOIN Manufacturers AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer  =  T2.code GROUP BY T2.name

question: Compute the average price of all the products.
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM products

question: Find the name of companies whose revenue is greater than the average revenue of all companies.
original_query: SELECT name FROM manufacturers WHERE revenue  >  (SELECT avg(revenue) FROM manufacturers)

question: Find the name and component amount of the least popular furniture.
original_query: SELECT name ,  Num_of_Component FROM furniture ORDER BY market_rate LIMIT 1

question: Find the number of funiture types produced by each manufacturer as well as the company names.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  t1.name FROM manufacturer AS t1 JOIN furniture_manufacte AS t2 ON t1.manufacturer_id  =  t2.manufacturer_id GROUP BY t1.manufacturer_id

question: List all manufacturer names and ids ordered by their opening year.
original_query: SELECT name ,  manufacturer_id FROM manufacturer ORDER BY open_year

question: Give me the name and year of opening of the manufacturers that have either less than 10 factories or more than 10 shops.
original_query: SELECT name ,  open_year FROM manufacturer WHERE num_of_shops  >  10 OR Num_of_Factories  <  10

question: Return the name and id of the furniture with the highest market rate.
original_query: SELECT name ,  furniture_id FROM furniture ORDER BY market_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the component amounts and names of all furnitures that have more than 10 components.
original_query: SELECT Num_of_Component ,  name FROM furniture WHERE Num_of_Component  >  10

question: How many furniture components are there in total?
original_query: SELECT sum(num_of_component) FROM furniture

question: Which manufacturer has the most number of shops? List its name and year of opening.
original_query: SELECT open_year ,  name FROM manufacturer ORDER BY num_of_shops DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the season, the player, and the name of the country that player belongs to.
original_query: SELECT T2.Season ,  T2.Player ,  T1.Country_name FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country

question: How many countries are there in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM country

question: What are all the players who played in match season, sorted by college in ascending alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT player FROM match_season ORDER BY College ASC

question: Show the positions of the players from the team with name "Ryley Goldner".
original_query: SELECT T1.Position FROM match_season AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.Team  =  T2.Team_id WHERE T2.Name  =  "Ryley Goldner"

question: Return the positions of players on the team Ryley Goldner.
original_query: SELECT T1.Position FROM match_season AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.Team  =  T2.Team_id WHERE T2.Name  =  "Ryley Goldner"

question: Show all official native languages that contain the word "English".
original_query: SELECT Official_native_language FROM country WHERE Official_native_language LIKE "%English%"

question: Show the top 3 most common colleges of players in match seasons.
original_query: SELECT College FROM match_season GROUP BY College ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names and capitals of each country?
original_query: SELECT Country_name ,  Capital FROM country

question: What are the names of teams that do no have match season record?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM team WHERE Team_id NOT IN (SELECT Team FROM match_season)

question: How many distinct official languages are there among countries of players whose positions are defenders.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.Official_native_language) FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.Position  =  "Defender"

question: What are the different positions for match season?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT POSITION FROM match_season

question: What are the names of all teams?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Team

question: Show all team names.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Team

question: Show the name of colleges that have at least two players.
original_query: SELECT College FROM match_season GROUP BY College HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the most common position of players in match seasons.
original_query: SELECT POSITION FROM match_season GROUP BY POSITION ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return all players sorted by college in ascending alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT player FROM match_season ORDER BY College ASC

question: Count the number of different colleges that players who play for Columbus Crew are from.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.College) FROM match_season AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.Team  =  T2.Team_id WHERE T2.Name  =  "Columbus Crew"

question: Which college have both players with position midfielder and players with position defender?
original_query: SELECT College FROM match_season WHERE POSITION  =  "Midfielder" INTERSECT SELECT College FROM match_season WHERE POSITION  =  "Defender"

question: Return the names of teams that have no match season record.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM team WHERE Team_id NOT IN (SELECT Team FROM match_season)

question: How many distinct colleges are associated with players from the team with name "Columbus Crew".
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.College) FROM match_season AS T1 JOIN team AS T2 ON T1.Team  =  T2.Team_id WHERE T2.Name  =  "Columbus Crew"

question: Give the different positions of players who play for the country with the capital Dublin.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Position FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Capital  =  "Dublin"

question: Show the draft pick numbers and draft classes of players whose positions are defenders.
original_query: SELECT Draft_Pick_Number ,  Draft_Class FROM match_season WHERE POSITION  =  "Defender"

question: Show the country names and the corresponding number of players.
original_query: SELECT Country_name ,  COUNT(*) FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Country_name

question: What are the names of all colleges that have two or more players?
original_query: SELECT College FROM match_season GROUP BY College HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the distinct position of players from college UCLA or Duke.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT POSITION FROM match_season WHERE College  =  "UCLA" OR College  =  "Duke"

question: Return the official native languages of countries who have players from Maryland or Duke colleges.
original_query: SELECT T1.Official_native_language FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T2.College  =  "Maryland" OR T2.College  =  "Duke"

question: Show the players from college UCLA.
original_query: SELECT Player FROM match_season WHERE College  =  "UCLA"

question: Show the players and the years played.
original_query: SELECT Player ,  Years_Played FROM player

question: Who are the players from Indonesia?
original_query: SELECT T2.Player FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country WHERE T1.Country_name  =  "Indonesia"

question: How many medicines are offered by each trade name?
original_query: SELECT trade_name ,  count(*) FROM medicine GROUP BY trade_name

question: How many enzymes do not have any interactions?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM enzyme WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT enzyme_id FROM medicine_enzyme_interaction );

question: What is the maximum Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man (OMIM) value of the enzymes?
original_query: SELECT max(OMIM) FROM enzyme

question: What is the count of enzymes without any interactions?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM enzyme WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT enzyme_id FROM medicine_enzyme_interaction );

question: What is the interaction type of the enzyme named 'ALA synthase' and the medicine named 'Aripiprazole'?
original_query: SELECT T1.interaction_type FROM medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T1 JOIN medicine AS T2 ON T1.medicine_id  =  T2.id JOIN enzyme AS T3 ON T1.enzyme_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.name  =  'ALA synthase' AND T2.name  =  'Aripiprazole'

question: How many different FDA approval statuses exist for medicines?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT FDA_approved) FROM medicine

question: What are the different names, locations, and products of the enzymes that are capable inhibitor interactions?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.location ,  T1.product FROM enzyme AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.enzyme_id  =  T1.id WHERE T2.interaction_type  =  'inhibitor'

question: What are the ids and trade names of the medicine that can interact with at least 3 enzymes?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.trade_name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T1.id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3

question: What are the ids and names of the medicine that can interact with two or more enzymes?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.Name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T1.id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the medicine names and trade names that cannot interact with the enzyme with product 'Heme'.
original_query: SELECT name ,  trade_name FROM medicine EXCEPT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.trade_name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T1.id JOIN enzyme AS T3 ON T3.id  =  T2.enzyme_id WHERE T3.product  =  'Protoporphyrinogen IX'

question: What is the id and name of the enzyme with most number of medicines that can interact as 'activator'?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM enzyme AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.enzyme_id WHERE T2.interaction_type  =  'activitor' GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the enzymes used in the medicine  Amisulpride that acts as inhibitors?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM enzyme AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.enzyme_id JOIN medicine AS T3 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T3.id WHERE T3.name  =  'Amisulpride' AND T2.interaction_type  =  'inhibitor'

question: How many distinct FDA approval statuses are there for the medicines?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT FDA_approved) FROM medicine

question: What are the distinct name, location and products of the enzymes which has any 'inhibitor' interaction?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name ,  T1.location ,  T1.product FROM enzyme AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.enzyme_id  =  T1.id WHERE T2.interaction_type  =  'inhibitor'

question: What are the names of enzymes in descending order?
original_query: SELECT name FROM enzyme ORDER BY name DESC

question: List the names and the locations that the enzymes can make an effect.
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION FROM enzyme

question: What are the names and locations of all enzymes listed?
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION FROM enzyme

question: How many medicines were not approved by the FDA?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM medicine WHERE FDA_approved  =  'No'

question: For every medicine id, what are the names of the medicines that can interact with more than one enzyme?
original_query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.Name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T1.id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are the medicine and trade names that cannot interact with the enzyme with the product 'Heme'?
original_query: SELECT name ,  trade_name FROM medicine EXCEPT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.trade_name FROM medicine AS T1 JOIN medicine_enzyme_interaction AS T2 ON T2.medicine_id  =  T1.id JOIN enzyme AS T3 ON T3.id  =  T2.enzyme_id WHERE T3.product  =  'Protoporphyrinogen IX'

question: What is the maximum OMIM value in the database?
original_query: SELECT max(OMIM) FROM enzyme

question: What are the names of enzymes whose product is not 'Heme'?
original_query: SELECT name FROM enzyme WHERE product != 'Heme'

question: What are the maximum and average height of the mountains?
original_query: SELECT max(height) ,  avg(height) FROM mountain

question: List the camera lens names containing substring "Digital".
original_query: SELECT name FROM camera_lens WHERE name LIKE "%Digital%"

question: What are the average prominence of the mountains in country 'Morocco'?
original_query: SELECT avg(prominence) FROM mountain WHERE country  =  'Morocco'

question: List the id, color scheme, and name for all the photos.
original_query: SELECT id ,  color ,  name FROM photos

question: What is the name of each camera lens and the number of photos taken by it? Order the result by the count of photos.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  count(*) FROM camera_lens AS T1 JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.camera_lens_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*)

question: What are the names of photos taken with the lens brand 'Sigma' or 'Olympus'?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM camera_lens AS T1 JOIN photos AS T2 ON T2.camera_lens_id  =  T1.id WHERE T1.brand  =  'Sigma' OR T1.brand  =  'Olympus'

question: How many distinct kinds of camera lenses are used to take photos of mountains in the country 'Ethiopia'?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.camera_lens_id) FROM mountain AS T1 JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.mountain_id WHERE T1.country  =  'Ethiopia'

question: What are the name, height and prominence of mountains which do not belong to the range 'Aberdare Range'?
original_query: SELECT name ,  height ,  prominence FROM mountain WHERE range != 'Aberdare Range'

question: How many different kinds of lens brands are there?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT brand) FROM camera_lens

question: How many reviewers listed?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Reviewer

question: What are the names of reviewers who had rated 3 star and 4 star?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  =  3 INTERSECT SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  =  4

question: Who is the director of movie Avatar?
original_query: SELECT director FROM Movie WHERE title  = 'Avatar'

question: What is the names of movies whose created year is after all movies directed by Steven Spielberg?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE YEAR  >  (SELECT max(YEAR) FROM Movie WHERE director  =  "Steven Spielberg")

question: How many reviewers are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Reviewer

question: What are the names of all directors whose movies have been reviewed by Sarah Martinez?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.director FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID JOIN Reviewer AS T3 ON T1.rID  =  T3.rID WHERE T3.name  =  'Sarah Martinez'

question: For each movie that received more than 3 reviews, what is the average rating?
original_query: SELECT mID ,  avg(stars) FROM Rating GROUP BY mID HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What are names of the movies that are either made after 2000 or reviewed by Brittany Harris?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID JOIN Reviewer AS T3 ON T1.rID  =  T3.rID WHERE T3.name  =  'Brittany Harris' OR T2.year  >  2000

question: What are the names of all reviewers that have given 3 or 4 stars for reviews?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  =  3 INTERSECT SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T1.stars  =  4

question: What is highest rating for the most recent movie and when was it released?
original_query: SELECT max(T1.stars) ,  T2.year FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T2.year  =  (SELECT max(YEAR) FROM Movie)

question: What are the titles and directors of the movies whose star is greater than the average stars of the movies directed by James Cameron?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T2.director FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T1.stars  >  (SELECT avg(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T2.director  =  "James Cameron")

question: For all directors who directed more than one movie, return the titles of all movies directed by them, along with the director name. Sort by director name, then movie title.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.director FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.director  =  T2.director WHERE T1.title != T2.title ORDER BY T1.director ,  T1.title

question: What are the names and years of the movies that has the top 3 highest rating star?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T2.year FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID ORDER BY T1.stars DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the titles of all movies that have no ratings.
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE mID NOT IN (SELECT mID FROM Rating)

question: Find the names of all reviewers who have contributed three or more ratings.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID GROUP BY T1.rID HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  3

question: What are the ids of all moviest hat have not been reviewed by Britanny Harris?
original_query: SELECT mID FROM Rating EXCEPT SELECT T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T2.name  =  "Brittany Harris"

question: Find the title and star rating of the movie that got the least rating star for each reviewer.
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T1.rID ,  T1.stars ,  min(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.rID

question: What are the names of the directors who made exactly one movie excluding director NULL?
original_query: SELECT director FROM Movie WHERE director != "null" GROUP BY director HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: What is the average number of stars that each reviewer awards for a movie?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  avg(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID GROUP BY T2.name

question: What are the names of all directors who made one movie?
original_query: SELECT director FROM Movie GROUP BY director HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: What is the name of the movie produced after 2000 and directed by James Cameron?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director = 'James Cameron' AND YEAR  >  2000

question: What are the titles of all movies that were not reviewed by Chris Jackson?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT title FROM Movie EXCEPT SELECT T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID JOIN Reviewer AS T3 ON T1.rID  =  T3.rID WHERE T3.name  =  'Chris Jackson'

question: What are the titles of all movies that James Cameron directed after 2000?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director = 'James Cameron' AND YEAR  >  2000

question: Find the titles of all movies directed by steven spielberg.
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director = 'Steven Spielberg'

question: What is the name of the movie that has been reviewed the most?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.mID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the id of the reviewer whose name includes the word "Mike"?
original_query: SELECT rID FROM Reviewer WHERE name LIKE "%Mike%"

question: For each director, return the director's name together with the title of the movie they directed that received the highest rating among all of their movies, and the value of that rating. Ignore movies whose director is NULL.
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T1.stars ,  T2.director ,  max(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE director != "null" GROUP BY director

question: Return reviewer name, movie title, stars, and ratingDate. And sort the data first by reviewer name, then by movie title, and lastly by number of stars.
original_query: SELECT T3.name ,  T2.title ,  T1.stars ,  T1.ratingDate FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID JOIN Reviewer AS T3 ON T1.rID  =  T3.rID ORDER BY T3.name ,  T2.title ,  T1.stars

question: For each director, what are the titles and ratings for all the movies they reviewed?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T1.stars ,  T2.director ,  max(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE director != "null" GROUP BY director

question: For each director, how many reviews have they received?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.director FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Rating AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.director

question: What is the total number of ratings that has more than 3 stars?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Rating WHERE stars  >  3

question: What is the average rating stars and title for the oldest movie?
original_query: SELECT avg(T1.stars) ,  T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T2.year  =  (SELECT min(YEAR) FROM Movie)

question: How many movies were made before 2000?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Movie WHERE YEAR  <  2000

question: Return all reviewer names and movie names together in a single list.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Reviewer UNION SELECT title FROM Movie

question: What are names of the movies that are either made before 1980 or directed by James Cameron?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Movie WHERE director  =  "James Cameron" OR YEAR   <  1980

question: What are the names of all the reviewers and movie names?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Reviewer UNION SELECT title FROM Movie

question: What are the names of all movies that received 3 or 4 stars?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T1.stars  =  3 INTERSECT SELECT T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T1.stars  =  4

question: What is the lowest and highest rating star?
original_query: SELECT max(stars) ,  min(stars) FROM Rating

question: What are the ids of all reviewers who have not given 4 stars at least once?
original_query: SELECT rID FROM Rating WHERE stars != 4

question: What is the reviewer name, film title, movie rating, and rating date  for every movie ordered by reviewer name, movie title, then finally rating?
original_query: SELECT T3.name ,  T2.title ,  T1.stars ,  T1.ratingDate FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID JOIN Reviewer AS T3 ON T1.rID  =  T3.rID ORDER BY T3.name ,  T2.title ,  T1.stars

question: What is the average rating for each movie that has never been reviewed by Brittany Harris?
original_query: SELECT mID ,  avg(stars) FROM Rating WHERE mID NOT IN (SELECT T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Reviewer AS T2 ON T1.rID  =  T2.rID WHERE T2.name  =  "Brittany Harris") GROUP BY mID

question: What are the movie titles with the highest average rating and what are those ratings?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  avg(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.mID ORDER BY avg(T1.stars) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles of all movies that have between 3 and 5 stars?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T1.stars BETWEEN 3 AND 5

question: What is the name of the movie that is rated by most of times?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T1.mID FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.mID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For directors who had more than one movie, return the titles and produced years of all movies directed by them.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.year FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.director  =  T2.director WHERE T1.title != T2.title

question: In what years did a movie receive a 4 or 5 star rating, and list the years from oldest to most recently?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT YEAR FROM Movie AS T1 JOIN Rating AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID WHERE T2.stars  >=  4 ORDER BY T1.year

question: What is the id of the reviewer whose name has substring “Mike”?
original_query: SELECT rID FROM Reviewer WHERE name LIKE "%Mike%"

question: What is the id of the reviewer named Daniel Lewis?
original_query: SELECT rID FROM Reviewer WHERE name  =  "Daniel Lewis"

question: Find the movies with the highest average rating. Return the movie titles and average rating.
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  avg(T1.stars) FROM Rating AS T1 JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.mID  =  T2.mID GROUP BY T1.mID ORDER BY avg(T1.stars) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different movies are playing?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.code) FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie

question: Find the name of the theater that is playing the most number of movies.
original_query: SELECT name FROM movietheaters GROUP BY name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles of all the movies that played at the Odeon or Imperial theater?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon' OR T2.name  =  'Imperial'

question: Find the rating of the movie whose name includes the word ‘Citizen’.
original_query: SELECT rating FROM movies WHERE title LIKE '%Citizen%'

question: Find the number of movies in each rating.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  rating FROM movies GROUP BY rating

question: What are the movie titles for ones that are played in the Odeon theater?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon'

question: What are the different movie ratings?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT rating FROM movies

question: How many different movie theaters exist?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT name) FROM movietheaters

question: What are the names of theaters playing 'G' rated movies?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T1.rating  =  'G'

question: What movie is playing at both the Odeon and Imperial theater?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon' INTERSECT SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Imperial'

question: How many distinct movies are on in theaters?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T1.code) FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie

question: Find the titles of movies that don’t have any rating.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'null'

question: What is all the information about the unrated movies?
original_query: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'null'

question: Find the name of the movie theaters that are playing the movies whose rating is ‘G’.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T1.rating  =  'G'

question: What are the names of every movie that is not playing at the Odeon theater?
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies EXCEPT SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon'

question: What is the rating of the movie what has a name including a word like 'Citizen'?
original_query: SELECT rating FROM movies WHERE title LIKE '%Citizen%'

question: Show all information of all unrated movies.
original_query: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'null'

question: Find the number of movies whose rating is ‘G’.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'G'

question: Find the title of the movie that is played in the Odeon theater.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon'

question: How many movies are playing across all theaters?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie

question: What are the names of the movies that are played in any theater and the name of the corresponding theater?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T2.name FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie

question: Find the name of all movies that are not played in Odeon theater.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies EXCEPT SELECT T1.title FROM movies AS T1 JOIN movietheaters AS T2 ON T1.code  =  T2.movie WHERE T2.name  =  'Odeon'

question: What are names of movies that have a 'G' ratings?
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'G'

question: Select the name of all movie theaters that are not currently showing a movie.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM MovieTheaters WHERE Movie  =  'null'

question: Find the names of movies whose rating is ‘G’.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'G'

question: What are the names of the movie theaters that are playing 'G' or 'PG' rated movies?
original_query: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE rating  =  'G' OR rating  =  'PG'

question: Find the name and age of the visitor who bought the most tickets at once.
original_query: SELECT t1.name ,  t1.age FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id ORDER BY t2.num_of_ticket DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the id and name of the museum visited most times?
original_query: SELECT t2.Museum_ID ,  t1.name FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID GROUP BY t2.Museum_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: find the names of museums which have more staff than the minimum staff number of all museums opened after 2010.
original_query: SELECT name FROM museum WHERE num_of_staff  >  (SELECT min(num_of_staff) FROM museum WHERE open_year  >  2010)

question: Find the id and name of the museum that has the most staff members?
original_query: SELECT museum_id ,  name FROM museum ORDER BY num_of_staff DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many museums were opened after 2013 or before 2008?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM museum WHERE open_year  >  2013 OR open_year  <  2008

question: Find the name and membership level of the visitors whose membership level is higher than 4, and sort by their age from old to young.
original_query: SELECT name ,  Level_of_membership FROM visitor WHERE Level_of_membership  >  4 ORDER BY age DESC

question: What is the name of the museum that had no visitor yet?
original_query: SELECT name FROM museum WHERE Museum_ID NOT IN (SELECT museum_id FROM visit)

question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
original_query: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1

question: What is the average age of the visitors whose membership level is not higher than 4?
original_query: SELECT avg(age) FROM visitor WHERE Level_of_membership  <=  4

question: What is the id of the files that are available in the format of mp4 and a resolution smaller than 1000?
original_query: SELECT f_id FROM files WHERE formats  =  "mp4" INTERSECT SELECT f_id FROM song WHERE resolution  <  1000

question: List the duration, file size and format of songs whose genre is pop, ordered by title?
original_query: SELECT T1.duration ,  T1.file_size ,  T1.formats FROM files AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.f_id  =  T2.f_id WHERE T2.genre_is  =  "pop" ORDER BY T2.song_name

question: What are the names and countries of origin for the artists who produced the top three highly rated songs.
original_query: SELECT T1.artist_name ,  T1.country FROM artist AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.artist_name  =  T2.artist_name ORDER BY T2.rating DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names of the different artists from Bangladesh who never received a rating higher than a 7?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT artist_name FROM artist WHERE country  =  "Bangladesh" EXCEPT SELECT DISTINCT artist_name FROM song WHERE rating  >  7

question: What are the names of the different artists that have produced a song in English but have never receieved a rating higher than 8?
