question: What are the names of people who do not play poker?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE People_ID NOT IN (SELECT People_ID FROM poker_player)

question: Show names of people whose nationality is not "Russia".
original_query: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE Nationality != "Russia"

question: What are the names and birth dates of people, ordered by their names in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Birth_Date FROM people ORDER BY Name ASC

question: List the names of poker players ordered by the final tables made in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Final_Table_Made

question: Find the entry name of the catalog with the highest price (in USD).
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents ORDER BY price_in_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the name and publication date of the catalogs with catalog level number above 5?
original_query: SELECT t1.catalog_name ,  t1.date_of_publication FROM catalogs AS t1 JOIN catalog_structure AS t2 ON t1.catalog_id  =  t2.catalog_id WHERE catalog_level_number  >  5

question: Find the names of all the products whose stock number starts with "2".
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE product_stock_number LIKE "2%"

question: Find the name of the product that has the smallest capacity.
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents ORDER BY capacity ASC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the average and minimum price (in Euro) of the products.
original_query: SELECT avg(price_in_euros) ,  min(price_in_euros) FROM catalog_contents

question: What are the catalog entry names of the products with next entry ID above 8?
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE next_entry_id  >  8

question: Find the names and publication dates of all catalogs that have catalog level number greater than 5.
original_query: SELECT t1.catalog_name ,  t1.date_of_publication FROM catalogs AS t1 JOIN catalog_structure AS t2 ON t1.catalog_id  =  t2.catalog_id WHERE catalog_level_number  >  5

question: What are the name and level of catalog structure with level number between 5 and 10
original_query: SELECT catalog_level_name ,  catalog_level_number FROM Catalog_Structure WHERE catalog_level_number BETWEEN 5 AND 10

question: Which catalog contents have a product stock number that starts from "2"? Show the catalog entry names.
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE product_stock_number LIKE "2%"

question: Name all the products with next entry ID greater than 8.
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name FROM catalog_contents WHERE next_entry_id  >  8

question: Find the entry names of the catalog with the attribute that have the most entries.
original_query: SELECT t1.catalog_entry_name FROM Catalog_Contents AS t1 JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.catalog_entry_id  =  t2.catalog_entry_id WHERE t2.attribute_value  =  (SELECT attribute_value FROM Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes GROUP BY attribute_value ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Find the catalog publisher that has the most catalogs.
original_query: SELECT catalog_publisher FROM catalogs GROUP BY catalog_publisher ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the attribute data types with more than 3 attribute definitions?
original_query: SELECT attribute_data_type FROM Attribute_Definitions GROUP BY attribute_data_type HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: Find the names of catalog entries with level number 8.
original_query: SELECT t1.catalog_entry_name FROM Catalog_Contents AS t1 JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.catalog_entry_id  =  t2.catalog_entry_id WHERE t2.catalog_level_number  =  "8"

question: How many products are there in the records?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM catalog_contents

question: What is the attribute data type of the attribute with name "Green"?
original_query: SELECT attribute_data_type FROM Attribute_Definitions WHERE attribute_name  =  "Green"

question: Find all the catalog publishers whose name contains "Murray"
original_query: SELECT distinct(catalog_publisher) FROM catalogs WHERE catalog_publisher LIKE "%Murray%"

question: Find the list of attribute data types possessed by more than 3 attribute definitions.
original_query: SELECT attribute_data_type FROM Attribute_Definitions GROUP BY attribute_data_type HAVING count(*)  >  3

question: What are the entry names of catalog with the attribute possessed by most entries.
original_query: SELECT t1.catalog_entry_name FROM Catalog_Contents AS t1 JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.catalog_entry_id  =  t2.catalog_entry_id WHERE t2.attribute_value  =  (SELECT attribute_value FROM Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes GROUP BY attribute_value ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

question: Which catalog contents has price above 700 dollars? Show their catalog entry names and capacities.
original_query: SELECT catalog_entry_name ,  capacity FROM Catalog_Contents WHERE price_in_dollars  >  700

question: Find the dates on which more than one revisions were made.
original_query: SELECT date_of_latest_revision FROM Catalogs GROUP BY date_of_latest_revision HAVING count(*)  >  1

question: What are the coupon amount of the coupons owned by both good and bad customers?
original_query: SELECT T1.coupon_amount FROM Discount_Coupons AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.coupon_id  =  T2.coupon_id WHERE T2.good_or_bad_customer  =  'good' INTERSECT SELECT T1.coupon_amount FROM Discount_Coupons AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.coupon_id  =  T2.coupon_id WHERE T2.good_or_bad_customer  =  'bad'

question: What are the daily hire costs for the products with substring 'Book' in its name?
original_query: SELECT daily_hire_cost FROM Products_for_hire WHERE product_name LIKE '%Book%'

question: What are all the distinct payment types?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT payment_type_code FROM payments

question: Are the customers holding coupons with amount 500 bad or good?
original_query: SELECT T1.good_or_bad_customer FROM customers AS T1 JOIN discount_coupons AS T2 ON T1.coupon_id  =  T2.coupon_id WHERE T2.coupon_amount  =  500

question: What are the names of products whose availability equals to 1?
original_query: SELECT T2.product_name FROM view_product_availability AS T1 JOIN products_for_hire AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id WHERE T1.available_yn  =  1

question: What are the id and the amount of refund of the booking that incurred the most times of payments?
original_query: SELECT T1.booking_id ,  T1.amount_of_refund FROM Bookings AS T1 JOIN Payments AS T2 ON T1.booking_id  =  T2.booking_id GROUP BY T1.booking_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many products are never booked with amount higher than 200?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Products_for_hire WHERE product_id NOT IN ( SELECT product_id FROM products_booked WHERE booked_amount  >  200 )

question: What are the maximum, minimum, and average booked count for the products booked?
original_query: SELECT max(booked_count) ,  min(booked_count) ,  avg(booked_count) FROM products_booked

question: What is the average amount due for all the payments?
original_query: SELECT avg(amount_due) FROM payments

question: What is the color code and description of the product named "chervil"?
original_query: SELECT t1.color_code ,  t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "chervil"

question: Find the name of the products that have the color description "red" and have the characteristic name "fast".
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id JOIN ref_colors AS t4 ON t1.color_code  =  t4.color_code WHERE t4.color_description  =  "red" AND t3.characteristic_name  =  "fast"

question: List all the characteristic names and data types of product "cumin".
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name ,  t3.characteristic_data_type FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "cumin"

question: What are the descriptions for each color?
original_query: SELECT color_description FROM ref_colors

question: Which category does the product named "flax" belong to?
original_query: SELECT product_category_code FROM products WHERE product_name  =  "flax"

question: What is the description of the color for most products?
original_query: SELECT t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code GROUP BY t2.color_description ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many products have the color description 'red' and the characteristic name 'slow'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id JOIN ref_colors AS t4 ON t1.color_code  =  t4.color_code WHERE t4.color_description  =  "red" AND t3.characteristic_name  =  "slow"

question: Give the unit of measure for the product with the name 'cumin'.
original_query: SELECT t2.unit_of_measure FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_product_categories AS t2 ON t1.product_category_code  =  t2.product_category_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "cumin"

question: How many colors are never used by any product?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Ref_colors WHERE color_code NOT IN ( SELECT color_code FROM products )

question: Find the product names that are colored 'white' but do not have unit of measurement "Handful".
original_query: SELECT t1.product_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_product_categories AS t2 ON t1.product_category_code  =  t2.product_category_code JOIN ref_colors AS t3 ON t1.color_code  =  t3.color_code WHERE t3.color_description  =  "white" AND t2.unit_of_measure != "Handful"

question: Find the names of all the product characteristics.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT characteristic_name FROM CHARACTERISTICS

question: How many products have their color described as 'white' or have a characteristic with the name 'hot'?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id JOIN ref_colors AS t4 ON t1.color_code  =  t4.color_code WHERE t4.color_description  =  "white" OR t3.characteristic_name  =  "hot"

question: Count the number of colors that are not used in any products.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Ref_colors WHERE color_code NOT IN ( SELECT color_code FROM products )

question: Find the category descriptions of the products whose descriptions include letter 't'.
original_query: SELECT T1.product_category_description FROM ref_product_categories AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.product_category_code  =  T2.product_category_code WHERE T2.product_description LIKE '%t%'

question: What are the names and data types of the characteristics of the 'cumin' product?
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name ,  t3.characteristic_data_type FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "cumin"

question: What is the characteristic name used by most number of the products?
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id GROUP BY t3.characteristic_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of products with category "Spices"?
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM products WHERE product_category_code  =  "Spices"

question: Find the id and color description of the products with at least 2 characteristics.
original_query: SELECT t1.product_id ,  t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code JOIN product_characteristics AS t3 ON t1.product_id  =  t3.product_id GROUP BY t1.product_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: How many products are in the 'Spices' category and have a typical price of over 1000?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products WHERE product_category_code  =  "Spices" AND typical_buying_price  >  1000

question: Return the characteristic names of the 'sesame' product.
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "sesame"

question: How many characteristics does the product named "sesame" have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "sesame"

question: What are the names of the characteristics of the product 'sesame' that have the characteristic type code 'Grade'?
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "sesame" AND t3.characteristic_type_code  =  "Grade"

question: How many products have the characteristic named "hot"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t3.characteristic_name  =  "hot"

question: Count the number of characteristics.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM CHARACTERISTICS

question: What are the different names of the product characteristics?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT characteristic_name FROM CHARACTERISTICS

question: Count the number of characteristics of the 'flax' product.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "flax"

question: Return the category code and typical price of 'cumin'.
original_query: SELECT product_category_code ,  typical_buying_price FROM products WHERE product_name  =  "cumin"

question: Return the description and unit of measurement for products in the 'Herbs' category.
original_query: SELECT product_category_description ,  unit_of_measure FROM ref_product_categories WHERE product_category_code  =  "Herbs"

question: Return the color code and description for the product with the name 'chervil'.
original_query: SELECT t1.color_code ,  t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "chervil"

question: Find the number of characteristics that the product "flax" has.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "flax"

question: Find the product category description of the product category with code "Spices".
original_query: SELECT product_category_description FROM ref_product_categories WHERE product_category_code  =  "Spices"

question: Return the names and typical buying and selling prices for products that have 'yellow' as their color description.
original_query: SELECT t1.product_name ,  t1.typical_buying_price ,  t1.typical_selling_price FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t2.color_description  =  "yellow"

question: What are the names of the products that have a color description of 'red' and the 'fast' characteristic?
original_query: SELECT product_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id JOIN ref_colors AS t4 ON t1.color_code  =  t4.color_code WHERE t4.color_description  =  "red" AND t3.characteristic_name  =  "fast"

question: Return the unit of measure for 'Herb' products.
original_query: SELECT unit_of_measure FROM ref_product_categories WHERE product_category_code  =  "Herbs"

question: Give the names, details, and data types of characteristics that are not found in any product.
original_query: SELECT characteristic_name ,  other_characteristic_details ,  characteristic_data_type FROM CHARACTERISTICS EXCEPT SELECT t1.characteristic_name ,  t1.other_characteristic_details ,  t1.characteristic_data_type FROM CHARACTERISTICS AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.characteristic_id  =  t2.characteristic_id

question: Count the number of products.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products

question: Count the number of products in the category 'Seeds'.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products WHERE product_category_code  =  "Seeds"

question: Return the name of the characteristic that is most common across all products.
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id GROUP BY t3.characteristic_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the characteristic names of product "sesame"?
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id WHERE t1.product_name  =  "sesame"

question: Find the number of products with category "Spices" and typically sold above 1000.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM products WHERE product_category_code  =  "Spices" AND typical_buying_price  >  1000

question: Give the names of characteristics that are in two or more products?
original_query: SELECT t3.characteristic_name FROM products AS t1 JOIN product_characteristics AS t2 ON t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id JOIN CHARACTERISTICS AS t3 ON t2.characteristic_id  =  t3.characteristic_id GROUP BY t3.characteristic_name HAVING count(*)  >= 2

question: What is the color description of the product with name "catnip"?
original_query: SELECT t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code WHERE t1.product_name  =  "catnip"

question: Give the color description that is least common across products.
original_query: SELECT t2.color_description FROM products AS t1 JOIN ref_colors AS t2 ON t1.color_code  =  t2.color_code GROUP BY t2.color_description ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: find the names of programs whose origin is not in Beijing.
original_query: SELECT name FROM program WHERE origin != 'Beijing'

question: Who are the owners of the programs that broadcast both in the morning and at night?
original_query: SELECT t1.owner FROM program AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.program_id  =  t2.program_id WHERE t2.Time_of_day  =  "Morning" INTERSECT SELECT t1.owner FROM program AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.program_id  =  t2.program_id WHERE t2.Time_of_day  =  "Night"

question: Give me a list of all the channel names sorted by the channel rating in descending order.
original_query: SELECT name FROM channel ORDER BY rating_in_percent DESC

question: Find the names of channels that are not owned by CCTV.
original_query: SELECT name FROM channel WHERE OWNER != 'CCTV'

question: Count the number of distinct channel owners.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT OWNER) FROM channel

question: What is the list of program origins ordered alphabetically?
original_query: SELECT origin FROM program ORDER BY origin

question: Which program was launched most recently? Return the program name.
original_query: SELECT name FROM program ORDER BY launch DESC LIMIT 1

question: how many programs are broadcast in each time section of the day?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  time_of_day FROM broadcast GROUP BY time_of_day

question: Find the names of the channels that are broadcast in the morning.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Morning'

question: List all channel names ordered by their rating in percent from big to small.
original_query: SELECT name FROM channel ORDER BY rating_in_percent DESC

question: Find the name of the program that is broadcast most frequently.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM program AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.program_id  =  t2.program_id GROUP BY t2.program_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: what are the names of the channels that broadcast in both morning and night?
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Morning' INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Night'

question: Which channels broadcast both in the morning and at night? Give me the channel names.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Morning' INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Night'

question: find the total percentage share of all channels owned by CCTV.
original_query: SELECT sum(Share_in_percent) FROM channel WHERE OWNER  =  'CCTV'

question: Which channels are broadcast in the morning? Give me the channel names.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM channel AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.channel_id  =  t2.channel_id WHERE t2.time_of_day  =  'Morning'

question: List the names of all the channels owned by either CCTV or HBS
original_query: SELECT name FROM channel WHERE OWNER  =  'CCTV' OR OWNER  =  'HBS'

question: What is the owner of the channel that has the highest rating ratio?
original_query: SELECT OWNER FROM channel ORDER BY rating_in_percent DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the names of programs that are never broadcasted in the morning.
original_query: SELECT name FROM program EXCEPT SELECT t1.name FROM program AS t1 JOIN broadcast AS t2 ON t1.program_id  =  t2.program_id WHERE t2.Time_of_day  =  "Morning"

question: how many programs are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM program

question: list all the names of programs, ordering by launch time.
original_query: SELECT name FROM program ORDER BY launch

question: For each building, show the name of the building and the number of institutions in it.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  count(*) FROM building AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.building_id  =  T2.building_id GROUP BY T1.building_id

question: How many buildings are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM building

question: Show the name of buildings that do not have any institution.
original_query: SELECT name FROM building WHERE building_id NOT IN (SELECT building_id FROM institution)

question: Show the names of buildings except for those having an institution founded in 2003.
original_query: SELECT name FROM building EXCEPT SELECT T1.name FROM building AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.building_id  =  T2.building_id WHERE T2.founded  =  2003

question: Show all the distinct institution types.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT TYPE FROM institution

question: Show the names and heights of buildings with at least two institutions founded after 1880.
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.height_feet FROM building AS T1 JOIN institution AS T2 ON T1.building_id  =  T2.building_id WHERE T2.founded  >  1880 GROUP BY T1.building_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: How many proteins are associated with an institution founded after 1880 or an institution with type "Private"?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM institution AS T1 JOIN protein AS T2 ON T1.institution_id  =  T2.institution_id WHERE T1.founded  >  1880 OR T1.type  =  'Private'

question: How many proteins are associated with an institution in a building with at least 20 floors?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM institution AS T1 JOIN protein AS T2 ON T1.institution_id  =  T2.institution_id JOIN building AS T3 ON T3.building_id  =  T1.building_id WHERE T3.floors  >=  20

question: How many institutions do not have an associated protein in our record?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM institution WHERE institution_id NOT IN (SELECT institution_id FROM protein)

question: What is the name of the tallest building?
original_query: SELECT name FROM building ORDER BY height_feet DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and seatings for all tracks opened after 2000, ordered by seating?
original_query: SELECT name ,  seating FROM track WHERE year_opened  >  2000 ORDER BY seating

question: What are the names of different tracks, and how many races has each had?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  count(*) FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id

question: How many tracks do we have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM track

question: How many races are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM race

question: What are the classes of races that have two or more corresponding races?
original_query: SELECT CLASS FROM race GROUP BY CLASS HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show the name and location of track with 1 race.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.location FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: What are the names and locations of tracks that have had exactly 1 race?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T2.location FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id HAVING count(*)  =  1

question: What are the names, classes, and dates for all races?
original_query: SELECT name ,  CLASS ,  date FROM race

question: Show the race class and number of races in each class.
original_query: SELECT CLASS ,  count(*) FROM race GROUP BY CLASS

question: Return the names of tracks that have no had any races.
original_query: SELECT name FROM track WHERE track_id NOT IN (SELECT track_id FROM race)

question: What are the different classes of races, and how many races correspond to each?
original_query: SELECT CLASS ,  count(*) FROM race GROUP BY CLASS

question: Show year where a track with a seating at least 5000 opened and a track with seating no more than 4000 opened.
original_query: SELECT year_opened FROM track WHERE seating BETWEEN 4000 AND 5000

question: What are the locations that have both tracks with more than 90000 seats, and tracks with fewer than 70000 seats?
original_query: SELECT LOCATION FROM track WHERE seating  >  90000 INTERSECT SELECT LOCATION FROM track WHERE seating  <  70000

question: Return the different classes of races.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CLASS FROM race

question: Show the name of track with most number of races.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the minimum, maximum, and average seating across all tracks.
original_query: SELECT min(seating) ,  max(seating) ,  avg(seating) FROM track

question: Show the name, location, open year for all tracks with a seating higher than the average.
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION ,  year_opened FROM track WHERE seating  >  (SELECT avg(seating) FROM track)

question: What are the distinct classes that races can have?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CLASS FROM race

question: What is the name of the track that has had the greatest number of races?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id  =  T2.track_id GROUP BY T1.track_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the name and location for all tracks.
original_query: SELECT name ,  LOCATION FROM track

question: Give the different locations of tracks.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LOCATION FROM track

question: What is the average age for all managers?
original_query: SELECT avg(Age) FROM manager

question: Show different builders of railways, along with the corresponding number of railways using each builder.
original_query: SELECT Builder ,  COUNT(*) FROM railway GROUP BY Builder

question: What is the name of the oldest manager?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM manager ORDER BY Age DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show different locations of railways along with the corresponding number of railways at each location.
original_query: SELECT LOCATION ,  COUNT(*) FROM railway GROUP BY LOCATION

question: Show the working years of managers in descending order of their level.
original_query: SELECT Working_year_starts FROM manager ORDER BY LEVEL DESC

question: List the object number of railways that do not have any trains.
original_query: SELECT ObjectNumber FROM railway WHERE Railway_ID NOT IN (SELECT Railway_ID FROM train)

question: What are the names of managers in ascending order of level?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM manager ORDER BY LEVEL ASC

question: What is the maximum level of managers in countries that are not "Australia"?
original_query: SELECT max(LEVEL) FROM manager WHERE Country != "Australia	"

question: Show the countries that have managers of age above 50 or below 46.
original_query: SELECT Country FROM manager WHERE Age  >  50 OR Age  <  46

question: Show the most common builder of railways.
original_query: SELECT Builder FROM railway GROUP BY Builder ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the countries that have both managers of age above 50 and managers of age below 46.
original_query: SELECT Country FROM manager WHERE Age  >  50 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM manager WHERE Age  <  46

question: What are the names of properties that are either houses or apartments with more than 1 room?
original_query: SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "House" UNION SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "Apartment" AND room_count  >  1

question: What is the feature type name of feature AirCon?
original_query: SELECT T2.feature_type_name FROM Other_Available_Features AS T1 JOIN Ref_Feature_Types AS T2 ON T1.feature_type_code  =  T2.feature_type_code WHERE T1.feature_name  =  "AirCon"

question: What are the user ids of property owners who have property photos, and how many do each of them have?
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_user_id ,  count(*) FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Property_Photos AS T2 ON T1.property_id  =  T2.property_id GROUP BY T1.owner_user_id;

question: Count the number of properties that have 1 parking lot or 1 garage.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Properties WHERE parking_lots  =  1 OR garage_yn  =  1;

question: Return the country in which the user with first name Robbie lives.
original_query: SELECT T1.country FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.user_address_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  'Robbie';

question: What is the lowest room count across all the properties?
original_query: SELECT min(room_count) FROM Properties;

question: What is the average number of rooms in a property?
original_query: SELECT avg(room_count) FROM Properties;

question: What search strings were entered by users who do not own any properties?
original_query: SELECT search_string FROM User_Searches EXCEPT SELECT T1.search_string FROM User_Searches AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.owner_user_id;

question: Give the total max price corresponding to any properties owned by single mothers or students.
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.price_max) FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.owner_user_id  =  T2.user_id WHERE T2.user_category_code  =  'Single Mother' OR T2.user_category_code  =  'Student';

question: Return the date stamp and property name for each property history event, sorted by date stamp.
original_query: SELECT T1.datestamp ,  T2.property_name FROM User_Property_History AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.property_id  =  T2.property_id ORDER BY datestamp;

question: When did the user with login name ratione register?
original_query: SELECT date_registered FROM Users WHERE login_name  =  'ratione';

question: In which states are each of the the properties located?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.county_state_province FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.property_address_id;

question: What is the age range category of the user who made the first search?
original_query: SELECT T1.age_category_code FROM Users AS T1 JOIN User_Searches AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.user_id ORDER BY T2.search_datetime LIMIT 1;

question: Return the zip codes for properties not belonging to users who own two or fewer properties.
original_query: SELECT T1.zip_postcode FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.property_address_id WHERE T2.owner_user_id NOT IN ( SELECT owner_user_id FROM Properties GROUP BY owner_user_id HAVING count(*)  <=  2 );

question: How is the feature rooftop described?
original_query: SELECT feature_description FROM Features WHERE feature_name  =  'rooftop';

question: How many photos does each property have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  property_id FROM Property_Photos GROUP BY property_id;

question: What is the first name of the user who owns the greatest number of properties?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM Users AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T2.owner_user_id  =  T1.User_id GROUP BY T1.User_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: When was the time of the latest search by a user?
original_query: SELECT max(search_datetime) FROM User_Searches;

question: What are the age categories for users whose description contains the string Mother?
original_query: SELECT T2.age_category_code FROM Ref_User_Categories AS T1 JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.user_category_code  =  T2.user_category_code WHERE T1.User_category_description LIKE "%Mother";

question: List the search content of the users who do not own a single property.
original_query: SELECT search_string FROM User_Searches EXCEPT SELECT T1.search_string FROM User_Searches AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.owner_user_id;

question: How many properties have 1 parking lot or 1 garage?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Properties WHERE parking_lots  =  1 OR garage_yn  =  1;

question: Return the description of the feature 'rooftop'.
original_query: SELECT feature_description FROM Features WHERE feature_name  =  'rooftop';

question: How many properties are there with at least 2 features?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Properties GROUP BY property_id HAVING count(*)  >= 2;

question: What are the last names and ids of users who have searched two or fewer times, and own two or more properties?
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name ,  T1.user_id FROM Users AS T1 JOIN User_Searches AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.user_id GROUP BY T1.user_id HAVING count(*)  <=  2 INTERSECT SELECT T3.last_name ,  T3.user_id FROM Users AS T3 JOIN Properties AS T4 ON T3.user_id  =  T4.owner_user_id GROUP BY T3.user_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2;

question: For users whose description contain the string 'Mother', which age categories are they in?
original_query: SELECT T2.age_category_code FROM Ref_User_Categories AS T1 JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.user_category_code  =  T2.user_category_code WHERE T1.User_category_description LIKE "%Mother";

question: How many searches do buyers make in total?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Users AS T1 JOIN User_Searches AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.user_id WHERE T1.is_buyer  =  1;

question: What is the most common property type, and what is its description.
original_query: SELECT T1.property_type_description ,  T1.property_type_code FROM Ref_Property_Types AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.property_type_code  =  T2.property_type_code GROUP BY T1.property_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Count the number of property photos each property has by id.
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  property_id FROM Property_Photos GROUP BY property_id;

question: Count the number of searches made by buyers.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Users AS T1 JOIN User_Searches AS T2 ON T1.user_id  =  T2.user_id WHERE T1.is_buyer  =  1;

question: How many photos does each owner has of his or her properties? List user id and number of photos.
original_query: SELECT T1.owner_user_id ,  count(*) FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Property_Photos AS T2 ON T1.property_id  =  T2.property_id GROUP BY T1.owner_user_id;

question: Where do the Senior Citizens live? List building, street, and the city.
original_query: SELECT T1.line_1_number_building ,  T1.line_2_number_street ,  T1.town_city FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.user_address_id WHERE T2.user_category_code  =  'Senior Citizen';

question: In which cities are there any properties equipped with a swimming pool?
original_query: SELECT T2.town_city FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.property_address_id  =  T2.address_id JOIN Property_Features AS T3 ON T1.property_id  =  T3.property_id JOIN Features AS T4 ON T4.feature_id  =  T3.feature_id WHERE T4.feature_name  =  'swimming pool';

question: What are the zip codes of properties which do not belong to users who own at most 2 properties?
original_query: SELECT T1.zip_postcode FROM Addresses AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.property_address_id WHERE T2.owner_user_id NOT IN ( SELECT owner_user_id FROM Properties GROUP BY owner_user_id HAVING count(*)  <=  2 );

question: Return the first name of the user who owns the most properties.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM Users AS T1 JOIN Properties AS T2 ON T2.owner_user_id  =  T1.User_id GROUP BY T1.User_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the ids of users who have searched at least twice, and what did they search?
original_query: SELECT search_seq ,  user_id FROM User_Searches GROUP BY user_id HAVING count(*) >= 2;

question: Count the number of properties with at least two features.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Properties GROUP BY property_id HAVING count(*)  >= 2;

question: List the average room count of the properties with gardens.
original_query: SELECT avg(T3.room_count) FROM Property_Features AS T1 JOIN Features AS T2 ON T1.feature_id  =  T2.feature_id JOIN Properties AS T3 ON T1.property_id  =  T3.property_id WHERE T2.feature_name  =  'garden';

question: How many kinds of room sizes are listed?
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT room_size) FROM Rooms;

question: List the capital of the region with the largest population.
original_query: SELECT Capital FROM region ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of regions in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM region ORDER BY Name ASC

question: Count the number of buildings.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM building

question: Show the names of regions that have more than one building.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID GROUP BY T1.Region_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: List the addresses of buildings in descending order of building completion year.
original_query: SELECT Address FROM building ORDER BY Completed_Year DESC

question: Show addresses of buildings and the capitals of regions they are in.
original_query: SELECT T1.Address ,  T2.Capital FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID

question: For each building, return the address of the building and the name of the region it belongs to.
original_query: SELECT T1.Address ,  T2.Capital FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID

question: For each building, return the name of the building and the name of the region it belongs to.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Name FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID

question: Among the buildings not completed in 1980, what is the maximum number of stories?
original_query: SELECT max(Number_of_Stories) FROM building WHERE Completed_Year != "1980"

question: Show the completed years of buildings in descending order of the number of stories.
original_query: SELECT Completed_Year FROM building ORDER BY Number_of_Stories DESC

question: Show the names of buildings and the names of regions they are in.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Name FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID

question: Show the capital of the region that has the most buildings.
original_query: SELECT T2.capital FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID GROUP BY T1.Region_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average population for all regions?
original_query: SELECT avg(Population) FROM region

question: Show the distinct addresses of buildings.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Address FROM building

question: Give me a list of distinct building addresses.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Address FROM building

question: Give me the capitals of the regions whose area is larger than 10000.
original_query: SELECT Capital FROM region WHERE Area  >  10000

question: Show the completed years shared by buildings with more than 20 stories and buildings with less than 15 stories.
original_query: SELECT Completed_Year FROM building WHERE Number_of_Stories  >  20 INTERSECT SELECT Completed_Year FROM building WHERE Number_of_Stories  <  15

question: For completion year, return the year and the number of buildings completed.
original_query: SELECT Completed_Year ,  COUNT(*) FROM building GROUP BY Completed_Year

question: Show the number of stories of buildings in the region with name "Abruzzo".
original_query: SELECT T1.Number_of_Stories FROM building AS T1 JOIN region AS T2 ON T1.Region_ID  =  T2.Region_ID WHERE T2.Name  =  "Abruzzo"

question: In which year did the most building constructions complete?
original_query: SELECT Completed_Year FROM building GROUP BY Completed_Year ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the description of the restaurant type Sandwich?
original_query: SELECT ResTypeDescription FROM Restaurant_Type WHERE ResTypeName = "Sandwich";

question: Show me all the restaurants.
original_query: SELECT ResName FROM Restaurant;

question: Which major has least number of students? List the major and the number of students.
original_query: SELECT Major ,  count(*) FROM Student GROUP BY Major ORDER BY count(Major) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: List all students' first names and last names who majored in 600.
original_query: SELECT Fname , Lname FROM Student WHERE Major  =  600;

question: Which Advisor has most of students? List advisor and the number of students.
original_query: SELECT Advisor ,  count(*) FROM Student GROUP BY Advisor ORDER BY count(Advisor) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which city does student Linda Smith live in?
original_query: SELECT city_code FROM Student WHERE Fname = "Linda" AND Lname = "Smith";

question: List all restaurant types.
original_query: SELECT ResTypeName FROM Restaurant_Type;

question: What is the rating of the restaurant Subway?
original_query: SELECT Rating FROM Restaurant WHERE ResName = "Subway";

question: What is the age of student Linda Smith?
original_query: SELECT Age FROM Student WHERE Fname = "Linda" AND Lname = "Smith";

question: Which major has between 2 and 30 number of students? List major and the number of students.
original_query: SELECT Major ,  count(*) FROM Student GROUP BY Major HAVING count(Major) BETWEEN 2 AND 30;

question: At which restaurant did the students spend the least amount of time? List restaurant and the time students spent on in total.
original_query: SELECT Restaurant.ResName ,  sum(Visits_Restaurant.Spent) FROM Visits_Restaurant JOIN Restaurant ON Visits_Restaurant.ResID = Restaurant.ResID GROUP BY Restaurant.ResID ORDER BY sum(Visits_Restaurant.Spent) ASC LIMIT 1;

question: Find the average card credit customers whose membership level is above 1.
original_query: SELECT avg(Card_Credit) FROM customer WHERE Level_of_Membership  >  1

question: What is the total quantities of dishes ordered by each customer ? List the customer name and the total quantity .
original_query: select t1.name ,  sum(t2.quantity) from customer as t1 join customer_order as t2 on t1.customer_id  =  t2.customer_id group by t1.name

question: How many customers are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM customer

question: For each order, return the customer name and the dish name.

question: Show the names of customers and names of dishes they order, in descending order of the quantity of dish.

question: Find the nationality and card credit of each customer.
original_query: SELECT Nationality ,  Card_Credit FROM customer

question: Which customers have nationality "England" or "Australia"? Give me their names.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM customer WHERE Nationality  =  "England" OR Nationality  =  "Australia"

question: For each order, find the customer name and the dish name. Sort the result in descending order of the quantity of dish.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name ,  T2.Dish_Name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN customer_order AS T2 ON T1.Customer_ID  =  T2.Customer_ID ORDER BY T2.Quantity DESC

question: Show the names of customers with nationality "England" or "Australia".

question: Count the number of customers.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM customer

question: Show the customers with total quantity of order bigger than 1.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN customer_order AS T2 ON T1.Customer_ID  =  T2.Customer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING sum(T2.Quantity)  >  1

question: Show distinct managers of branches.

question: List the names of customers in ascending order of level of membership.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM customer ORDER BY Level_of_Membership ASC

question: What is the card credit of the customer with the highest membership level?

question: Show the nations that have both customers with card credit smaller than 50 and customers with card credit bigger than 75.

question: What is the name of the player with the largest number of votes?
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM player ORDER BY Votes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show the residences that have both a player of gender "M" and a player of gender "F".
original_query: SELECT Residence FROM player WHERE gender  =  "M" INTERSECT SELECT Residence FROM player WHERE gender  =  "F"

question: Show the names and genders of players with a coach starting after 2011.
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_name ,  T3.gender FROM player_coach AS T1 JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.Coach_ID  =  T2.Coach_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T1.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T1.Starting_year  >  2011

question: How many players are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM player

question: Show the names of sponsors of players whose residence is either "Brandon" or "Birtle".
original_query: SELECT Sponsor_name FROM player WHERE Residence  =  "Brandon" OR Residence  =  "Birtle"

question: Show the names of players coached by the rank 1 coach.
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_name FROM player_coach AS T1 JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.Coach_ID  =  T2.Coach_ID JOIN player AS T3 ON T1.Player_ID  =  T3.Player_ID WHERE T2.Rank  =  1

question: How many coaches does each club has? List the club id, name and the number of coaches.
original_query: SELECT T1.club_id ,  T1.club_name, count(*) FROM club AS T1 JOIN coach AS T2 ON T1.club_id  =  T2.club_id GROUP BY T1.club_id

question: Please show the most common occupation of players.
original_query: SELECT Occupation FROM player GROUP BY Occupation ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of players that do not have coaches.
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM player WHERE Player_ID NOT IN (SELECT Player_ID FROM player_coach)

question: List the names of roller coasters by ascending order of length.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM roller_coaster ORDER BY LENGTH ASC

question: How many roller coasters are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM roller_coaster

question: Show the names of roller coasters and names of country they are in.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN roller_coaster AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country_ID

question: Please show the most common status of roller coasters.
original_query: SELECT Status FROM roller_coaster GROUP BY Status ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the country names, area and population which has both roller coasters with speed higher
original_query: SELECT T1.name ,  T1.area ,  T1.population FROM country AS T1 JOIN roller_coaster AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country_ID WHERE T2.speed  >  60 INTERSECT SELECT T1.name ,  T1.area ,  T1.population FROM country AS T1 JOIN roller_coaster AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country_ID WHERE T2.speed  <  55

question: List the names of countries whose language is not "German".
original_query: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Languages != "German"

question: Show the statuses of roller coasters longer than 3300 or higher than 100.
original_query: SELECT Status FROM roller_coaster WHERE LENGTH  >  3300 OR Height  >  100

question: What are the lengths and heights of roller coasters?
original_query: SELECT LENGTH ,  Height FROM roller_coaster

question: Show the names of countries that have more than one roller coaster.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN roller_coaster AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID  =  T2.Country_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

question: Which film has the most copies in the inventory? List both title and id.
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T1.film_id FROM film AS T1 JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id  =  T2.film_id GROUP BY T1.film_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the titles of films that are either longer than 100 minutes or rated PG other than those that cost more than 200 to replace?
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE LENGTH  >  100 OR rating  =  'PG' EXCEPT SELECT title FROM film WHERE replacement_cost  >  200

question: Count the number of customers who are active.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM customer WHERE active = '1'

question: What is the name of the language that the film 'AIRPORT POLLOCK' is in?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM film AS T1 JOIN LANGUAGE AS T2 ON T1.language_id  =  T2.language_id WHERE T1.title  =  'AIRPORT POLLOCK'

question: Count the number of addressed in the California district.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM address WHERE district  =  'California'

question: How many items in inventory does store 1 have?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM inventory WHERE store_id  =  1

question: What are the payment dates for any payments that have an amount greater than 10 or were handled by a staff member with the first name Elsa?
original_query: SELECT payment_date FROM payment WHERE amount  >  10 UNION SELECT T1.payment_date FROM payment AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  'Elsa'

question: Return the full name and id of the actor or actress who starred in the greatest number of films.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name ,  T2.last_name ,  T2.actor_id FROM film_actor AS T1 JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id  =  T2.actor_id GROUP BY T2.actor_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many films are there in each category? List the genre name, genre id and the count.
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T1.category_id ,  count(*) FROM film_category AS T1 JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id  =  T2.category_id GROUP BY T1.category_id

question: How many stores are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM store

question: What are the title, id, and description of the movie with the greatest number of actors?
original_query: SELECT T2.title ,  T2.film_id ,  T2.description FROM film_actor AS T1 JOIN film AS T2 ON T1.film_id  =  T2.film_id GROUP BY T2.film_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name and id of the customer who has the lowest total amount of payment?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.customer_id FROM customer AS T1 JOIN payment AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id ORDER BY sum(amount) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Return the sum of all payment amounts.
original_query: SELECT sum(amount) FROM payment

question: Which city has the most addresses? List the city name, number of addresses, and city id.
original_query: SELECT T2.city ,  count(*) ,  T1.city_id FROM address AS T1 JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id GROUP BY T1.city_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which staff handled least number of payments? List the full name and the id.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.staff_id FROM staff AS T1 JOIN payment AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id GROUP BY T1.staff_id ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the city name, id, and number of addresses corresponding to the city with the most addressed?
original_query: SELECT T2.city ,  count(*) ,  T1.city_id FROM address AS T1 JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id  =  T2.city_id GROUP BY T1.city_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the title and rental rate of the film with the highest rental rate?
original_query: SELECT title ,  rental_rate FROM film ORDER BY rental_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Where does the staff member with the first name Elsa live?
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM staff AS T1 JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T1.first_name  =  'Elsa'

question: Count the number of different last names actors have.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT last_name) FROM actor

question: Return the most common first name among all actors.
original_query: SELECT first_name FROM actor GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many cities are in Australia?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id  =  T2.country_id WHERE T2.country  =  'Australia'

question: When did the first payment happen?
original_query: SELECT payment_date FROM payment ORDER BY payment_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the id of the store that has the most items in inventory?
original_query: SELECT store_id FROM inventory GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are all the movies rated as R? List the titles.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE rating  =  'R'

question: Find all the payment dates for the payments with an amount larger than 10 and the payments handled by a staff person with the first name Elsa.
original_query: SELECT payment_date FROM payment WHERE amount  >  10 UNION SELECT T1.payment_date FROM payment AS T1 JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id WHERE T2.first_name  =  'Elsa'

question: What is the full name of the staff member who has rented a film to a customer with the first name April and the last name Burns?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name FROM staff AS T1 JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.staff_id  =  T2.staff_id JOIN customer AS T3 ON T2.customer_id  =  T3.customer_id WHERE T3.first_name  =  'APRIL' AND T3.last_name  =  'BURNS'

question: Return the most common full name among all actors.
original_query: SELECT first_name ,  last_name FROM actor GROUP BY first_name ,  last_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the id of the store with the most customers.
original_query: SELECT store_id FROM customer GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names and ids of the different categories, and how many films are in each?
original_query: SELECT T2.name ,  T1.category_id ,  count(*) FROM film_category AS T1 JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id  =  T2.category_id GROUP BY T1.category_id

question: Return the titles of any movies with an R rating.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE rating  =  'R'

question: Give the phone and postal code corresponding to the address '1031 Daugavpils Parkway'.
original_query: SELECT phone ,  postal_code FROM address WHERE address  =  '1031 Daugavpils Parkway'

question: Which countries have at least 3 cities?
original_query: SELECT T2.country FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.country_id  =  T2.country_id GROUP BY T2.country_id HAVING count(*)  >=  3

question: Which districts have at least two addresses?
original_query: SELECT district FROM address GROUP BY district HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: What is the film title and inventory id of the item in the inventory which was rented most frequently?
original_query: SELECT T1.title ,  T2.inventory_id FROM film AS T1 JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id  =  T2.film_id JOIN rental AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id  =  T3.inventory_id GROUP BY T2.inventory_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the genre name of the film HUNGER ROOF?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM category AS T1 JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.category_id  =  T2.category_id JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id  =  T3.film_id WHERE T3.title  =  'HUNGER ROOF'

question: Return the address of store 1.
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM store AS T1 JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE store_id  =  1

question: Return the amount of the largest payment.
original_query: SELECT amount FROM payment ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which film is rented at a fee of 0.99 and has less than 3 in the inventory? List the film title and id.
original_query: SELECT title ,  film_id FROM film WHERE rental_rate  =  0.99 INTERSECT SELECT T1.title ,  T1.film_id FROM film AS T1 JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id  =  T2.film_id GROUP BY T1.film_id HAVING count(*)  <  3

question: Return the titles of films that include 'Deleted Scenes' in their special feature section.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE special_features LIKE '%Deleted Scenes%'

question: Which store owns most items?
original_query: SELECT store_id FROM inventory GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the first name and the last name of the customer who made the earliest rental?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.last_name FROM customer AS T1 JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id ORDER BY T2.rental_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: new deep learning papers
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.paperid  ,  t3.year FROM paperkeyphrase AS t2 JOIN keyphrase AS t1 ON t2.keyphraseid  =  t1.keyphraseid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid WHERE t1.keyphrasename  =  "deep learning" ORDER BY t3.year DESC;

question: TAIL papers used in NIPS
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.paperid FROM paperkeyphrase AS t2 JOIN keyphrase AS t1 ON t2.keyphraseid  =  t1.keyphraseid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid JOIN venue AS t4 ON t4.venueid  =  t3.venueid WHERE t1.keyphrasename  =  "TAIL" AND t4.venuename  =  "NIPS";

question: papers that used WebKB
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t3.paperid FROM paperdataset AS t2 JOIN dataset AS t1 ON t2.datasetid  =  t1.datasetid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid WHERE t1.datasetname  =  "WebKB";

question: In what year did Ye Cao publish the most papers
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT ( DISTINCT t3.paperid )  ,  t3.year FROM writes AS t2 JOIN author AS t1 ON t2.authorid  =  t1.authorid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t2.paperid  =  t3.paperid WHERE t1.authorname LIKE "Ye Cao" GROUP BY t3.year ORDER BY COUNT ( DISTINCT t3.paperid ) DESC;

question: At which conferences does Daniella Coelho publish ?
