question: What are all the different contents stored in boxes in New York?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.contents FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code WHERE LOCATION  =  'New York'

question: Select the warehouse code and the average value of the boxes only for those warehouses where the average value of the boxes is greater than 150.
original_query: SELECT warehouse ,  avg(value) FROM boxes GROUP BY warehouse HAVING avg(value)  >  150

question: Find the code of boxes that are stored at the warehouses located at Chicago or New York.
original_query: SELECT T1.code FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code WHERE T2.location  =  'Chicago' OR T2.location  =  'New York'

question: What are the codes of boxes for which the value is greater than the value of any box that contains Rocks?
original_query: SELECT code FROM boxes WHERE value  >  (SELECT min(value) FROM boxes WHERE CONTENTS  =  'Rocks')

question: Find the average and maximum value for each different content.
original_query: SELECT avg(value) ,  max(value) ,  CONTENTS FROM boxes GROUP BY CONTENTS

question: Select all distinct contents in all the boxes.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CONTENTS FROM boxes

question: What are the contents of boxes with value greater than 150?
original_query: SELECT CONTENTS FROM boxes WHERE Value  >  150

question: Find the code and content of all boxes whose value is higher than the value of all boxes with Scissors as content.
original_query: SELECT code ,  CONTENTS FROM boxes WHERE value  >  (SELECT max(value) FROM boxes WHERE CONTENTS  =  'Scissors')

question: What is the total value of boxes kept in the warehouse with the greatest capacity?
original_query: SELECT sum(T1.value) FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code ORDER BY T2.capacity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the locations of warehouses in which boxes that contain Rocks and Scissors are kept?
original_query: SELECT T2.location FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code WHERE T1.contents  =  'Rocks' INTERSECT SELECT T2.location FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code WHERE T1.contents  =  'Scissors'

question: Find the number of different locations where Rocks are stored.
original_query: SELECT count(DISTINCT LOCATION) FROM boxes AS T1 JOIN warehouses AS T2 ON T1.warehouse  =  T2.code WHERE T1.contents  =  'Rocks'

question: List all different types of contents ordered by contents.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CONTENTS FROM boxes ORDER BY CONTENTS

question: Show the church names for the weddings of all people older than 30.
original_query: SELECT T4.name FROM wedding AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.male_id  =  T2.people_id JOIN people AS T3 ON T1.female_id  =  T3.people_id JOIN church AS T4 ON T4.church_id  =  T1.church_id WHERE T2.age  >  30 OR T3.age  >  30

question: Show all church names except for those that had a wedding in year 2015.
original_query: SELECT name FROM church EXCEPT SELECT T1.name FROM church AS T1 JOIN wedding AS T2 ON T1.church_id  =  T2.church_id WHERE T2.year  =  2015

question: How many churches opened before 1850 are there?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Church WHERE Open_Date  <  1850

question: Show the name, open date, and organizer for all churches.
original_query: SELECT name ,  open_date ,  organized_by FROM Church

question: Show the name and age for all male people who don't have a wedding.
original_query: SELECT name ,  age FROM people WHERE is_male  =  'T' AND people_id NOT IN (SELECT male_id FROM wedding)

question: Show the name and country for all people whose age is smaller than the average.
original_query: SELECT name ,  country FROM people WHERE age  <  (SELECT avg(age) FROM people)

question: Show the country where people older than 30 and younger than 25 are from.
original_query: SELECT country FROM people WHERE age  <  25 INTERSECT SELECT country FROM people WHERE age  >  30

question: Show the name and opening year for three churches that opened most recently.
original_query: SELECT name ,  open_date FROM church ORDER BY open_date DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show all church names that have hosted least two weddings.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM church AS T1 JOIN wedding AS T2 ON T1.church_id  =  T2.church_id GROUP BY T1.church_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

question: Show all countries and the number of people from each country.
original_query: SELECT country ,  count(*) FROM people GROUP BY country

question: What are the distinct names of wines with prices higher than any wine from John Anthony winery.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM WINE WHERE Price  >  (SELECT min(Price) FROM wine WHERE Winery  =  "John Anthony")

question: What are the names and scores of all wines?
original_query: SELECT Name ,  Score FROM WINE

question: What are the average prices of wines for different years?
original_query: SELECT avg(Price) ,  YEAR FROM WINE GROUP BY YEAR

question: Find the names of all distinct wines that have appellations in North Coast area.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM APPELLATIONs AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation WHERE T1.Area  =  "North Coast"

question: Give the names and scores of wines made from white grapes.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name ,   T2.Score FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape  =  T2.Grape WHERE T1.Color  =  "White"

question: What is the name of the highest rated wine?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM WINE ORDER BY Score LIMIT 1

question: List the area and county of all appelations.
original_query: SELECT Area ,  County FROM APPELLATIONS

question: Give the names of wines with prices above any wine produced in 2006.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM WINE WHERE Price  >  (SELECT max(Price) FROM WINE WHERE YEAR  =  2006)

question: Which winery is the wine that has the highest score from?
original_query: SELECT Winery FROM WINE ORDER BY SCORE LIMIT 1

question: Find the country of all appelations who have at most three wines.
original_query: SELECT T1.County FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation GROUP BY T2.Appelation HAVING count(*)  <=  3

question: Find the average price of wines that are not produced from Sonoma county.
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM wine WHERE Appelation NOT IN (SELECT T1.Appelation FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation WHERE T1.County  =  'Sonoma')

question: What is the area of the appelation that produces the highest number of wines before the year of 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.Area FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation GROUP BY T2.Appelation HAVING T2.year  <  2010 ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the top 3 wineries with the greatest number of wines made of white color grapes.
original_query: SELECT T2.Winery FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.GRAPE  =  T2.GRAPE WHERE T1.Color  =  "White" GROUP BY T2.Winery ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the wines that have prices higher than 50 and made of Red color grapes?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Grapes AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape  =  T2.Grape WHERE T1.Color  =  "Red" AND T2.price  >  50

question: What are the maximum price and score of wines produced by St. Helena appelation?
original_query: SELECT max(Price) ,  max(Score) FROM WINE WHERE Appelation  =  "St. Helena"

question: Find the the grape whose white color grapes are used to produce wines with scores higher than 90.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Grape FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape  =  T2.Grape WHERE T1.Color  =  "White" AND T2.score  >  90

question: What are the names of wines, sorted in alphabetical order?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM WINE ORDER BY Name

question: What are the grapes, wineries and years for wines with price higher than 100, sorted by year?
original_query: SELECT Grape ,  Winery ,  YEAR FROM WINE WHERE Price  >   100 ORDER BY YEAR

question: What are the areas and counties for all appelations?

question: What are the numbers of wines for different grapes?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  Grape FROM WINE GROUP BY Grape

question: Which wineries produce at least four wines?
original_query: SELECT Winery FROM WINE GROUP BY Winery HAVING count(*)  >=  4

question: How many wines are produced at Robert Biale winery?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM WINE WHERE Winery  =  "Robert Biale"

question: Find the distinct names of all wines that have prices higher than some wines from John Anthony winery.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM WINE WHERE Price  >  (SELECT min(Price) FROM wine WHERE Winery  =  "John Anthony")

question: What are the average prices and cases of wines produced in the year of 2009 and made of Zinfandel grape?

question: Give the average price and case of wines made from Zinfandel grapes in the year 2009.
original_query: SELECT AVG(Price) ,  AVG(Cases) FROM WINE WHERE YEAR  =  2009 AND Grape  =  "Zinfandel"

question: How many appelations are in Napa Country?
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM APPELLATIONS WHERE County  =  "Napa"

question: Give the neames of wines with prices below 50 and with appelations in Monterey county.

question: What are the average price and score of wines for each appelation?

question: List the grape, winery and year of the wines whose price is bigger than 100 ordered by year.
original_query: SELECT Grape ,  Winery ,  YEAR FROM WINE WHERE Price  >   100 ORDER BY YEAR

question: Give the maximum price and score for wines produced in the appelation St. Helena.
original_query: SELECT max(Price) ,  max(Score) FROM WINE WHERE Appelation  =  "St. Helena"

question: List the grapes and appelations of all wines.
original_query: SELECT Grape ,  Appelation FROM WINE

question: What is the average price for wines not produced in Sonoma county?
original_query: SELECT avg(price) FROM wine WHERE Appelation NOT IN (SELECT T1.Appelation FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation WHERE T1.County  =  'Sonoma')

question: What are the wines that have prices lower than 50 and have appelations in Monterey county?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation WHERE T1.County  =  "Monterey" AND T2.price  <  50

question: What are the prices of wines produced before the year of 2010?
original_query: SELECT Price FROM WINE WHERE YEAR  <  2010

question: What is the color of the grape whose wine products has the highest average price?
original_query: SELECT T1.Color FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape  =  T2.Grape GROUP BY T2.Grape ORDER BY AVG(Price) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the distinct wineries which produce wines costing between 50 and 100?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Winery FROM WINE WHERE Price BETWEEN 50 AND 100

question: Give the color of the grape whose wine products have the highest average price?
original_query: SELECT T1.Color FROM GRAPES AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Grape  =  T2.Grape GROUP BY T2.Grape ORDER BY AVG(Price) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the average price and score of wines grouped by appelation?
original_query: SELECT avg(Price) ,  avg(Score) ,  Appelation FROM WINE GROUP BY Appelation

question: What are the names of wines that are more expensive then all wines made in the year 2006?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM WINE WHERE Price  >  (SELECT max(Price) FROM WINE WHERE YEAR  =  2006)

question: What is the county that produces the most wines scoring higher than 90?
original_query: SELECT T1.County FROM APPELLATIONS AS T1 JOIN WINE AS T2 ON T1.Appelation  =  T2.Appelation WHERE T2.Score  >  90 GROUP BY T1.County ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average score of submissions?

original_query: SELECT Date ,  Venue FROM workshop ORDER BY Venue

question: Count the number of submissions.
original_query: SELECT count(*) FROM submission

question: Which college has the most authors with submissions?

question: Sort the each workshop in alphabetical order of the venue. Return the date and venue of each workshop.
original_query: SELECT Date ,  Venue FROM workshop ORDER BY Venue

question: Which authors with submissions are from college "Florida" or "Temple"?

original_query: SELECT College FROM submission WHERE Scores  >  90 INTERSECT SELECT College FROM submission WHERE Scores  <  80

question: Which authors have submitted to more than one workshop?
original_query: SELECT T2.Author FROM acceptance AS T1 JOIN submission AS T2 ON T1.Submission_ID  =  T2.Submission_ID GROUP BY T2.Author HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.workshop_id)  >  1

question: List the authors of submissions in ascending order of scores.
original_query: SELECT Author FROM submission ORDER BY Scores ASC

question: Which submission received the highest score in acceptance result. Show me the result.

question: List the authors who do not have submission to any workshop.
original_query: SELECT Author FROM submission WHERE Submission_ID NOT IN (SELECT Submission_ID FROM acceptance)

question: How many workshops did each author submit to? Return the author name and the number of workshops.
original_query: SELECT T2.Author ,  COUNT(DISTINCT T1.workshop_id) FROM acceptance AS T1 JOIN submission AS T2 ON T1.Submission_ID  =  T2.Submission_ID GROUP BY T2.Author

question: Compute the average score of submissions.
original_query: SELECT avg(Scores) FROM submission

question: Show the names of authors from college "Florida" or "Temple"
original_query: SELECT Author FROM submission WHERE College  =  "Florida" OR College  =  "Temple"

question: What are the regions that use English or Dutch?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Region FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "English" OR T2.Language  =  "Dutch"

question: What is name of the country that speaks the largest number of languages?

question: How much surface area do the countires in the Carribean cover together?
original_query: SELECT sum(SurfaceArea) FROM country WHERE Region  =  "Caribbean"

question: Return the names of cities that have a population between 160000 and 900000 .
original_query: select name from city where population between 160000 and 900000

question: Which Asian countries have a population that is larger than any country in Africa?

question: What are the names of the nations with the 3 lowest populations?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM country ORDER BY Population ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total number of languages used in Aruba?

question: What are the cities whose population is between 160000 and 900000?

question: What are names of countries with the top 3 largest population?

original_query: SELECT avg(GNP) ,  sum(population) FROM country WHERE GovernmentForm  =  "US Territory"

question: Find the average life expectancy and total population for each continent where the average life expectancy is shorter than 72?
original_query: SELECT sum(Population) ,  avg(LifeExpectancy) ,  Continent FROM country GROUP BY Continent HAVING avg(LifeExpectancy)  <  72

question: What is the language that is used by the largest number of Asian nations?
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Continent  =  "Asia" GROUP BY T2.Language ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the country codes for countries that do not speak English.

question: What are the countries where either English or Dutch is the official language ?
original_query: select t1.name from country as t1 join countrylanguage as t2 on t1.code  =  t2.countrycode where t2.language  =  "english" and isofficial  =  "t" union select t1.name from country as t1 join countrylanguage as t2 on t1.code  =  t2.countrycode where t2.language  =  "dutch" and isofficial  =  "t"

question: How long is the people’s average life expectancy in Central Africa?
original_query: SELECT avg(LifeExpectancy) FROM country WHERE Region  =  "Central Africa"

question: Return the different names of cities that are in Asia and for which Chinese is the official language.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode JOIN city AS T3 ON T1.Code  =  T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.IsOfficial  =  'T' AND T2.Language  =  'Chinese' AND T1.Continent  =  "Asia"

question: How many continents speak Chinese?
original_query: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT Continent) FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "Chinese"

question: Give the names of nations that speak both English and French.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "English" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "French"

question: Find the number of cities in each district whose population is greater than the average population of cities?
original_query: SELECT count(*) ,  District FROM city WHERE Population  >  (SELECT avg(Population) FROM city) GROUP BY District

question: Give the name of the nation that uses the greatest amount of languages.

question: What is the official language spoken in the country whose head of state is Beatrix?

question: What is the total population and average area of countries in the continent of North America whose area is bigger than 3000 ?

question: Which unique cities are in Asian countries where Chinese is the official language ?

question: Which cities are in European countries where English is not the official language?

question: What is the first name and country code of the oldest player?

question: Find all restaurant Seafood in Los Angeles
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM category AS t2 JOIN business AS t1 ON t2.business_id  =  t1.business_id JOIN category AS t3 ON t3.business_id  =  t1.business_id WHERE t1.city  =  "Los Angeles" AND t2.category_name  =  "Seafood" AND t3.category_name  =  "restaurant";

question: Find all cities in Texas in which there is a restaurant called " MGM Grand Buffet "
original_query: SELECT t1.city FROM category AS t2 JOIN business AS t1 ON t2.business_id  =  t1.business_id WHERE t1.name  =  "MGM Grand Buffet" AND t1.state  =  "Texas" AND t2.category_name  =  "restaurant";

question: find all cities which has a " Taj Mahal " restaurant
original_query: SELECT t1.city FROM category AS t2 JOIN business AS t1 ON t2.business_id  =  t1.business_id WHERE t1.name  =  "Taj Mahal" AND t2.category_name  =  "restaurant";

question: find the total checkins in Moroccan restaurant in " Los Angeles " on Friday
original_query: SELECT SUM ( t4.count ) FROM category AS t2 JOIN business AS t1 ON t2.business_id  =  t1.business_id JOIN category AS t3 ON t3.business_id  =  t1.business_id JOIN checkin AS t4 ON t4.business_id  =  t1.business_id WHERE t1.city  =  "Los Angeles" AND t2.category_name  =  "Moroccan" AND t3.category_name  =  "restaurant" AND t4.day  =  "Friday";

question: Find all businesses in Texas with a rating below 2
original_query: SELECT name FROM business WHERE rating  <  2 AND state  =  "Texas";

question: What neighbourhood is restaurant " Flat Top Grill " in ?
